-DfYYoZTbnE.Name: “Seeds of Peace” Prem Rawat at Lambeth College, London
-DfYYoZTbnE.Description:
In collaboration with community activists, local law enforcement, and other community leaders, the Peace is Possible campaign was officially launched in June, 2018, with the “Seeds of Peace” event in London’s community of Lambeth.

In conversation with Pastor Lorraine Jones, who is a leader in the effort to resolve youth violence in her community, Prem Rawat shared his understanding of the root causes of violence, and offered his practical path to change.

We hope you are inspired by the courage and compassion required to make a difference. Access this full-length recording with your TimelessToday Classic or Premier subscription. 

https://www.timelesstoday.tv/seeds-of-peace-lambeth-video?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

#PremRawatOfficial #Violence #Transformation

-KWGm0RWsFI.Name: Mauke Ki Pehchan - मौके की पहचान
-KWGm0RWsFI.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization

-Qi5Bp1TRjI.Name: Prem Rawat LIVE, from Kyoto
-Qi5Bp1TRjI.Description:
Save the Date!
Friday, May 16, 2025
2:00 P.M. JST (5:00 A.M. UTC)
Prem Rawat in Kyoto, Japan
LiveStream on TimelessToday®

In English with Simultaneous Translation in French | Hindi | Italian | Spanish

“The value of understanding the self is to make a contribution to your own life, to bring forth goodness in your life, to bring forth joy in your life, to bring strength in your life.” Prem Rawat

Amid the natural beauty of springtime in Kyoto, Prem Rawat returns to Japan with his profound and universal message.

During his October 2016 Kyoto visit, he posed a simple question: "Who are you?" He continued, “You are more than you understand. You are the decision-maker for your existence. And the day you become the source of your own inspiration, that is the day you will understand what peace is all about."

Join the celebrations surrounding the release of Prem Rawat’s latest book "Breath" and discover what it means to become the source of your own inspiration.

Virtual Attendance
Can't make it to Kyoto? TimelessToday® will livestream the event to all Classic and Premier subscribers on the app and website, with a replay available soon after.

This livestream will be in English with simultaneous French, Hindi, Italian and Spanish translation.

Be sure to turn on notifications in the Settings menu of your TimelessToday app.

💡 Important Login Tip 💡  
🗝️ Once you’ve logged in to your TimelessToday account, please stay logged in at all times. There is no need to log out.

📱Be sure you are using the latest version of the TimelessToday mobile app. Updates available on Apple App Store and Google Play Store depending on your device.

“आशा और स्पष्टता के स्रोत को पहचानने में मैं आपकी मदद कर सकता हूँ, ताकि आप संतृप्त हो सके और आने वाली हर परिस्थिति का सामना करने के लिए बेहतर तैयार रहें ।" — प्रेम रावत

0578a1e3-bf5b-4c14-86fb-3b2157d1ed7e.Name: Sweet Reality
0578a1e3-bf5b-4c14-86fb-3b2157d1ed7e.Description:
One 2 One with Prem Rawat | No. 20


Prem Rawat:

All stories begin with “Once upon a time.” The story that I really want to tell you also begins like this, but there is a small difference—and the difference is, “Once upon this time there lives you.”

Hello everyone—Prem Rawat here. I’ve finally made it all the way to India—and this is where I’m recording this broadcast. So, a long journey, (obviously, from, all the way from California to Delhi). You know, just reflecting on that, we have a journey too—and the journey is the journey of this life.

Now, it doesn’t—it may not feel like it. It may feel like, “Well, what journey? You know, every day I wake up” in this, whatever, wherever you live—you are there; you have your chores; you have your things that you have to do. And a lot of things don’t change.

But believe me, change is afoot all the time. And something, very fundamentally, is always changing. And little by little, this incredible amount of time that you had on this earth is being chiseled away.

Now, this is not—I know this is not a pleasant topic to talk about. But it’s a realistic topic to talk about. Because I think it sets the context for all that that we do, all that we think, all that we want to do. Because what is the reality? And sometimes when that word “reality” is said, it’s very confronting. It’s like “What do you mean—what, what reality? This is reality, isn’t it?”

There are people—and they cannot think beyond their business, beyond their, whatever little circle that they have. There it is, their apartment; there it is, their town; there it is, their country. And yet, none of it was ever like that.

There was a time when very much, on this planet Earth, everything was just too hot, too inhospitable to even survive, for anything to survive.

And as millions and millions and millions of years that it took. And when somebody says that, it’s very hard to understand—but it is true. And it took a long, long time to go through all of that to get to a point where we have the earth where it can support the life that it supports. And that we came. We are alive. And one day we’ll be gone.

So, everything on the face of this earth is transitory. Now, a lot of people who had some time; they could sit down; they could observe this—and in their wisdom, this is what they said, is that “This is transitory; this isn’t here permanently. It may seem to you that way—but it isn’t. It all moves. It isn’t what you think.”

Yesterday I did a broadcast in Hindi—so, one of the things I was saying is just like, “You’re sitting in a train.” And, you know, it’s the theory of relativity, but “You’re in a train—and you’re moving.” And of course, you don’t look like you are moving; everything else is moving.

So, that window that you’re looking out of, it’s like, well, just right there—it’s always been there since the train started moving. And it was the trees that went by. But in reality, it isn’t the trees that are moving. It is the train that you are in that is moving.

So, if you take a ball and you start bouncing it up and down—and the train is moving at a hundred kilometers an hour, well, that ball is moving a hundred kilometers an hour in relation to what is outside.

It is quite, just up and down—in relation to the train itself. But in relation to all the trees that are out there, the mountain that’s out there, people that are out there, that ball is clipping right along at a hundred kilometers an hour.

So it’s relative. And where we are, it is very hard for us to see what is moving, what is happening, what is the reality. So, we automatically assume a reality. We think that “This is the way the world is,” the way we observe it. “This is—ah, well, yeah, of course, this is how it’s going to be; this is this way; this is this way; this is this way.”

But none of that is real. That you, in your body, you live, you exist every day like you’re going to live forever, but you’re not! So what, what exactly is that all about? So, what is reality, then?

And at first, it may be that, you know, you think about it or you look at it and it’s like, very confronting. But then when you start to just settle down, (yes, yeah, you’ve got to settle down)—and go “Wait a minute. Maybe that reality is very sweet; maybe that reality is very beautiful. Not abrupt and harsh as I take it to be.”

But it is a sweet reality that I have been given a time to be on the face of this earth. And it’s a gift! I don’t know how it happened. I didn’t—I certainly didn’t push any buttons—but I’m here. One day, I will be gone.

And my focus isn’t about going. I know there are people who absolutely do not want to concentrate on one second of being alive. They want to concentrate on the departure: “Are we going to end up in heaven, or are we going to end up in hell?”

This—I mean, the heaven—they’re so obsessed with heaven! And they have never been there. It’s not like they actually have any firsthand experience of it—no, it’s just people describing it. And those people who are describing it also haven’t been there.

But you are here. Nobody has to describe what it is like—that early in the morning, when the sun begins, there is a pinkness. And it is so sweet. And the coming of this light, not abruptly but ever so gently, slowly, slowly, slowly, slowly filling up, filling up that sky that was so dark, with this gentle, gentle light.

The fact that that sun that is so bright, that’s so brilliant, that is so powerful, can bring on its light so sweetly, so gently is almost inconceivable—but so it is!

And then there is the water. And, you know, somebody actually said, “Why do we call it ‘earth’; it’s mostly all water!” It’s true. And there’s the ocean, supporting all this life in its bosom, in its self. Lapping against the shorelines, making a sound that is so beautiful, so relaxing to human beings.

The birds that can sing, the wind that can blow. This amazing earth, we do not consider it to be a heaven. But I have heard no description of heaven, ever, that surpasses what this earth is.

So, we will gladly exchange, (as if it were), everything—for somebody’s description. What about your experience? What about your experience? What have you experienced; what do you feel; what do you see? What is that joy like in your life when you love? What is that joy like in your existence when you feel that contentment?

Yeah, we pursue happiness. But we don’t understand the nature of happiness; it keeps changing. What made you happy two weeks ago isn’t what’s going to make you happy today. But contentment is different. Contentment is all about you being in that place where you feel that tranquility.

Can you afford in your life to slow down enough to feel what this existence is all about? Can you slow down enough in your life to feel what this breath is all about? Can you take your ambitions and focus them on wanting to feel, not happiness, but contentment? Can you take this energy that you’re constantly putting towards the outside, into the world—and take that focus and put it on the inside?

And be prepared to feel the simplicity, the simplicity of the entire universe as it permeates everything that is there? Even though there is so much action; there is so much going on in this universe, there is a simplicity, and that simplicity, that profoundness is also reflected inside of you. And you have the possibility to feel that.

You know, “good things” in life is understanding them, accepting them. If somebody loves you, you can hate them. And you can hate them, and all you will feel is hate. Or, you can also start accepting that love. And that the love that, from acceptance of that love, the love that’ll come from you, that’ll be generated inside of you, you can feel that too.

Hate begets hate. Anger begets anger. Fear begets fear. True. Very, very true. But conversely, love begets love. Joy begets joy.

Is this different? Is this wrong? There’s no judgment. It is. This is what makes you human; you live in this paradox. And yet, there is one part of you that thinks this is a paradox. And there is another part of you that knows that this is not a paradox. It is in fact, your reality—your reality.

And that is—that is absolutely amazing—that that is your reality. It could be anything. And one of the things is, yes, you can imagine things in life. Oh, yeah, there are many things you can imagine in life. But there is a reality as well that you must accept.

So, I don’t say to people, “You should not run with your imagination”—of course you should run with your imagination if you want to. Whatever you want to do—provided you also accept the reality that is here. Because it’s a sweet reality; it’s a beautiful reality. It’s your reality. It’s your understanding; it’s about you! Your life is about you.

I mean, and you know, yeah, people, well, it’s like, “Oh yeah, well, you know, that’s not the right way to think about life; that’s not the right way to think about this, you know, and but that’s, that’s too selfish....”

Come on, please! Please. Where does this breath take place, in somebody else—or in you? Where do you feel joy, in somewhere else, or in you? So, why is it that you feel joy inside of you? And why is it—most importantly—that you want to feel joy? Why do you want to feel joy? Have you ever asked that question? Why do you want to feel joy?

Ask it. Ask the question. And if you do ask that question, you will find out that inside of you, within you is that pot that yearns to be filled. You can call it a pot; you can call it a heart. You can—you can call it “you,” for that matter. It’s sweet! It’s beautiful. And that’s the way the kindness of this universe is.

There is utter destruction, absolute destruction—and then there is existence. And both are allowed to coexist. It’s not like it’s all being destroyed. Of course, it’ll, eventually, “all being destroyed” but before it is all destroyed, it is allowed to exist. And it is allowed to go in destruction mode only to be recreated again. Wow—only to be recreated again.

And maybe never the same, everything a little bit different. A sun could be destroyed—and end up as a satellite moon. To all of this, the change. We don’t like to change. We don’t want to change. But change is inevitable; that’s going to happen.

That’s what Marcus Aurelius said. Change, change, change takes place. Do you like it? Do you want it? Maybe not. Because you work so hard to shore up everything to make sure that it doesn’t change. And then somebody comes along and says, “No, it has to change.” And that’s very inconvenient. That’s, and that, that’s not fun.

So? Not looking at the time now—and projecting it in hell and heaven, “And it’ll be much better after I die.” And yet, who comes back and says “Oh, yeah, yeah, everything is cool”? And who says, “Well, you know, I, I’ll expedite”? Nobody wants to expedite—not in their right mind, anyways, not in a sane way.

So, we do—and we are in this paradox. But in this paradox, there is an incredible clarity. And that clarity is so beautiful and it’s so profound. And that’s what we have got to latch onto. And if we can, it can be the most beautiful thing in our life.

We can be thankful for this existence. We can appreciate, in a unique way, in our unique way, what we have been given, what has been made possible. And that’s where gratitude comes from. The want to know yourself is there.

A lot of people will go, “No, I don’t want to know myself. I, I don’t have that want. I don’t—I, I don’t care!” But you do. And when you were growing up, that was one of the things that mattered an incredible amount to you—even if you, you know, say “Oh, it didn’t, didn’t matter to me,” oh yeah, it did.

What did you like? Which ice cream flavor did you like? What was your favorite dish—and that wasn’t the same dish as everybody else’s. What color clothes did you wear? What was your favorite color? This is all in the search of identity, of trying to identify who you are.

When you were born, you know, your—the center of your universe was that person who was caring for you. Your mother—and things were maybe very, very simple; most of the time you slept—when you felt hunger, you woke up. Then went back to sleep.

Things changed, changed, changed—you started to become aware; you started to become aware; you started to become aware of this; you started to become aware of that. And most importantly, you started to become aware of yourself.

And you wanted an identity: “This is who I am.” Of course, there was a name. But it went far beyond name. It also went to everything else. What color you like, what, you know, what is your favorite day, to, you know, “Do you like going to school?” “And I don’t like the going to school.”

Who are your friends; who, you know, your.... You may have a friend; then all of a sudden, that friend isn’t your friend anymore. Whatever. Seeking that identity. And what is the most important thing of seeking that identity? Knowing your self. Knowing the self.

So, there, it was just related to colors or this or that or all the other little things. Then, there is the whole idea of the, take it one whole step beyond that—and really find out who you are, not just the colors, (your favorite color or your favorite day or your favorite dish or your “favorite this” or your “favorite that”).

Who really, as a human being, you are—not your personality—but the components of your existence. What do you have inside of you? Do you have that incredible joy?

That you have anger, that you have fear. That you have hate. But you also have incredible—see, this is the component. With this—in the world, we don’t think of these things. But these, this is all part of knowing yourself.

Now, you don’t abandon one for the other. (What your favorite color is will remain your favorite color. And who your favorite person is will remain your favorite person.) But! Then starting to understand the depth, that there is more than meets the eye.

Know yourself, always. Know and understand the thirst for the contentment that you have. Because that contentment is important to you; this is one of the components that is required by you.

You think it’s just happiness. But happiness comes and goes. That’s its nature—and that’s perfectly okay. That doesn’t make happiness wrong. That doesn’t make happiness wrong. That’s perfectly okay. But contentment is what you truly desire. Then the want isn’t there anymore. It’s a different state of being.

It’s like, there you are. And you’re lying there—and you want to go to sleep, and you can’t go to sleep and you’re turning and you’re tossing and—and then finally, it happens. And you fall asleep. Contentment.

“I want this. I want that. I, yeah, I think I need this; I think I need that. I need to be better than the other people. I need to do this; I need to do that. I,” da, da-da, da-da, da-da, da! And then, (whew), just you. How beautiful, how simple—how profound that is. And this is the only way you will be able to have that gratitude that you need in your life.

And what is the significance of gratitude? The significance of gratitude is that then, that contentment is afoot. And as a result of that, here comes gratitude. So, it’s never one gift—it’s one gift and then another gift—and then another gift, and then another gift. It’s like a tree.

And before the season, what can it give you? It can give you shade. It can give you a support. You can lie against it and rest. And then, when the season comes, it gives you a fruit.

Life can be like that—if we let life be life, and not try to manipulate it, not try to change it. Otherwise, there’s so much out there that’s so unbelievable! And it’s in our world! You know, it, and this is the time we live in.

So, make the most, make the most of this existence that you have. Somehow, it’s incredibly important that you do.

So, thank you very much; stay well; stay safe. And I will talk to you soon.

06146bac-ce26-40b2-afe2-a78ed54a4fd0.Description:
On November 8, 2023, in Delhi, India, a small gathering joined by 8,000 livestream viewers honored the 123rd birth anniversary of Prem Rawat's father and teacher, Shri Maharaji. 

During the event, Prem Rawat described the responsibility that the teacher accepts to help students experience that which is indescribable and can’t be understood with your intellect. 

Embracing his father’s vision to reach people beyond India, the gift of Self-Knowledge has touched the lives of individuals in more than 110 countries worldwide.

Prem Rawat's 65th Birthday Celebration, LiveStream Replay


With a large number “65” appearing on the backdrop above him, Prem Rawat spoke with the same depth and wisdom he shared as a young boy. Although this 65th birthday milestone was achieved, his words reached beyond the celebration of a one-day event and focused on the profound opportunity that life itself holds.

An in-person audience in Pasadena, CA and a virtual TimelessToday audience from 93 countries were reminded about the importance of listening without judgment and appreciating the gift of life.


You can now watch or listen to the Replay of the event in English anytime, anywhere with your Classic or Premier subscription.

06c17596-0279-4293-8a26-f86d5f58eae2.Name: Champions of Hope - complete
06c17596-0279-4293-8a26-f86d5f58eae2.Description: Prem Rawat came to South Africa to speak about peace in 1972. He was 14 years old. Nelson Mandela was in prison, serving a life sentence (before his 1990 publish) for his attempts to overturn its brutal Apartheid regime. When government officials discovered that the young Prem was addressing racially mixed audiences, they told him he could only speak to segregated racial groups. Prem refused, and the government blacklisted him. He was probably the youngest person ever to be blacklisted by the Apartheid regime for refusing to hold segregated events. Standing up to the regime was an extraordinary example of Prem’s courage.

Prem Rawat in Buenos Aires | Saturday Evening What if the weight you're carrying isn't yours to bear? In this refreshingly candid and deeply human talk, which includes questions from viewers, Prem Rawat tackles life's most universal struggles with equal parts wisdom and wit. Drawing on ancient storytelling and turbulent airplane flights alike, Prem Rawat invites us to stop dwelling on our wrongs and turn toward what we actually have. His take on grief is breathtaking in its simplicity. His perspective on guilt will make you laugh before it makes you think. And joy? Not something you chase – something you uncover. Warm, funny and utterly unfiltered, Prem’s perspective doesn’t ask you to change your life – it asks you to live it fully

The replay awaits with your Classic or Premier subscription.
Looking for coverage of Saturday & Sunday Morning Sessions? Visit intelligentexistence.com/.

0880fc0c-b8f2-4e40-9ceb-9d47e57a8b77.Description:
Prem Rawat in Lambeth, London, England


In collaboration with community activists, local law enforcement, and other community leaders, the Peace is Possible campaign was officially launched in June, 2018, with the “Seeds of Peace” event in London’s community of Lambeth.

In conversation with Pastor Lorraine Jones, who is a leader in the effort to resolve youth violence in her community, Prem Rawat shared his understanding of the root causes of violence and offered his practical path to change.

We hope you are inspired by the courage and compassion required to make a difference.

0Iv7qazcTXa7JK5Zh8D0zW.Name: THE COMPOSITION THAT MAKES YOU HUMAN
0Iv7qazcTXa7JK5Zh8D0zW.Description: What's so special about being human? Tune in for the remarkable answer. What does it really mean to be a human being? Is there anything that sets it apart from other creatures? Is there some special combination that makes us human? We'll answer that question in this brand-new episode of Life's Essentials with Prem Rawat. South African media personality Lumka Ngxoli joins us to introduce this latest series of essential podcasts. 0PucOLYHBZY.Name: गुरु तेरी पूजा (अंश)
0PucOLYHBZY.Description:
दिल्ली, भारत में इंदिरा गांधी इंडोर स्टेडियम में आयोजित इस विशेष समारोह के दौरान, श्री प्रेम रावत जी को उनके 58 वर्षों के अथक प्रयासों के लिए सम्मानित किया गया। श्री प्रेम रावत जी पिछले 58 वर्षो से दुनिया भर से लोगों का मार्गदर्शन कर रहे हैं। एक शिक्षक होने के नाते, आत्म-ज्ञान द्वारा हम कैसे परमानंद का अनुभव कर सकते हैं,  इस विषय में वे व्यावहारिक तरीके भी साझा करते हैं। 

उन्होंने इन वर्षों में दुनिया भर के लोगों को आत्म-ज्ञान के माध्यम से पूर्णता का अनुभव करने के लिए शिक्षा और मार्गदर्शन दिया है।

स्टेडियम में उपस्थित दर्शकों के अलावा, टाइमलेस टुडे® की वेबसाइट और ऐप्प पर तथा 19,870 आभासिक दर्शक प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल द्वारा इस समारोह में शामिल हुए।

इस विशेष कार्यक्रम का पुनः प्रसारण अब 15 अगस्त 2024 तक निःशुल्क उपलब्ध है।

(Guru Teri Puja - ansh)

0ad4b4ec-f415-42b9-8b6e-827752e50644.Description:
Amaroo 2018 Series - Episode 6


“Would you allow your heart to be consumed by this delicious experience of life, of joy that is inside of you?” Prem asks in Episode 6 of Amaroo 2018.

More than midway through the international retreat in Australia last year, Prem spoke frankly about the struggle between heart and mind, and the release that comes through knowing ourselves, using the practical techniques he teaches to focus our attention on an experience within.

In a talk that ranges from the poetic to the pragmatic, Prem points the way to a life enjoyed to the max . Don’t miss this powerful episode.

Dive into Episode 6 of this nine-part series from Amaroo 2018.

0d0676d2-0882-45c6-acd9-2b48a601ca27.Name: Your Humanity
0d0676d2-0882-45c6-acd9-2b48a601ca27.Description:
Prem Rawat in Seoul, South Korea | English


The Korean edition of bestseller Hear Yourself was launched on October 10, 2024, at an author event hosted by the publisher, Mrs. Kim of Daedong Field Publishing.

Prem Rawat, the book's author and renowned peace educator, answered questions and spoke passionately about the potential of self-awareness to create positive change. 

Emeritus Professor Kim, while interviewing Prem, discussed many challenges facing South Korea and other nations, such as depression, isolation and stereotypes. Kim also expressed hope that the introduction of Prem’s Peace Education Program to South Korean prisons would provide empirical measures of its psychological impact.

“एक-एक कदम अगर हम सोचकर, समझकर आगे रखेंगे तो इस जीवन में जिम्मेवारियों के होते हुए भी, समस्याओं के होते हुए भी हमको आनंद मिलेगा।” —प्रेम रावत जी

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

0d71c125-5e28-4cad-a5b4-198ad3da68f8.Description:
Prem Rawat in Punta del Este, Uruguay Fourteen years ago Prem Rawat last visited Uruguay. He returned on March 16, 2024 bringing wisdom that consistently illuminates one’s heart. During his talk, Prem described the transformative power of gratitude. He shared how, by shifting our focus away from our problems to the simple joy of being alive, we can experience the simplicity of fulfillment. He also challenged us to reevaluate our priorities and perceptions.

123cc538-e011-41e7-ab90-b73edfac902f.Name: Moments of Possibility
123cc538-e011-41e7-ab90-b73edfac902f.Description:
Prem Rawat in Brighton | English Prem Rawat first spoke in the United Kingdom in 1971 on the Pyramid Stage at Glastonbury. He has returned often to the UK since then. Now, nearly 53 years later, on June 8, 2024, he again shared his uniquely compelling and heartful message in Brighton. Focused once again on the art of enjoying and understanding life, he said that, although we can’t hold onto life, we can hold onto the joy it brings. Whether navigating ever-changing technologies or feeling daunted by world events, we can grow our own wisdom and make the most of our time.

You can now watch or listen to the Brighton replay in English at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription

Subtitles in English are available on the video above. Tap or click the “cc” icon to activate.

128fb1b7-d058-400e-9da4-2ff8d70f223d.Name: Life: An Invitation
128fb1b7-d058-400e-9da4-2ff8d70f223d.Description:
Prem Rawat in Miami-Fort Lauderdale, Florida For sixty years, Prem Rawat has traveled the world with a message that has only grown more relevant. On February 28 in Fort Lauderdale, he walked onto a stage and, within moments, had the rapt attention of his audience. He presented a thought-provoking journey through the perils of ego, the trap of borrowed wisdom, and the extraordinary power of something as simple as a breath. Two original songs, shared with everyone gathered in Fort Lauderdale and beyond, punctuated an evening that was as warm and witty as it was profound. A reflection on a lifetime of work, and a fresh reminder of why it continues — gives hope of what becomes possible when we stop looking for answers everywhere but within. The door to peace, he reminded us, was never locked. It never has been.

Enjoyed the music?

Both songs featured in this event are part of ‘Gifts’ — Prem Rawat's latest album, available now to enjoy for free in the Music section of the app and website.

The replay is now available in English for Classic and Premier subscribers in the app and on the website.

132300be-d89e-497b-89c3-965a5fd6cb0e.Description: हर एक व्यक्ति एक संगम है। इस संगम में एक वो यंत्र है, जो अनुभव कर सकता है और इसी यंत्र में बैठा है वो, जो अविनाशी है। इस यंत्र के द्वारा तुम उस अविनाशी का अनुभव कर सकते हो। इसलिए तुम हो!

"ईंटों की संख्या से बिल्डिंग की मजबूती नहीं आती है। ईटों की मजबूती से बिल्डिंग की मजबूती आती है। इसी प्रकार, हर एक व्यक्ति की मजबूती से शांति स्थापित हो सकती है।" —प्रेम रावत

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

1396fe7c-aaec-4ed1-b449-c23dd56945d5.Description:
57th Anniversary Celebration with Prem Rawat in Brighton, UK


Close to 7,000 livestreamers tuned in from 80 countries to what Prem Rawat had to say during his live event in Brighton, UK, on July 30, 2023, as part of a special Guru Puja celebration.

Throughout the event, attendees were encouraged to focus on the aspects of life that truly bring fulfillment, irrespective of external challenges. Prem Rawat, renowned as an author and peace educator, eloquently addressed complex topics, delivering his message with exceptional clarity and understanding.

Those fortunate enough to hear this message will carry with them a unique wisdom into day-to-day life.


Stay tuned for info on upcoming  livestreams. Join the TimelessToday mailing list.

Give the gift of a TimelessToday subscription to friends and family to enjoy this inspiring message and unlimited access to all premium content including LiveStreams, Instant Replays, Full-length Replays, Topics of Interest, Series and much more.

14c4bc60-da08-47db-8e94-7db6ffadf6cc.Description: True consciousness and love come from the heart, not appearances or trends. Meditation has become trendy, but the mind may wander. To live authentically, embrace nature’s simplicity. True love isn’t found in things or gifts, but in the heart, and it can't be forced. Love that, which will stay with you for life.

1579d261-44a6-4f47-bc04-f16fc85c0be8.Description:
Before the Wright brothers took their first flight, people thought it was impossible. But with persistence, it became a unique moment in time—and the world has never been the same.   Video excerpted from "Making a Difference," Prem Rawat at Kind Malaysia Expo 2018.

16889443-9b25-474f-a3dc-ac65924c9c33.Description:
“Lockdown” Day 10, a personal message from Prem Rawat addressing these trying times.


“How fortunate you are that you’re the caretaker of the most magnificent gift there ever can be—and it’s called ‘life.’ It’s called ‘a human being’—that aspires to be free, to be content, to be in peace. Be in peace. Be in joy. Fulfill those aspirations of the heart. And you, too, will see the value of life.” — Prem Rawat

16aac0b6-576e-480c-8ebe-94ba530e285b.Description:
Prem Rawat in Soweto, South Africa


Enjoy this highly engaging address, packed with a vibrant dance performance and a touching speech by Ernest Leketi, the facilitator of the Peace Education Program in Johannesburg. In his keynote address Prem outlines his four-point formula for peace to an eager audience in Soweto, South Africa.

177325bf-ce1d-42e3-9453-866adb188d5a.Name: The Value of Caring
177325bf-ce1d-42e3-9453-866adb188d5a.Description:
Livestream Replay: Prem Rawat in Johannesburg, South Africa Over 26,000 individuals in South Africa have participated in Prem Rawat’s Peace Education Program (PEP) – a video-based workshop series that aims to unlock one’s inner resources and fundamental strength. On May 16, 2023, Prem Rawat, acclaimed author and peace educator, spoke in Johannesburg about the collective responsibility we have to cultivate compassion and care towards ourselves, each other and the planet itself. The event included expressions from PEP participants, traditional dancers and a choir, with a global livestream to nearly 6,000 online viewers worldwide.

Stay informed. Join the TimelessToday mailing list.

193179ce-1afa-4068-aa09-229265662eee.Description:
An Audience with Prem Rawat is a brand-new series of audio podcasts from the sell-out 2017 World Tour.

Listen to Prem Rawat offer his unique perspective on the pathway to peace and how we can all reconnect with our essential humanity, in the face of seismic global change.

In conversation with a new host at each event, Prem explores different themes of self-discovery, as well as answering burning questions from the audience.

In a way that only Prem Rawat can do, you will see that the answers are never far away.

5-Day Conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia In Amaroo 2025 Session 3, Prem Rawat addressed hard truths about suffering and accountability. Instead of searching for someone to blame, he recommends recognizing our shared vulnerability and taking real responsibility. He urged us to listen to our basic need to feel comfortable with ourselves and experience the joy of knowing the divine.

1ef8c21d-5cbb-404e-81a8-9e629cc0b350.Description:
LiveStream Replay from Munich, Germany


Heavy fog greeted pilot Prem Rawat as he approached the runway in Munich on the next stop of the 2021 European Tour. The sudden view of the runway lights helped guide the plane to the destination.

During this Author Event on November 13, 2021, Prem described how impressive it is that there is a source of clarity, joy, and freedom for every minute of every day, available to anyone who looks in the right direction. He encouraged taking the opportunity now, while we can.


You can listen to Prem’s full address on TimelessToday’s On-Demand Replay with your Classic or Premier subscription.

Enjoy Prem’s daily reminders of how to live life consciously in his Thought for the Day.

Order your copy of Hear Yourself at www.HearYourselfBook.com. Kindle and Audiobook are also available on Amazon.

1gMPZox2H7E.Name: Discover Your Forever: Prem Rawat in Miami
1gMPZox2H7E.Description:
From start to finish, Prem Rawat's public event offered compelling wisdom that nourishes the heart and quiets the mind.

"I'm not trying to be mystical," he explained. "If you feel that your breath is mystical, you missed the point completely." Instead, he invited the audience to recognize the magnificent gift of being alive right now — to discover the infinite within the most obvious, down-to-earth miracle: the breath that sustains you.

A powerful reminder that what we seek isn't distant or complex, but a beautiful simple feeling that is always present.

The replay is available in English for Classic and Premier subscribers in the app and on the website. https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/product/d83718b2-6a4c-4ac7-ae9a-a3e6575cc944

221afa45-92d9-4e21-8bbf-419b52a2fdb5.Name: Prem Rawat in Long Beach 2016
221afa45-92d9-4e21-8bbf-419b52a2fdb5.Description:
Long Beach Convention Center, Long Beach, California


In early March 2016, Prem Rawat spoke at the Long Beach Convention Center to approximately 4,000 people.

Prem addressed a multitude of topics making an insightful distinction between what is considered ‘True’ and ‘The Truth’. He encouraged people to shift from a complaining mindset to determining what it is they really want.

TimelessToday’s popular excerpts entitled “A Bad Day” and “Potential” are pulled from this riveting address.

22457a5f-ed05-4449-b760-9da44d52459d.Name: The Quenched Thirst
22457a5f-ed05-4449-b760-9da44d52459d.Description:
Prem Rawat in Montreal, Canada In Canada's vibrant French-speaking metropolis, Prem Rawat addressed a combined audience of almost 6,000 people — both in-person and live remote viewers — exploring what truly fulfills a human being. "The world is drowning in their ideas of what is the most beautiful thing there is," he shared with attendees. "It's not beautiful because it’s compatible. It’s beautiful because it is beautiful." He emphasized the need to move beyond concepts to a practical experience. Having devoted his life to guiding those seeking self-knowledge, he once again underscored the urgency of this journey.

The full replay is now available in English for Classic and Premier subscribers in the app and on the website. Additional languages will be available soon.

“The Quenched Thirst” • Prem Rawat in Montreal, Canada • 62 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

23fcbb11-b5c0-465b-bb58-aefb72b0dd43.Description: सेंट्रल जेल, येरवडा पुणे में प्रेम रावत जी द्वारा कैदियों को सम्बोधन:   जीवन में यह बात समझिये कि आपकेजीवन मेंजो कुछ भी अच्छा नहीं है, वह भी आपका बनाया हुआ है। और जो कुछ अच्छा है, वह भी आपका बनाया हुआ है। इस बात को जानें और अपने जीवन को सफल करें!

23ff6acc-de6c-4d5f-97e8-1f69ee3da635.Name: Prem Rawat in Delhi, Nov. 13
23ff6acc-de6c-4d5f-97e8-1f69ee3da635.Description:
Replay of Livestream with Prem Rawat from Delhi, India


Since Prem Rawat was a young boy, whenever he has delivered his message of personal peace, combined with his wonderful storytelling, thousands have come to listen. The evenings of November 12 and 13, 2022 in Delhi were no exception with the addition of thousands online who attentively listened and enjoyed his heartfelt words.

Less than a month away from his 65th birthday, the second event ended with a cake-cutting celebration, a smile reflecting on the gigantic ladoo delivered to the stage, and joyful hearts renewed.


You can now watch or listen to the replay of this event at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

Don’t miss upcoming livestreams planned from events in Mirzapur, India on November 19th and November 20th. More details will be available soon.

2520b577-2062-4ea6-a7e6-91d8427ded25.Description:
Prem Rawat in Medellin, Colombia


After 52 years of war and conflict in Colombia, relief came in 2016 as both sides agreed to a peace treaty, initiating a series of reconciliation efforts and a chance to rebuild. With the inclusion of the Peace Education Program, Prem’s message is now reaching hearts across the country—bringing hope for a new era of peace, transformation and understanding.

While in Medellin, Prem discusses the perspective of good and bad, shares the simple answer to finding peace, and talks about the value of what lies within each of us.

27a96fb6-f31a-4e6a-b9a0-4120b965bcbc.Name: Prem Rawat on KayaFM 95.9
27a96fb6-f31a-4e6a-b9a0-4120b965bcbc.Description:
Prem Rawat is interviewed by Bridget Masinga, of Johannesburg’s most popular independent radio station, KAYA FM,


For many years, Prem Rawat has been referred to as a “Peace Ambassador” by millions of people around the world – an impressive title for sure. But what does that title actually mean – especially since the word “peace” means different things to different people. And “ambassador?” That word also brings a lot of different images to mind.In this upbeat, far ranging interview by the very animated Bridget M

asinga, of Johannesburg’s most popular independent radio station, KAYA FM, Prem elaborates. And as he does, the listening audience of 1.8 million, gets an unexpected opportunity to think about the topic in a new way – that, in fact, we are all Peace Ambassadors – or could be – as long as our “lamp it lit” and we have a passion for it.

Introduced by MC Archana Pania Sharma and Host and Moderator Mandira Bedi, Prem Rawat unveiled his bestselling book, “Hear Yourself,” answering inquisitive questions from the moderator and the in-person attendees.

According to Prem Rawat, beginning with one’s self is the key to living in the moment AND loving it; adding that, when the penny drops, you will see yourself in a new light.

You can now listen to Prem’s full address on TimelessToday’s Full-length Replay with your Classic or Premier subscription.

Translations into Hindi, French, German, Italian, Mandarin, Portuguese and Spanish will be available to subscribers as soon as possible.

7:11 मिनट का अंश: "नववर्ष 2021 - एक संभावना" ... और 18:28 मिनट सम्पूर्ण वीडियो: "नववर्ष 2021 - एक संभावना"

प्रेम रावत जी के इस विशेष नववर्ष संदेश का आनंद लें।

एक अविस्मरणीय वर्ष हम सभी को आगे बढ़ने के लिए उत्तेजित करता है। यह अवसर है 2020 को पीछे छोड़ते हुए पूरी ताकत के साथ आगे बढ़ने का। सबसे चुनौतीपूर्ण परिस्थितयों में व्यक्तिगत परिवर्तन को सक्षम करने के लिए प्रेम रावत जी का शक्तिशाली परिप्रेक्ष्य यह संभावना प्रदान करता है।

टाइमलेस टुडे पर इस नववर्ष संदेश का आनंद लेने के लिए सभी आमंत्रित हैं। इस वीडियो को देखने के लिए सदस्यता की आवश्यकता नहीं है। आपकी सुविधानुसार बाद में कभी भी देखने के लिए यह वीडियो यहां प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल पर, या premrawat.com पर, या TimelessToday ऐप या वेबसाइट पर भी उपलब्ध है।

2RQueZUHDmw.Name: Author, Prem Rawat sets Guinness World Record
2RQueZUHDmw.Description:
A historic event in Lucknow, India!
Prem Rawat’s book, “Hear Yourself” in Hindi, "Swayam ki Awaz" set a Guinness World Record on April 2, 2023

Following a typhoon that hit Lucknow, India only days before Prem Rawat’s Author Event on April 2, 2023, over 114,000 people gathered for the launch of the Hindi version of his book, “Hear Yourself.”  An additional virtual audience of 8,923 logged in from 86 countries.

The bestselling author read from his “Hear Yourself” book, Chapter 3: “Ground Yourself in Infinite Peace,” in Hindi, and answered questions from the Indian actress, Bhagayashree, who joined him on stage.

Surprising the audience at the end of the event, an adjudicator from Guinness World Records came on stage and announced that Prem Rawat had smashed the 2018 prior record for the largest audience attending a single author’s reading. Congratulations, Prem Rawat!

Watch the Livestream Replay on TimelessToday app or website
Video: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/230402-lucknow-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

Red FM Media Partners

#PremRawatOfficial #GuinnessWorldRecord #AuthorEvent #Lucknow #HearYourself

 Full audio or video also available in the Events section of the app and website.

30a73030-be02-48b2-bb7a-a4c4554bdda0.Name: Session 6, Focus 5
30a73030-be02-48b2-bb7a-a4c4554bdda0.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat


This morning session was an opportunity for those present to express their appreciation for their experience and Prem Rawat’s role in reminding us to celebrate every day.  Prem joked that the session was “a day to play with the microphones.”

In the midst of a wide range of expressions, he reminded the audience that time is something we don’t have, but we think that we do.  Forgetting that, we put off what we should do today, until tomorrow.

3169fc5e-0c72-46b5-8009-04b64128a7bb.Name: The Lit Candle
3169fc5e-0c72-46b5-8009-04b64128a7bb.Description:
Prem Rawat’s 2021 Canada Local Tour - Vancouver


Author Prem Rawat began his recent 3-city Canada tour in the coastal city of Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 20, 2021, addressing a socially distanced in-person audience and an international audience via Livestream.

Listening to Prem is a journey that simplifies the extraordinary, and reminds us of the preciousness of life. 


The On-Demand Replay of this long-awaited event is now available to all Classic and Premier subscribers.

31824f18-ceb2-45b7-b4d1-4ee13e3c15d7.Name: Beyond Happiness
31824f18-ceb2-45b7-b4d1-4ee13e3c15d7.Description:
People traveled from across the world to Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, to attend a two-day celebration honoring Prem Rawat’s 66th birthday. Over 6,800 livestream viewers also joined each day.

A few days earlier, on December 6, 2023, The BrandLaureate, dedicated to acknowledging trailblazers and visionaries, bestowed prestigious awards on Prem Rawat and The Prem Rawat Foundation (TPRF) for their remarkable peace initiatives, engaging millions through various platforms. This distinguished award adds to Mr. Rawat's previous recognition in the Hall of Fame and a Lifetime Achievement Award from The BrandLaureate in 2012.


You can now watch or listen to the replays of both events in English anytime, anywhere with your Classic or Premier subscription.

31b463b3-32be-49da-bea2-a44b2a1305ad.Name: परिवर्तन की शुरुआत

32eb7284-866c-4580-8591-4c738be00be2.Name: The Possibility - 2024 : A New Year with Prem Rawat
32eb7284-866c-4580-8591-4c738be00be2.Description:
Virtual


As we welcome in the New Year, Prem Rawat shares a personal message from the heart. 

Acknowledging the challenges of the year, including the loss of some individuals, Prem Rawat reminds us of life's cycles. Looking ahead to 2024, he shares lessons learned from 2023: “Do what is necessary, then do what is possible, and before you know it, you’ll be doing the impossible.”

In gratitude to the many individuals worldwide who have contributed to the success and impact of his work in 2023, Prem Rawat is also sharing a New Year’s gift. “Living Knowledge” is a 2-hour, 51-minute selection of 2023 Understanding More™ Focus Sessions complimentary for TimelessToday® Classic and Premier subscribers, and will also be available soon for viewing in local communities everywhere.

3321af4e-9d72-49f0-ac1e-beff23cd98b2.Name: Prem Rawat LIVE from Barcelona, Spain
3321af4e-9d72-49f0-ac1e-beff23cd98b2.Description:
Barcelona. Bologna. Two evenings with Prem Rawat — stream both LIVE on TimelessToday® from wherever you are. Prem Rawat has spent decades finding new ways to bring one message home: the peace and fulfillment people yearn for isn't out there. Never was. It's always been within. And when that lands — really lands — it's the kind of clarity that stays with you. Join him online

TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers can join live from anywhere in the world. Log in early, get settled, and enjoy the pre-show.

If you don’t have a subscription, get one and enjoy a ton of Premium content in the meantime.

Want to join in person? 

To attend the event in Here , or Bologna, visit Words of Peace Global

Livestream on TimelessToday • Sun. April 26, 5:00 P.M  CEST (3:00 P.M. UTC).

Prem began addressing audiences as a young child over 50 years ago. Since then he has reached millions of people at live events all around the world and has engaged millions more via television, radio, online, and though his literary work.

34aa0cb7-6686-4ebc-a501-11c251a55815.Description: हमको जानने की जरूरत है कि हमारे अंदर वह क्या शक्ति है जो हमें जीवित रखती है।  यह मनुष्य शरीर जो हमको मिला है, यह बनाने वाले का कितना विलक्षण आशीर्वाद है।

34c7eaec-93f5-4cb5-99c3-7bc8ccc94040.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #18  (10 अप्रैल, 2020)
34c7eaec-93f5-4cb5-99c3-7bc8ccc94040.Description:
"जो हो रहा है" वही सबकुछ है — वहीं सचमुच का आनंद है “जो हो रहा है।” यह स्वांस आ रहा है, जा रहा है — यह हो रहा है। “क्या हो गया” वहां नहीं, “क्या होगा” वहां भी नहीं, पर “क्या हो रहा है” वहीं सबकुछ है। बात ध्यान की है। ध्यान कहां है ?" —प्रेम रावत (10 अप्रैल, 2020)

34dc4d60-a171-449f-b925-6b48654b20e2.Name: What Is Shaping You?
34dc4d60-a171-449f-b925-6b48654b20e2.Description:
Prem Rawat in Dublin, Ireland Prem Rawat returned to Dublin on July 27, 2025, two years after his last visit, for an inspiring author event. Paul Congdon, owner of Positive Life magazine, introduced Prem and his latest book with characteristic Irish warmth. As he so often does, Prem Rawat shared a powerful metaphor: just as the sun provides all colors that objects reflect back, the divine offers a spectrum of human qualities — joy, peace, kindness and love — that become our true "colors." He explored the tension between the world's external pressures and the divine's gentle guidance toward the authentic self where the nature of peace and understanding reside. Central to his message: Breath is our most precious and overlooked gift, connecting us to all life and serving as a gateway to the ancient wisdom "Know thyself."

“What Is Shaping You?” • Prem Rawat in Dublin, Ireland • 60 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

3I80xCwf8cU.Name: अनुभव: शब्दों से परे ॰ श्री प्रेम रावत जी, हैदराबाद, भारत में (एक झलक)
3I80xCwf8cU.Description:
26 नवंबर 2025 को हैदराबाद, भारत में श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने एक असाधारण संबोधन प्रस्तुत किया। इस वर्ष के अंतिम कार्यक्रम में उन्होंने श्रोताओं को आत्म मनन और गहराई से विचार करने के लिए आमंत्रित किया।

अपने संदेश में उन्होंने कहा कि जिस सत्य की खोज हम बाहर करते हैं, वह हमारे भीतर ही विद्यमान है। उन्होंने विस्तार से समझाया कि हर श्वास हमारे जीवन का सबसे मूल्यवान उपहार है। उनके विचारों ने जीवन को देखने का एक नया तरीका प्रस्तुत किया।

यह संबोधन आपको गहरे विचार और आत्मचिंतन के लिए आमंत्रित करता है। TimelessToday पर इस पुनः प्रसारण के माध्यम से प्रेम रावत जी के शब्दों और संगीत के इस अद्वितीय अनुभव के साक्षी बन सकते हैं।

3X4FzZW3v_A.Name: Hear Yourself (Intro)
3X4FzZW3v_A.Description:
For anyone pursuing answers to their own life, Prem Rawat’s latest book, “Hear Yourself: How to Find Peace in a Noisy World,” takes you on a journey to quiet the noise inside and outside of us.  Based on ancient wisdom, and his more than 55 years committed to educating and inspiring people around the world, Prem Rawat reconnects individuals to their heart.

“I invite you to walk with me for a while, and you will be surprised by the paths we take.  We will deviate from theories and beliefs and move towards a unique form of knowledge that lies
within us, free from the distractions of everyday life, a place where you will find clarity, fulfillment, and joy.  A place of inner peace.” —Prem Rawat

Born in 1957 in the Himalayan foothills, Prem Rawat learned from his father, a respected
teacher.  He began carrying his message of peace around the world as a teenager and has
reached hundreds of millions of people in more than 100 countries.

He created the Prem Rawat Foundation (TPRF.org) to help address basic human needs and to provide insights into individual peace, no matter what your life’s circumstances are.  He lives in Los Angeles with his family and travels around the world every year, meeting and inspiring people interested in his practical approach to life.

Find out more about Prem Rawat, his life, work and message... 
https://www.premrawat.com/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

https://breathbook.life/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

3a6e64b5-d4d7-44db-bbd6-21539d51f01f.Name: Prem Rawat on SABC News
3a6e64b5-d4d7-44db-bbd6-21539d51f01f.Description: There are 53 million people living in South Africa, the only country in the world that borders both the Atlantic and Indian Oceans.  On December 8th, 11 million of these people had a rare opportunity to listen to a live interview with Prem Rawat on South Africa’s oldest radio station, SAfm. The interviewer, long time-radio host, Rowena Baird, began the show with a bold declaration.  “International Peace Ambassador, Mr. Prem Rawat”, she explained, “was going to share some tips on how to eliminate violence through reconciliation, hope, and forgiveness.”  Bold, indeed, and timely, too. Returning to a country that had blacklisted him for refusing to abide by Apartheid principles at his Johannesburg public event in 1972,  Prem was now being given a country-wide platform to share his message of peace.  Which is precisely what he did for 13 power-packed minutes.  Responding to Ms. Baird’s questions with his own unique brand of straight talk, storytelling, and humor, Prem laid it all on the line – especially in response to the last question – about his specific message for South Africans. “You have the power,” he exclaimed.  “All you need is that determination. Don’t look at other people. Look at yourself.  From the strength of you – you can change a nation.” Written by Mitch Ditkoff

3bbae608-ff53-4f75-a6b8-d32402017113.Name: Session 9, 50th Anniversary
3bbae608-ff53-4f75-a6b8-d32402017113.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


Prem Rawat in Ivory's Rock Conference and Events Center, Ipswich, 2016. 
A 5-day conference celebrating the 50th anniversary of his relentless efforts to spread the message of peace.

For the past 50 years, Prem Rawat has been focused on one simple goal – to communicate his message of peace to as many people as possible.  His efforts have been relentless and the results have been extraordinary – but never as extraordinary as this past year. Indeed, in 2016, Prem reached more people than ever before.

In September 2016, 4,500 of these people attended a five-day event with Prem at the Ivory’s Rock Conference and Event Center (aka Amaroo) in Australia. By all accounts, the event was a most remarkable one.

Today, in honor of the holiday season and the many requests we’ve received, we are happy to announce the launch of an online 50th Anniversary Gift Set.  This comprehensive collection includes nine of Prem’s addresses from the 5-day celebration with material not seen before on TimelessToday.  It also features many of the extraordinary stories he told in Amaroo from the Mahabharata – a classic Indian epic infused with enduring principles still relevant today.

3bd7b15a-2e5f-4ee7-a283-14f71c09e999.Name: Session 3, Focus 5
3bd7b15a-2e5f-4ee7-a283-14f71c09e999.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat


September 6, the Focus 5 event continued with a reminder that the objective of life is to thrive, not survive. He encouraged everyone to learn to let that which is beneficial sink in and let the rest go, and be attracted to that beautiful, that attractive state within each of us. Focus where there is no fear, doubt or envy.

Prem referenced the words of Krishna saying “Whatever you think about most in your life, you will remember that at your last minute.” Asking the question, “Do we remember gratitude or are we only trying to find solutions to problems?”

 Recognizing that during these past few years, many have seen the loss of loved ones, Prem encouraged everyone to put the sadness aside and celebrate them, allow them to live on in memory - celebrate them in your heart. He added the practical perspective that you can‘t celebrate them with sadness.

3bffbd30-6b07-47b8-877b-41e6cd0b02ff.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #37  (29 अप्रैल, 2020)

3f4d83da-61b2-4e9b-8144-384120da455e.Name: Session 8, 50th Anniversary
3f4d83da-61b2-4e9b-8144-384120da455e.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series Prem Rawat’s Amaroo Series on TimelessToday captures his week-long events held at Ivory’s Rock Conference Center in Queensland, Australia in 2016, 2017, 2018 and 2022. The video-on-demand content from the four morning sessions of the 2016 Amaroo event have never been made available until now! The fourth and last morning session held on Friday, September 23, 2016, is now freely available in English for two weeks – without a TimelessToday subscription – until May 2, 2023 at 8:00 p.m. PDT. Then this session and other content from the Amaroo 2016 series will be available exclusively to TimelessToday subscribers, including translations in French, Italian and Spanish as well as subtitles in other languages. During this last morning session in the 2016 series, Prem Rawat spoke, heart to heart, about his strategy in life: practice using the sword of self-Knowledge with “ease and familiarity,” and slay the fire-breathing, powerful dragon of confusion. With 50 years of experience, he spoke about moving in a direction where we evolve as human beings, reaching for our potential. He emphasized that we must never accept failure; that we can fail many times and never see ourselves as failures. We encourage you to share this free offer with friends and family who might be interested. Just click on Watch Amaroo 2016 Fourth Morning Session or go to the Series section on the TimelessToday mobile app or website to find Amaroo 2016. This is also where Classic and Premier subscribers can find the five afternoon sessions to view at their convenience. Stay tuned for the release of the fourth and last morning session. Be sure to turn on notifications in the Settings of your TimelessToday app.

4-HikTH2xY8.Name: Bhajan - Anmole Tera Jeevan Yunhi Gava Raha - अनमोल तेरा जीवन यूंही गवां रहा है
4-HikTH2xY8.Description:
Bhajan - Moko Kahan Dhunde Bande - मोको कहाँ ढूंढें बन्दे मैं तो तेरे पास में

अनमोल तेरा जीवन यूँही गँवा रहा है
किस और तेरी मंजिल,किस और जा रहा है
अनमोल तेरा जीवन यूँही गँवा रहा है

सपनो की नीद में ही,यह रात ढल न जाये,
पल भर का क्या भरोसा,कही जान निकल न जाये,
गिनती की है ये साँसे यूँही लुटा रहा है,
किस और तेरी मंजिलकिस और जा रहा है,

जायेगा जब यहाँ से कोई न साथ देगा,
इस हाथ जो दिया है उस हाथ जा के लेगा,
कर्मो की है ये खेती फल आज पा रहा है,
किस और तेरी मंजिल,किस और जा रहा है,

ममता के बन्धनों ने क्यों आज तुझको घेरा
सुख में सभी है साथी कोई नहीं है तेरा
तेरा ही मोह तुझको कब से रुला रहा है
किस और तेरी मंजिल किस और जा रहा है

जब तक है भेद मन में भगवान से जुदा है
खोलो जो दिल का दर्पण इस घर में ही खुदा है
सुख रूप हो के भी दुःख आज पा रहा है
किस और तेरी मंजिल किस और जा रहा है

4316c27a-b7f8-4dd7-b8a3-801143b7046b.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #8 (31 मार्च, 2020)

4339fdf4-183a-4fef-baaa-606e0a45571b.Name: क्या है असली जरूरत
4339fdf4-183a-4fef-baaa-606e0a45571b.Description: सारी जरूरतें मेरी कभी पूरी नहीं होंगी, पर मैं अपने जीवन में कम से कम जो यहां आया हूं, अपनी असली जरूरत को तो पूरा करके जाऊं।

434b2718-81a6-4dbb-87f6-60dcc2aee913.Name: 2026 श्री प्रेम रावत जी का  नववर्ष संदेश
434b2718-81a6-4dbb-87f6-60dcc2aee913.Description:
श्री प्रेम रावत जी का नववर्ष संदेश

नए साल के आगमन पर, अपना ध्यान भीतर की ओर मोड़ें—
उस शांति की ओर, जो पहले से ही आपके भीतर जीवित है।

पिछले साल जो भी हुआ हो, यह क्षण नया है। यह साल नया है।
और इस क्षण में, आप श्वास ले रहे हैं, आप जीवित हैं।
यही आपकी शुरुआत बने।

आशा है यह साल आपको यहाँ होने के सरल चमत्कार से परिचित कराए।
आशा है आप कृतज्ञता को एक विचार की तरह नहीं, बल्कि एक जीवंत अनुभव की तरह महसूस करें— 
अपनी श्वास में, अपने हृदय में, इस शांत जागरूकता में।

आपको शांति का पीछा नहीं करना है। 
आपको ख़ुशी कमाने की जरूरत नहीं है। 
जिसे आप ढूंढ रहे हैं, वह आपकी सोच से कहीं अधिक निकट है।

आशा है यह साल समझदारी से भरा हो—
गहराई से सुनने का, सरलता से प्रेम करने का, 
और इस जीवन का सम्मान करने का, जो आपको दिया गया है।

नए साल की शुभकामनाएँ। 
आशा है आप उस शांति का अनुभव करें, जो पहले से ही आप में मौजूद है।

प्रेम रावत

439c1091-08da-4584-ac72-79daa4d5c411.Name: Prem Rawat in London, UK
439c1091-08da-4584-ac72-79daa4d5c411.Description: “Every moment, every second, every minute, every hour that you are alive, you should be taking it seriously.” – Prem Rawat, May 28, 2022

4451eb7b-90f5-4115-a60b-d564da2d1b97.Description:
"मन का तो काम ही है परेशान होना और परेशान करना। परन्तु, आपके अंदर एक चीज है जो इन सारी परिस्थितियों से सम्बन्ध नहीं बनाना चाहती है, वह परेशान नहीं होना चाहती है — वह है आपका हृदय। वह है असली आप।" —प्रेम रावत (8 अप्रैल, 2020)

446f52fa-1d0a-4ad0-8bca-64b5f9c5f1af.Name: The Three Worlds
446f52fa-1d0a-4ad0-8bca-64b5f9c5f1af.Description: Don’t be fooled by the world that surrounds you. See this opportunity to feel your heart fill with gratitude. Enjoy this 4-minute excerpt by Prem Rawat.

44c170fe-a202-4784-ac42-124cc6ba67c7.Name: विद्वान् कौन है?
44c170fe-a202-4784-ac42-124cc6ba67c7.Description: जीवन, स्वयं के साथ संबंध बनाए रखने और मन की शक्ति को समझने के बारे में है। दुखद बातों से बचना हमारा लक्ष्य नहीं होना चाहिए। सुख-दुख का सामना करने के लिए ह्रदय से सम्बन्ध निभाना ज़रूरी है। यह समझ, कि सुख और दु:ख अस्थायी हैं, हमें शांति से जीने में मदद करती है।

454b2c57-9340-4302-a4a6-00cfada6429f.Name: What is Real Success?
454b2c57-9340-4302-a4a6-00cfada6429f.Description: Prem suggests that a fundamental measure of success for a human being is whether or not he or she is happy.  Video excerpted from "The Fundamentals of Peace," Prem Rawat in conversation with Cecilia Valenzuela. Full interview available in the Public Library section of the app and website.

454bab11-e1e0-48fd-8c93-fc255d57950d.Name: A Dream that Defines You
454bab11-e1e0-48fd-8c93-fc255d57950d.Description: In this segment, Prem takes a deep look at what it means to be a dreamer. From the day you are born, until the time you have to go, you are living your dream. So what defines your dream? The answer goes back to the heart of Prem’s message. Look within to understand what defines you. This is your dream, this is your existence—live it to the fullest!

457GvzOG0TY.Name: 2025 - A New Year’s Message from Prem Rawat
457GvzOG0TY.Description:
“In the heart you need gratitude. To be thankful! Some people will say, “Well, you need love!” But in gratitude there is a tremendous amount of love.”  Prem Rawat

In 2024, across six continents, people embraced Prem Rawat’s inspiring wisdom, discovering a deep understanding of the opportunity that life offers to every individual.

To ring in 2025, Prem has recorded a special New Year’s message to enjoy and share with anyone interested. 

Translation is available in French, Greek, Hindi, Italian, Chinese, German, Brazilian Portuguese, Spanish and Tamil with more languages added as soon as possible.

May 2025 be a year of fulfillment, gratitude and with deep joy for being alive. Happy New Year!

4775a866-655a-4f72-8987-a0c83c5dba9d.Name: The Story of You
4775a866-655a-4f72-8987-a0c83c5dba9d.Description:
A public event was held in Delhi, India on Dec. 3, 2023 with Prem Rawat, peace educator, New York Times and Irish Times bestselling author and  Guinness World Records holder.

Each of Prem Rawat’s public speeches has as its core the message that life is precious and don’t waste the opportunity. Speaking to more than 50,000 attendees in Delhi and nearly 7,000 virtual viewers, he emphasized the importance of focusing on those experiences in life which bring you closer to knowing  yourself. Prem reminded everyone listening that you have choices that can bring you closer or further away from your true self. He also explained that it was his job, as he tours the world, to remind us that what may feel complicated is quite simple.

From the stage, the author was given an award by HarperCollins India, the publisher of his Indian version of the bestseller, “Hear Yourself,” for its amazing success and impact on so many lives. The publisher encouraged readers of the book to share its life-changing content.


The replay of this Delhi event, the final stop on this India tour, is now available on the TimelessToday® app and website with your Classic or Premiere subscription.

Want updates about upcoming livestreams? Join the TimelessToday® mailing list.

Listen to Prem Rawat offer his unique perspective on the pathway to peace and how we can all reconnect with our essential humanity, in the face of seismic global change.

491b0c0a-f026-42e2-8524-00fa509e5c13.Name: Session 2: 124th Hans Jayanti Celebration
491b0c0a-f026-42e2-8524-00fa509e5c13.Description:
Replay of livestream with Prem Rawat in Delhi, India. In his address at the 124th Hans Jayanti Celebration in Delhi, Prem Rawat focused on the pursuit of true fulfillment and inner peace. He explained that honor and recognition are temporary and will eventually fade, urging the audience to focus on what truly matters—inner peace. Prem emphasized that peace and fulfillment are not found through external means but from within. He likened fulfillment to quenching thirst or hunger—both can only be satisfied by experiencing them directly. Throughout his speech, Rawat encouraged the attendees to recognize that the power that drives the universe is always within them, no matter what challenges they may face. He reassured them that despite external struggles, as long as they connect with their inner sanctuary, everything will be well. His message was a reminder that the pursuit of happiness and fulfillment lies not in external circumstances but in discovering and experiencing the peace within oneself.

With your TimelessToday subscription — Premier (video) or Classic (audio) — you have full access to all of Prem Rawat’s premium content, including livestreams, replays, popular series and multilingual content.

4981ad6f-082d-4604-88ed-a062c9b09d3d.Name: Session 6, 50th Anniversary
4981ad6f-082d-4604-88ed-a062c9b09d3d.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


The unique and beloved “Amaroo” Series covers Prem Rawat’s addresses from 2016, 2017, 2018 and 2022, held at the Ivory’s Rock Conference Center in Queensland, Australia. 

As promised, TimelessToday now brings you the third morning session from 2016 for the first time. It is publicly available in English for two weeks – without a TimelessToday subscription – until Monday, April 18, 2023 at 8:00 p.m. PDT. Then the content will be exclusive to TimelessToday subscribers, including translations in French, Italian and Spanish as well as subtitles in other languages.

During this third morning session, Prem Rawat honored those people who helped him build inroads when he first came to the West in 1971, so that others could learn about what he offers and take full advantage. 

Starting in the United Kingdom, this effort then spread to America, Canada, Australia and Japan. He expressed wanting people who helped lay the foundation to feel a part of what he’s doing and what has been accomplished, so far. 

He spoke about the profound responsibility he has to ensure that his approach to self-Knowledge remains free of concepts and is available for generations to come. 

The fourth and last morning session will be made publicly available in two weeks and then rotated to being available only to Classic and Premier subscribers after the public showing. 

We encourage you to share this free offer with friends and family who might be interested.
Just click on Watch Amaroo 2016 Third Morning Session or go to the Series section on the TimelessToday mobile app or website to find Amaroo 2016. This is also where Classic and Premier subscribers can find the five afternoon sessions, to view at their convenience. 

Stay tuned for the release of the fourth and last morning session. Be sure to turn on notifications in the Settings of your TimelessToday app.

4TVaZCbEpWs.Name: Prem Rawat Life Story | 4 वर्ष की उम्र में जिन्होंने रोक दी भीड़, 12 की उम्र में England को लिया लुभा
4TVaZCbEpWs.Description:
#premrawat #premrawatlife #premrawatinterview #hearyourselfbook #swayamkiawaaz #sahityatakbaateinmulakaatein #premrawatbook #authorinterviews #peace #experience #sahityatakbookcafe #sahityatak #sahityaaajtak   #BaateinMulakateinEp46

जिसने सोने की तरह की चमकीली रौशनी दी, जिसने चांद-सितारे, यह धरती, हवा और जल दिया, वह अनंत समुद्र की तरह है और हमारा जीवन एक बूंद की तरह अंततः उसमें समाहित हो जाएगा....एक 4 वर्ष के बच्चे ने दशकों पहले उत्तराखंड की पहाड़ियों पर सूरज की उतरती किरणों को देखकर न केवल यह समझ लिया था, बल्कि उन्हीं दिनों अपने पिता का प्रवचन सुनने आई भीड़ को भी अपने प्रवचन से रोक दिया था. उस बालक को तब प्रवचन का अर्थ भी पता नहीं था. यह कोई अचरज की बात नहीं कि बारह साल की उम्र में उस बालक ने ब्रिटेन की धरती को अपने व्याख्यान से चौंका दिया. हम बात कर रहे हैं प्रेरक वक्ता प्रेम रावत की. वे आज दुनिया भर में अपने निजी विमान से यात्रा करते हैं. उनका फाउंडेशन जरूरतमंदों की मदद करता है. वे कहते हैं, हर इंसान दुनिया में शांति तलाश करता है. सुकून की तलाश में दर-दर भटकते हुए वह क्या कुछ नहीं करता. मसलन पाठ-पूजा करना, दान करना, सेवा करना, और भी बहुत कुछ. मगर बहुत से लोगों को फिर भी मनचाही शांति हासिल नहीं हो पाती. अगर आप इसका कारण ढूंढेंगे तो वह कहीं बाहर नहीं, आपको स्वयं में ही मिलेगा.
जाने-माने पथ प्रदर्शक, अध्यापक प्रेम रावत का जन्म 1957 में हुआ. उनके पास जीवन की अपनी असाधारण यात्रा का विशिष्ट अनुभव है. एक विलक्षण प्रतिभा-सम्पन्न बालक से, 70 के दशक की एक मशहूर किशोर हस्ती और फिर इक्कीसवीं सदी के अन्तर्राष्ट्रीय शांतिदूत तक की अपनी यात्रा में प्रेम रावत ने करोड़ों लोगों को असाधारण स्पष्टता, प्रेरणा और जीवन की गहरी सीख दी है. यह कहना मुश्किल है कि वे कहां निवास करते हैं? अमेरिका में, योरोप में, एशिया में या अपने प्रशंसकों के बीच. दुनिया भर की यात्राओं के बीच 'दि प्रेम रावत फाउन्डेशन के संस्थापक' की भूमिका में उन्होंने लाखों लोगों के जीवन को प्रभावित किया है. रावत की अंग्रेज़ी पुस्तक 'Hear Yourself- How To Find Peace In A Noisy World' के हाल ही में प्रकाशित हिंदी संस्करण 'स्वयं की आवाज़- शोर भरी इस दुनिया में शांति कैसे पाएं' का लखनऊ में लोकार्पण हुआ, तो उसने गिनीज बुक ऑफ वर्ल्ड रिकॉर्ड में जगह बनाई. हार्पर हिन्दी से प्रकाशित 'स्वयं की आवाज़- शोर भरी इस दुनिया में शांति कैसे पाएं' में कुल 233 पृष्ठ हैं और इसका मूल्य 299 रुपए है. 
विशेष बात यह कि रावत इस लोकार्पण से पहले साहित्य तक स्टूडियो में थे, जहां उन्होंने 'शब्द-रथी' कार्यक्रम में इस पुस्तक की चर्चा की और 'बातें-मुलाकातें' में अपने जीवन के बारे में बताया. इस पुस्तक के बारे में ग्रैमी पुरस्कार विजेता, गायक और गीतकार माइकेल बोल्टन कहते हैं कि 'जीवन के बारे में प्रेम रावत की गहरी समझ, मुझे उन सभी प्रश्नों के उत्तर प्रदान करती है, जिन्हें मैं दशकों से तलाश रहा था. यह किताब पाठकों को शांति पाने के लिए प्रेरित करती है- उसे इस अशांत दुनिया में तलाश करने की बजाय, अपने अंदर पाने का एक व्यावहारिक तरीका और विवेक प्रदान करके, उन्हें तृप्ति देती है.' 
वाकई अपने संदेशों से लाखों लोगों की जिंदगी को परिवर्तित कर देने वाले रावत की इस यात्रा को जानना कल दिलचस्प नहीं है. तो सुनिए साहित्य तक के खास कार्यक्रम 'बातें मुलाकातें' में चर्चित पथ प्रदर्शक प्रेम रावत से वरिष्ठ पत्रकार जय प्रकाश पाण्डेय की यह खास बातचीत, सिर्फ़ साहित्य तक पर.

Sahitya Tak - Welcome to the rich world of Hindi Literature. 4b170694-3606-4b64-ad72-24dc723a162b.Name: Session 7, Amaroo 2024
4b170694-3606-4b64-ad72-24dc723a162b.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


On the afternoon of September 12th, Prem emphasized the significance of the “now.” He explained that the present moment and existence are intertwined, and when experienced fully, they unlock a life of freedom. 

He highlighted that the “now” is where your true self resides, independent of others’ experiences—it’s your own “sphere of now.” The practice of Knowledge, free from external ideas and concepts, allows you to connect with this moment. 

Reflecting on how quickly time had passed, Prem acknowledged there was just one more day left on the Amaroo 2024 calendar.

4d676f83-dbd3-4fb0-a188-7324e0d4bb09.Name: Three Simple Laws
4d676f83-dbd3-4fb0-a188-7324e0d4bb09.Description:
Prem Rawat in Rome | English According to Prem Rawat, life is anything but mundane. Speaking in Rome, Italy, on June 22, 2024, he emphasized the importance of experiencing the true value of life and being able to access peace anytime, anywhere, much like enjoying your favorite tunes. Not knowing the self has significant consequences, he expressed. He stressed the need for a committed effort to understand and fulfill one’s need for peace and calmness, regardless of circumstances. The bestselling author and peace educator then participated in a Q&A with journalist Gianluca Fabi, delving into other matters of the heart.

You can now watch or listen to the Rome, Italy replay in English at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

4df7d323-681e-4942-90cb-3ba78f252ecc.Name: Amaroo 2018 Episode 9
4df7d323-681e-4942-90cb-3ba78f252ecc.Description:
Amaroo 2018 Series - Episode 9


“Treat truth as the truth—and the dream as a dream,” notes Prem in Episode 8 of Amaroo, “and your life will be untangled.”

On the last day of the international retreat in Australia last year, Prem shined a light on the difference between reality and fantasy, and what it takes to lead a life of joy, clarity and purpose.

Immerse yourself in Episode 8 for a one-of-a-kind reality check.

4e3f37f9-af1c-4bd8-869a-3248a972a715.Name: Prem Rawat in Gaya
4e3f37f9-af1c-4bd8-869a-3248a972a715.Description:
New Guinness World Records Award - 2023


On November 26, 2023, in Gaya, India, Prem Rawat addressed a gathering of 375,603 attendees, reaffirming his longstanding dedication to fostering individual well-being. Whether addressing a single individual or breaking world records, his commitment remains unwavering. 

This record-setting event, recognized by Guinness World Records for the “largest attendance at a lecture,” underscored Prem Rawat’s unique approach to personal empowerment, even in the most difficult times. He focused on the personal fulfillment theme of 'knowing the self.’

This broadcast was an incredibly inspiring 50th Anniversary celebration of Prem Rawat’s arrival in Los Angeles in 1971 and his global efforts through the years.

While 50 years have passed, Prem’s message is always timeless and constant. He inspires us to feel the experience within, where the noise of the world no longer distracts us and quiet peace embraces us.

An Audience with Prem Rawat is a brand-new series of audio podcasts from the 2017 World Tour.

4f7ad703-9a30-4f2e-baaf-9a183e55e985.Name: 2026 A New Year’s Message from Prem Rawat
4f7ad703-9a30-4f2e-baaf-9a183e55e985.Description:
A New Year’s Message from Prem Rawat

As this New Year arrives, turn your attention inward - 
to the peace that is already alive within you.

No matter what the past year held, this moment is new. This year is new.
And in this moment, you are breathing; you are alive.
Let that be the beginning.

May this year help you recognize the simple miracle of being here.
May you feel gratitude not as an idea, but as a living experience -
in your breath, in your heart, in the quiet awareness of now.

You do not have to chase peace.
You do not have to earn joy.
What you are looking for is closer than you think.

May this year be a year of understanding -
of listening more deeply, loving more simply,
and honoring the life that has been given to you.

Happy New Year.
May you experience the peace you already carry.

Prem Rawat

51WB_qGnwls.Name: A Special Celebration with Prem Rawat
51WB_qGnwls.Description:

To celebrate this special occasion and the 𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭 on life’s journey, Prem Rawat has recorded a message that will be available starting on 𝐒𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐲, 𝐉𝐮𝐥𝐲 𝟑𝟏 𝐚𝐭 𝟖:𝟎𝟎 𝐚.𝐦. 𝐈𝐒𝐓 (𝟐:𝟑𝟎 𝐚.𝐦. 𝐔𝐓𝐂).

52ad0cc0-2dfd-4d83-bfb5-264c4caccdde.Name: Session 3: 124th Hans Jayanti Celebration
52ad0cc0-2dfd-4d83-bfb5-264c4caccdde.Description:
Replay of livestream with Prem Rawat in Delhi, India. In the third session of the 124th Hans Jayanti Anniversary event in Delhi, Prem Rawat captivated a large audience with stories, insights, and pressing questions about life’s objectives and the need for peace. Prem Rawat addressed the prevalence of greed in the world and shared his own commitment to spreading the message of peace to as many people as possible. In a world often overshadowed by material desires, he reminded everyone that true peace is essential for human completeness. This theme of peace will accompany him to Africa next, where he plans to speak in one of South Africa's most dangerous areas, where 1,000 people have recently received Knowledge. He discussed the impact of societal concepts that drive people’s actions without much reflection. Encouraging introspection, he stressed the importance of self-understanding and self-value as foundations for respecting others. Prem Rawat emphasized the urgent need to shift cultural norms, especially regarding respect for women. He envisioned a transformed society that values and honors women — a culture that could serve as a model for the world. In closing, he left the audience with a thought-provoking question: "You are in charge of your life. What will you do with this time?" Through humor, warmth, and sincerity, Prem Rawat invited listeners to ponder the purpose and direction of their lives.

With your TimelessToday subscription — Premier (video) or Classic (audio) — you have full access to all of Prem Rawat’s premium content, including livestreams, replays, popular series and multilingual content.

52f2d9bd-59ac-4f24-b5c5-05d560e47388.Name: उपहार (Uphaar)
