5382fb6d-d3e7-4b4d-976b-5f73bdd58d71.Name: Know Your Self-Worth
5382fb6d-d3e7-4b4d-976b-5f73bdd58d71.Description:
Prem Rawat’s 2021 Canada Local Tour - Montreal


Prem Rawat’s message crossed many barriers on Sunday, September 26th, as he connected with people remotely via LiveStream and with those at the downtown venue in Montreal, Quebec.

The subjects flowed deep and practical—knowing yourself, feeling an innocence towards life, and how to discover real self-worth that overshadows insecurities.

Prem’s insights often lead to making better decisions in life and understanding the preciousness of today.


TimelessToday brings you the On-Demand Replay of this last stop on the Canada Tour with your Classic or Premier subscription.

53b263f9-5000-4070-9619-81d77b027440.Name: Elusive Now
53b263f9-5000-4070-9619-81d77b027440.Description: “If you don’t understand the meaning of “now,” what is the point in trying to understand the meaning of tomorrow?” – Prem Rawat

5411214f-04a2-4106-a8fb-422befa2c4b1.Name: Session 1, Focus 5
5411214f-04a2-4106-a8fb-422befa2c4b1.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat | English


“Focus 5” kicked off with Prem Rawat encouraging everyone to focus on what is real, what our heart needs. He reflected on the nature of doubt and how it leads to anxiety and fear. He expressed how we must learn to keep our hearts clear or doubt will come in.

Prem acknowledged that life is not always easy, but it is essential to remember to let ourselves be filled with gratitude for this life. As long as we are alive, everything is good and we can dig into our own strength.

 Our mission: To be in touch with yourself rather than focusing on the frequent distraction of technology and those things that take us away from what is real. He shared that being conscious is the only security system against the “thief of time” taking away what cannot be replaced.

543b0cd8-5762-4b6c-9de5-f129bd2c4e3f.Name: The Human Equation
543b0cd8-5762-4b6c-9de5-f129bd2c4e3f.Description:
“Hear Yourself” Author Event with Prem Rawat in Buenos Aires “What is the difference between the sun and a flashlight?” Prem asked Delfina when she asked him to speak on the topic of finding real love in today’s complicated world. The conversation took place between Prem Rawat, author of “Hear Yourself,” and Delfina Galarza, journalist from La Nacion Buenos Aires. It began with being at ease as an individual who’s paying attention to their life, and evolved into profound views into the singular divine within each individual. When Delfina asked Prem what would be the one key point he hopes readers get from his book, he replied: “Include your heart in your life.” This special event commenced with Prem Rawat receiving the Golden Diploma, a lifetime award as an Honored Guest of the City of Buenos Aires for his services to Peace.

Still wondering about the difference between the Sun and the flashlight? Then enjoy this full-length replay in the TimelessToday app or website.

Fifty eight minutes, it is now available in English with a Classic or Premier subscription. Translation in other languages will soon be available.

The replay of this inspiring event is available free of charge in Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese.

Although no TimelessToday account is needed, a free basic account enables you to receive important news and updates from TimelessToday.

Subtitles in English are available on the video above. Tap or click the “cc” icon to activate.

545265c6-fbf2-47bb-99ad-418a71940d1d.Name: Fernando Trezza interviews Prem Rawat (Part 2)
545265c6-fbf2-47bb-99ad-418a71940d1d.Description:
Part 2: Brazilian Association of Community Channels, Sao Paulo, Brazil


In Sao Paulo, Brazil, the Words of Peace television series had been airing for over ten years reaching over 10 million homes in the city of Sao Paulo and over 40 million homes in all of Brazil. To celebrate this milestone in 2013, Fernando Mauro Trezza, President of the Brazilian Association of Community Channels, sat down with Prem Rawat to ask him about his work, his message and why peace matters.

Fernando Mauro Trezza: "For many people today, peace seems to be a boring subject. Can this perspective be changed?" 

Prem Rawat: "Of course, because they're coming from a concept of what peace is. They're not coming from the need. They have to feel the need."

55cce096-e496-4974-be9d-c5f02eb9e335.Name: Contentment
55cce096-e496-4974-be9d-c5f02eb9e335.Description: Prem Rawat came to South Africa to speak about peace in 1972. He was 14 years old. Nelson Mandela was in prison, serving a life sentence (before his 1990 publish) for his attempts to overturn its brutal Apartheid regime. When government officials discovered that the young Prem was addressing racially mixed audiences, they told him he could only speak to segregated racial groups. Prem refused, and the government blacklisted him. He was probably the youngest person ever to be blacklisted by the Apartheid regime for refusing to hold segregated events. Standing up to the regime was an extraordinary example of Prem’s courage.

55eaeec9-4ca0-44c7-9bac-7e0a03abd54d.Name: Beyond the World of Thoughts
55eaeec9-4ca0-44c7-9bac-7e0a03abd54d.Description:
Subject based excerpt from Prem Rawat ji's address during the 57th anniversary celebration


The energy present in every particle transcends our body and existence—it was there before us, it is here now, and it will remain after us. We can never be separate from this energy, but our desires and thoughts are distinct from it. It cannot be grasped through ideas or imagination but can only be experienced in the heart. This is the true understanding that needs to be known and realized.

56212c3d-b204-483f-8534-0e6cc6593ff1.Name: Prem Rawat in Delhi, Nov. 12
56212c3d-b204-483f-8534-0e6cc6593ff1.Description:
Replay of Livestream with Prem Rawat from Delhi, India


Since Prem Rawat was a young boy, whenever he has delivered his message of personal peace, combined with his wonderful storytelling, thousands have come to listen. The evening of November 12, 2022 in Delhi was no exception with the addition of thousands online who attentively listened and enjoyed his heartfelt words.

This event, less than a month before Prem’s 65th birthday celebration, offered an opportunity for everyone to reflect on the gratitude that so many feel for his efforts to touch anyone interested with wisdom and knowledge of life’s purpose.


You can now watch or listen to the replay of this event at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

5af0e2fb-977c-40ff-9b73-431d378b150f.Name: Prem Rawat on Jacaranda Radio FM
5af0e2fb-977c-40ff-9b73-431d378b150f.Description:
The Complimentary Breakfast with Rian van Heerden Johannesburg, South Africa May 17, 2016


Although the systemized racial oppression of Apartheid was abolished in 1991, its legacy still haunts South Africa.

Rian van Heerden, host at Jacaranda radio in Johannesburg, South Africa, opens The Complimentary Breakfast Show with a provocative question, “Will South Africa ever truly experience peace?”

“Peace is not a luxury. And peace is not a word. In fact, peace is a feeling. And like we need to sleep, like we need to eat, like we need to drink water, like we need to breathe air, we actually need peace in our lives.”

Prem continues, “Without peace our functioning breaks down; our basic thinking breaks down. Our perceptions break down. And we no longer can function as a human being, properly.”

Jacaranda 94.2 FM is the largest independent radio station in South Africa and boasts a listening audience of 2 million people a week, and a digital community of more than 1.1 million people a month.

It’s the morning commute and Rian invites his audience to call in to speak with Prem.

Written by Francisca Matos

5j7uPGHhKds.Name: 125वां हंस जयंती समारोह | पहला सत्र | एक अंश
5j7uPGHhKds.Description:
दिल्ली में आयोजित 125वीं हंस जयंती समारोह में श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने लगभग 50,000 उपस्थित श्रोताओं को संबोधित करते हुए जीवन के सार और आत्मज्ञान के महत्व पर गहन प्रकाश डाला।

उन्होंने एक सरल लेकिन प्रभावशाली उदाहरण देते हुए समझाया कि जैसे खाना बनाने की किताब पढ़ने से भूख नहीं मिटती, वैसे ही केवल धार्मिक ग्रंथ पढ़ने से आत्मिक तृप्ति नहीं मिलती। असली अनुभव की आवश्यकता है। 

उन्होंने जोर देकर कहा कि मनुष्य जीवन एक अनमोल अवसर है जो दोबारा नहीं मिलेगा, इसलिए इसका पूर्ण लाभ उठाना चाहिए।

प्रेम रावत जी ने श्वास की अमूल्यता पर जोर दिया और कहा कि यह श्वास इतना कीमती है कि पूरी पृथ्वी का धन भी इसका मूल्य नहीं चुका सकता। गुरु का महत्व समझाते हुए उन्होंने कहा कि ज्ञान देना गुरु की जिम्मेदारी है, लेकिन अभ्यास करना शिष्य की। उन्होंने सत्संग और आत्म-ज्ञान के माध्यम से जीवन को सफल बनाने का आह्वान किया।

TimelessToday की सदस्यता के साथ इस पुनः प्रसारण का आनंद लें: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/hi/home/product/d6ef89d2-82c0-4c8b-8967-a3b334b8111b

6415b5b5-fe65-4af4-924a-6b2a61ff7b65.Name: The Making of the Book - Hear Yourself
6415b5b5-fe65-4af4-924a-6b2a61ff7b65.Description:
Prem Rawat, the renowned educator and bestselling author, shows us how to quiet the noise in our busy lives and hear our own unique, authentic voice—the source of peace within.

This video explores how HarperOne management and various publishing talent came to realize the power and value of Prem’s message. The noise of modern life can be deafening, leaving us feeling frazzled and uneasy. In this warm, wise book, Prem Rawat teaches us how to turn down the noise to “hear ourselves.”


Get the book at https://www.hearyourselfbook.com

6430fad1-a4e4-4f3c-8841-e7c43d7b2dd6.Name: 125th Hans Jayanti Celebration
6430fad1-a4e4-4f3c-8841-e7c43d7b2dd6.Description:
Session 4: Prem Rawat in Delhi In the finale of the 125th Hans Jayanti celebration, Prem Rawat spoke to over 20,000 viewers on the TimelessToday livestream about living more fully in the present. With gentle humor, he pointed out a modern paradox: we worry more about our phone's battery life than the breath we share with all humanity — past and present. The same breath that flowed through ancient sages flows through us today. He emphasized that joy must be created now, not postponed. Doubt, he said, is the greatest obstacle to realizing our dreams. His message was clear: embrace this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to truly live, not just exist, and fill each moment with genuine joy.

125th Hans Jayanti Celebration with Prem Rawat in Delhi • 43 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

649ea013-1c2f-4969-bdf7-84011a14fe13.Description:
As human history has evolved, there was a point where people began to realize there’s a level of consciousness beyond day-to-day thinking. What has been missing for most of us is an awareness of a practical, heartfelt way to go beyond our limitations, assumptions, and habits. One might say it is our life’s purpose to know and experience peace and gratitude.

Prem Rawat’s Peace Education and Knowledge (PEAK) program engages you in his practical approach, free for all interested in exploring a journey to personal peace. TimelessToday, Prem’s media company, is proud to deliver the PEAK mobile app. Packed with videos and designed to be self-paced, PEAK is available at no charge on the TimelessToday app from the Apple AppStore or Google Play Store.


You can also find plenty of free content on the TimelessToday app and website, including audios and videos of Prem addressing live audiences. In addition, a TimelessToday subscription provides access to Prem Rawat’s livestream events and other premium content.

68842ae1-9fa8-4cd6-a558-270e6baa1434.Description:
Prem Rawat in Bhairahawa, Nepal Against a backdrop of rolling thunder, wind and rain, Prem Rawat addressed an eager audience that was sheltered beneath a sea of colorful umbrellas in Bhairahawa, Nepal, on April 19, 2025. Despite the threatening weather, the crowd erupted with joy and gratitude as the event proceeded after a slight delay. For everyone who had the opportunity to listen, Prem’s message was a reminder of the simple beauty this life reveals when we focus in the right direction.

This memorable address is now available for Classic and Premier subscribers to experience through the TimelessToday® app and website.

69156798-83be-4e32-a51a-7471e5b3d9ed.Name: Session 4, 50th Anniversary
69156798-83be-4e32-a51a-7471e5b3d9ed.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


In September of 2016, over 4,500 people from around the world accepted Prem Rawat’s invitation to gather at Ivory’s Rock Conference Center in the Australian outback.

In this second of the four morning sessions, Prem Rawat uses portions of the ancient epic Mahabharat to elaborate themes of clarity and action. 

Prem spoke about the importance of yearning to learn and how learning to live consciously becomes the right thing to do.

He also spoke about kindness and social behavior, saying, “Kindness is the right thing to do. Kindness does not change by social behavior. You know, whatever the norms of social behavior are, whatever the norms of this and that, all these are going to change. But kindness is a human attribute – and it’s the right thing to do.”

Story of peace, faith, love and hope.
.........

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within.

7249e30d-513e-4e52-aa15-a86dcbfe16e8.Description:
Prem Rawat in Kyoto, Japan


On October 19, 2024, in Kyoto, Japan, moderator Mr. Hideki Yabuhara introduced author Prem Rawat and the much-anticipated release of the Japanese edition of his bestselling book Hear Yourself. Prem spoke about the importance of being remembered for kindness and about humanity’s enduring hunger for peace.

The event concluded with Prem answering six questions from the audience, leaving a lasting impression on all in attendance.

7256b1b2-53b8-4e6c-bfa8-8c6d67f9a2e2.Name: The Connection of Love
7256b1b2-53b8-4e6c-bfa8-8c6d67f9a2e2.Description:
Describing three worlds—the natural world, the man-made, and one’s inner realm—Prem Rawat directs us toward the value of knowing where to fulfill our innermost need for love. 

Speaking in Hindi during this last event in 2021, Prem Rawat gave an inkling of what might be in store for 2022, including more live and virtual events and training for Peace Education and Knowledge (PEAK) and Peace Education Program (PEP) facilitators. Also on the horizon is the further development of Intelligent Existence (IE) training to help anyone find peace in a noisy world.


English translation is now available for this full-length Replay of the Coventry event with your Classic or Premier subscription. Translations into French, German, Italian, Portuguese, and Spanish will also be offered to subscribers as soon as possible.

Be sure to turn on notifications in the settings of the TimelessToday app and website. Stay informed by joining the TimelessToday mailing list.

Learn more about TimelessToday’s subscription, sponsorship, and gifting options.

Order your copy of Hear Yourself at www.HearYourselfBook.com. The digital and audiobook versions are also available on Amazon and Apple Books.

729c9646-c18b-41e2-a6ac-009354517e68.Name: The Feeling of Belonging Part 2
729c9646-c18b-41e2-a6ac-009354517e68.Description:
Life Essentials, Episode 1, Part 2:  The Feeling of Belonging


What does it take to truly “belong?” In the first episode of our four-part series “Life Essentials,” Prem brings his unique—and often humorous—perspective to such life challenges as finding your place, recognizing your strengths—and learning from your mistakes. Recorded in Belfast, Northern Ireland with stand-up comedian Ryan McDonnell as MC, the release includes Prem answering questions texted to him by the audience.

Enjoy it—as well as all upcoming episodes in this series.

72ac44b4-ebff-4b70-ab5e-0a7be0b31e7e.Name: Prem Rawat in Accra, Ghana
72ac44b4-ebff-4b70-ab5e-0a7be0b31e7e.Description:
Have you ever asked, “If courage is in me, then why do I feel disappointed most of the time?”

This is one of many topics Prem Rawat addressed to an audience of 1,200 in Accra, Ghana, on August 18, 2016.

Accra, with a population of about 4 million, is the political and commercial capital of Ghana. Located on the coast of West Africa where the Atlantic Ocean meets the Gulf of Guinea, Ghana is a modern democratic country rich in natural resources, famous for its gold.

One of the humanitarian efforts of The Prem Rawat Foundation (TPRF) is the Peace Education Program (PEP), offered at institutions around the globe. The ten-week course includes videos of Prem speaking about the possibility of inner peace, exploring themes such as choice, dignity, hope, and contentment.

Many of the people who came to hear Prem Rawat speak at this event were introduced to him by the PEP. It was held in Accra’s uniquely designed National  Theater, where guests welcomed  him with great  enthusiasm.  Among them were 12 prison officials, including several in management.  Three tribal chiefs attended for their personal enjoyment. Visitors traveled from Côte d’Ivoire, Benin, Burkina Faso, South Africa, and Europe.  Being with Prem in person was a first for a number of guests.

He said, “When you were a baby, you were an explorer! And all of you in your life  have accomplished a feat that is unimaginable. Against all odds. Many times you failed.  But you never accepted failure. And you know what that was? You learned to walk.”

“There’s two of you”, he continued, “There is the one now — and then there was  the  one  when  you were a baby. Who are you?  The one now?  Or the courageous one?

”The audience laughed appreciatively at Prem’s gifted storytelling and took to heart his urging to recognize the inner resource they have had since they were babies: “courage beyond belief.”

Watch Prem’s personal message with our compliments.

This special release honors an age-old tradition in India of celebrating the connection between student and teacher and also marks the anniversary of Prem becoming the teacher of Self Knowledge at eight years old.

Prem reflects on the last five decades of tireless efforts to promote peace and wellbeing throughout the world which millions of people have engaged with at live events, via television, radio, and online, as well as through his literary work.

Tip: If you would like to skip the pre-event videos, then please note that Prem's main address begins at 14 minutes and 18 seconds into this video.

757eeb89-5e05-484f-b352-149a2a35c027.Description: There are certain phrases that we say all the time, like “Good morning.” But if we say these things ritually and don’t mean it, we’re missing out on the grand experience of it!

757f3206-7dcf-4e98-913c-510a0d169fce.Name: Ageless Heart
757f3206-7dcf-4e98-913c-510a0d169fce.Description:
Prem Rawat in Athens, Greece Returning to Athens, Greece on June 29, 2024, Prem Rawat asked the audience why, despite thousands of years of shared wisdom, it hasn’t taken hold and transformed human beings. He explained that fear, jealousy and doubt often compete with understanding the qualities of the heart. “It takes courage,” he said. Embracing the heart sows the seeds of kindness and humanity, seeds with which every human being is born. These seeds cannot sow themselves, but once they are sown, contain everything a person needs to thrive and become who they are meant to be.

You can now watch or listen to the Athens, Greece replay in English at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

UK comic Tom Price helps us explore the answer in this classic episode of Life’s Essentials with Prem Rawat. 5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


On Thursday morning, 12th of September, Prem focused on how to approach enjoying the practice of Knowledge beyond Amaroo. 

He implores the audience saying “when you go back, make every day sing out, learn to focus on the gift of knowledge, not your 9 billion questions.”

Prem shared his view that the term “journey” falls short compared to the vast depth of the experience.  And he reminded everyone the impact that they can have on others saying “how beautiful it is that you have that power in you.

785ca7ac-7a08-46ee-a621-8b97ac532684.Description:
Prem Rawat in Hyderabad, India


On November 26, 2025, in Hyderabad, India, Prem Rawat presented an extraordinary address. Being the final program of the year, he invited audiences to ruminate on inner wisdom and self-knowledge.

Prem Rawat shared a central message — what we search for outside exists within us. He elaborated extensively that every breath we take is the most precious gift of our life. His insights in this globally viewed event presented a new way of seeing and experiencing existence.

This address invites you into deep reflection and self-inquiry. Through the livestream replay on TimelessToday, witness Prem Rawat's words and music. Join us on this journey of self-knowledge.

This special occasion marked the 122nd birth date of Shri Hans Ji Maharaj, Prem Rawat’s father and teacher, and the transformative nature of the teacher-student relationship.

78c39500-f8c6-43ee-a752-8a19f5f9455f.Description:
On June 16th, 2019, internationally acclaimed author and master storyteller Prem Rawat spoke to a live audience in Milan, Italy about his book, recently published in Italy under the title “Quando il deserto fiorisce.”

The event featured insights from his book—which draws upon stories from around the world—and included Prem in conversation with television presenter and author Filippa Lagerbäck.

A bestseller with over 100,000 copies sold internationally, Prem’s book explores the inner strengths at our disposal to meet life’s challenges, and has helped bring Prem’s message to a widening and global audience.


The Replay of this LiveStream is now available in English.

799f6921-5fac-40a0-b1a1-005a032f0f10.Name: Amaroo 2018 Episode 7
799f6921-5fac-40a0-b1a1-005a032f0f10.Description:
Amaroo 2018 Series - Episode 7


Joy. Kindness. Clarity. Consciousness. Fulfillment. That was the agenda Prem set for the next-to-last day of the international retreat in Australia last year, as he spoke about the importance of knowing—and realizing—our priorities each day.

In a talk that’s sometimes hilarious, sometimes serious, but always heartfelt, Prem brings his wit and wisdom to everything from parent-child bonding to the consequences of focusing on the good (or bad) in our lives.

Our lives are full of change and uncertainty, Prem observes. But our capacity for enjoyment, clarity, and gratitude will never age or change, he maintains—as long as we keep our priorities straight.

Enjoy Episode 7 (and all previous episodes) of Amaroo 2018.



Find more information here: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/amaroo2018/

7a47afe0-1b45-4c1b-9555-9580147440c5.Name: Session 1, Amaroo 2024
7a47afe0-1b45-4c1b-9555-9580147440c5.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia The Opening Session of Amaroo 2024 took place on Monday, September 9, in the Amphitheatre at Ivorys Rock in Australia, where Prem Rawat welcomed in-person and livestream attendees. With profound insights into life’s journey and purpose, Prem addressed key questions, including “Why do people die?,” common misconceptions about life, and staying focused on one's existence amidst challenges.

The Opening Session of Amaroo 2024 took place on Monday, September 9, in the Amphitheatre at Ivorys Rock in Australia, where Prem Rawat welcomed in-person and livestream attendees. 

During the session, he addressed key questions like “Why do people die?,” clarifying misconceptions about life and emphasizing the importance of staying focused on one’s existence amid challenges.

7a607aea-4f4e-4d2f-a9ea-b5dff30dfe35.Name: Session 8, Focus 5
7a607aea-4f4e-4d2f-a9ea-b5dff30dfe35.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat


On the final morning of the Focus 5, Prem Rawat reflected on the key lessons shared during this Amaroo 2022 experience. The session was moved into a new location due to heavy rains Thursday evening. Independent of any external challenges, Prem’s message was clear and powerful. He used the analogy of a water bottle never being as important as drinking the water.

He reminded the Amaroo attendees and the TimelessToday’s livestream audience that once you embark on the journey to know who you are, during this life it will never end. The beauty and experience of life is about discovery, discovery of a lifetime, your lifetime. Prem reminded everyone to appreciate and engage in the journey of life every single day, and that it is never too late to accept that peace in your heart and be fulfilled. He added “Empty yourself. Except for that which is real.”

7b0a4f7a-7550-4a67-b9da-63db692fb709.Description:
With author and lecturer Florence de Vulpillières


Straight from “the city of love”: We’re thrilled to release the recording of Prem speaking to a packed audience at Le Casino de Paris this June about the self-love and peace that come with self-knowledge. Here is Prem in conversation with author and lecturer Florence de Vulpillières as well as addressing the audience directly as he explores the universal themes in his book Quand le désert fleurit (“When the desert blooms”), and what it takes for a heart—and life—to blossom.

7be5b4b8-5b56-462b-848a-5836346b797b.Name: Session 4, Amaroo 2024
7be5b4b8-5b56-462b-848a-5836346b797b.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


On the morning of the 11th of September, in Amaroo, Prem delivered a truly compelling and penetrating message. So many life changing themes were shared including the continued theme of the drop, the river and the ocean. 

He reflected on the continuous cycle where we as a drop have a beginning that ends in the ocean only to start the journey again. 

He talked about this “little now” (the drop) and how we should be conscious of two things, that which constantly changes and that which is constant.  The Amaroo 2024 experience continues.

7d6z4_lMFPo.Description:
Amaroo 2025 Session 2

In the second session, held on the morning of September 9th during Prem Rawat's 5-day retreat in Amaroo, attendees were offered a chance to listen and apply a unique perspective on conscious living — with clear insight into the experience of devotion.

7dc1eea8-4271-4a7c-98f8-467ced778b04.Description:
“Moving Straight Ahead”


In India and in other locations worldwide, the festival of Holi symbolizes a welcoming of Spring and an honoring of love. This color-filled tradition begins on Sunday, March 28th and ends Monday, March 29th.

"Moving Straight Ahead," a message in Hindi from Prem Rawat commemorating this occasion, is now available on the TimelessToday app and website to watch at any time, at your convenience.


Viewers can access the recorded message in Hindi and with English translation with a Classic or Premium subscription. Translation into French, Italian, Portuguese, and Spanish will be available as soon as possible.

Give the gift of a TimelessToday subscription so friends and family can also enjoy unlimited access to all Premier content, including LiveStreams, Full-length Videos and Audios, On-Demand Replays, Series, Global Virtual Events, and much more.

7edfdb69-2dc0-4a17-8665-88cff7bca778.Name: Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain
7edfdb69-2dc0-4a17-8665-88cff7bca778.Description:
Prem Rawat makes the complex so simple and reality so clear. Many have shared the metaphor of the “ocean and the drop”; seldom does it have the impact his heartfelt and powerful words convey.

On November 27, 2022, Prem Rawat addressed an eager and attentive audience in Barcelona, Spain. Also present, by way of TimelessToday’s livestream, was a global and diverse demographic from more than 91 countries, hearing a message that will have a profound impact on their lives.

The event concluded with a classical guitar medley by Manuel Iman and a birthday cake covered with hearts to celebrate Prem Rawat’s upcoming 65th birthday on December 10.


You can now watch or listen to the Replay in English and Hindi with your Classic or Premier subscription.

Additional replays in French, Italian, Spanish and Tamil will be available as soon as possible. Stay informed by joining the TimelessToday mailing list.

7f4d5c2c-909d-4bc3-a1d0-c57c83e6bf91.Name: What’s New?
7f4d5c2c-909d-4bc3-a1d0-c57c83e6bf91.Description:
Prem Rawat in Cape Town, South Africa | English During Prem Rawat’s compelling direct-to-camera broadcast from Cape Town, South Africa, on April 30, 2023, he reminds the viewer of the difference between belief and knowing. His words paint an image of a world in turmoil, seeking answers everywhere, while the one true answer to life’s mystery is right there in the renewable experience of each breath.

Stay informed about upcoming livestreams. Join the TimelessToday mailing list.

7f4f32f6-4b3c-40f7-a781-310fdd6000b2.Description: “There is an important difference between ‘hope’ and ‘wishful thinking.’”

7f524d55-b5c5-4687-be7f-28a0ae590aa8.Name: Your Only Relative
7f524d55-b5c5-4687-be7f-28a0ae590aa8.Description:
Prem Rawat in Lima, Peru On March 23, 2024, in Lima, Peru, Prem Rawat addressed an intimate, live audience, while 7,000+ online viewers enjoyed the livestream. During the course of just 60-minutes, Prem’s unscripted talk inspired, in practical terms, how best to appreciate, understand and savor the gift of life. Although internal battles will ensue, he urged listeners to focus on building an enduring relationship with the self – a force of Nature – from now until the very end.

All livestreams and replays from the South American tour are free in Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese until April 15, 2024. While no account is required, a free basic account ensures you receive essential news and updates from TimelessToday.

7gG5qfTRbjI.Name: Bhajan - Santo So Sadguru Mohe Bhave - संतों सो सद्गुरु मोहे भावे - Kabir Bhajan
7gG5qfTRbjI.Description:
Bhajan - Santo So Sadguru Mohe Bhave - संतों सो सद्गुरु मोहे भावे 

संतो सो सदगुरु मोहि भावै, जो आवागमन मिटावै।
डोलत डिगै ना बोलत बिसरे, अस उपदेश सुनावै।।

1. बिन हठ भ्रम क्रिया से न्यारा, सहज समाधि लगावै।
द्वार न रोके, पवन न रोके, ना अनहद उरझावै।।

2. ये मन जहाँ जाय तहाँ निर्भय, समता से ठहरावै।
कर्म करे और रहे अकर्मी, ऐसी युक्ति बतावै।।

3. सदा आनन्द फंद से न्यारा, भोग में योग सिखावै।
तज धरती आकाश अधर में, प्रेम मड़ैया छावै।।

4. ज्ञान सरोवर शुन्य शिला पर, आसन अचल जमावै।
कहैं कबीर सतगुरु सोई साँचा, घट में अलख लखावै।।

7h1WHAkgBrI.Description:
Livestream Replay Now Available!
“Know the Value!”
Prem Rawat in Kaohsiung, Taiwan

Now Available in English. 
Other languages will be available soon.

“Knowledge is that beautiful instrument, but you have to know how to play it. The only way you will know how to play it is by practice.”  Prem Rawat

Since his first speaking engagement in Taipei in 1984, peace educator Prem Rawat has held 51 events across Taiwan. His last event was in Hualien City in 2014. Eleven years later, on April 27, 2025, he returned to Taiwan – this time to Kaohsiung. There, he delivered a most profound message for the heart to an international audience attending in person and virtually.

The replay of this historic event is now available for TimelessToday® Classic and Premier subscribers to enjoy anytime.

83230d35-7089-4e8a-9bd1-2ccad1f48829.Name: Baisakhi Celebrations
83230d35-7089-4e8a-9bd1-2ccad1f48829.Description:
Prem Rawat in Delhi, India The Baisakhi season brings all of India together in joyful celebration. Farmers gather their spring harvests, and communities across the nation express gratitude for nature's bounty and they sow seeds of hope for future prosperity. This year held special significance as Prem Rawat returned to India after many years since attending his last Baisakhi event. His father, Shri Hans, had started a tradition of inviting people to gather during this joyful time, to listen to a message of personal peace. With wisdom and passion, Prem Rawat renewed this tradition on April 13, 2025 and reminded everyone how precious life is and to know and understand the heart’s full potential for joy. The 80-minute replay of this very special occasion includes a 7-minute video highlighting the meaning of Baisakhi.

Stay informed by joining the TimelessToday mailing list.

83751302-7003-4b4c-af63-9e5538299497.Name: Prem Rawat in Barcelona
83751302-7003-4b4c-af63-9e5538299497.Description:
None of the things that are happening in your life actually have any weight. None of them. None of them have any weight, whatsoever. Except in your mind, you will give them weight. Except in your mind, you will give them gravity. Except in your mind, you will give them a size. Except in your mind you will give them an importance. Except in your mind, and only in your mind, they will weigh you down.

- Prem Rawat

An international speaker and master storyteller, Prem reached over 1 billion people in 2019 with his unique message about life’s greatest gifts.

In his first ever virtual event, Prem talks about the value of the journey a human being takes coming back home to themselves. “People go through an entire lifetime living with a stranger. It is time to understand who you are.”


Enjoy this On-Demand Replay in English on the TimelessToday app and website with your subscription. Other languages will be available soon. Stay tuned for details and for future event notifications.

867f3496-8791-44a4-a1f2-59034369163c.Name: Connected to the Breath
867f3496-8791-44a4-a1f2-59034369163c.Description:
Prem Rawat’s 3rd Guinness World Record event On March 2, 2025, New York Times bestselling author Prem Rawat, alongside Indian author Vipul Rikhi, set a new Guinness World Record for the largest audience at a multiple-author book reading, attracting 133,234 attendees. The event took place in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh, India, shattering the previous record of 20,264—held by J.K. Rowling of Harry Potter fame and two Canadian authors. This achievement marks Prem Rawat’s 3rd Guinness World Record. Enjoy the replay and experience these two authors setting the new record.

The 106 minute replay is now available in Hindi with English translation for Classic and Premier subscribers to enjoy on the app and website. Other languages will be available very soon.

Stay informed by joining the TimelessToday mailing list.

86f0c4d5-702f-4eea-917c-c8d276de3209.Name: Hans Jayanti Celebration 2019
86f0c4d5-702f-4eea-917c-c8d276de3209.Description:
Life-changing teachers through the ages have taught that peace lies within. One such teacher was Hans Rām Singh Rawat, the father of Prem Rawat, who began spreading the knowledge of inner peace across India at age thirty-two. Hans believed that all religions come from a single source and every person has the potential to experience it.
 
As we celebrate Hans’ 119th birthday, Prem honors his father's legacy in a speech held in  Los Angeles. Prem was inspired by his father’s teachings from a young age, witnessing the profound silence when his father spoke to large crowds. Hans was a visionary who believed in equality, regardless of caste – a revolutionary stance at the time.
 
After Hans’ passing, Prem stepped into his father’s role, continuing the message of peace in his own way. In this special event, Prem shares a heartfelt message about the power of dreams, where the dreamer and the dream become one.

873b5ab8-dd2a-446b-a4ca-f4b5f374ee05.Name: तुम्हारे अंदर की क्षमता (ऑडियो)

"कौन पूछेगा यह प्रश्न कि जिस दिशा में हम जा रहे हैं, क्या वह दिशा ठीक है ? क्या सचमुच में उससे मानव समाज का कल्याण होगा ? क्योंकि आज यह देखना जरूरी है कि मनुष्य को क्या चाहिए ? क्या हमारी जरूरत है ?" —प्रेम रावत

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

उस शक्ति का अनुभव करना, साक्षात अनुभव करना — मन से नहीं, ख्यालों से नहीं, साक्षात अनुभव करना — उससे फिर शांति उभरती है। क्योंकि मनुष्य उस चीज का अनुभव कर रहा है, जिसका कि वह एक हिस्सा है और जिसकी कोई हद नहीं है।

8ac6d01a-2564-47ab-9233-a7dec6ca6c32.Description:
Swayam ki Awaz, Book Launch Event


We live in the present but often get caught up in future worries, losing sight of today's beauty. True peace resides within us and is present in every situation. Peace doesn’t come from resolving external struggles but from cultivating inner calm.

8afb05f9-8fd1-4805-a767-e8e771b05f02.Description:
Author Event: Miami, Florida

Plan to be captivated as the author points to the true nature of every breath. Yours to enjoy on the TimelessToday app and website with your Classic or Premier subscription.


Prem Rawat’s bestseller, Hear Yourself: How to Find Peace in a Noisy World is available at www.HearYourselfBook.com.

8b0cbee5-01a8-460b-ae38-2d4128f52e2b.Name: Session 8, Amaroo 2024
8b0cbee5-01a8-460b-ae38-2d4128f52e2b.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


On this final morning of Amaroo 2024, 13th September, Prem strongly encouraged everyone to take advantage of the opportunity and need to put the practice of Knowledge into action.

He suggested that we don’t need our concepts to feel the beauty of the divine. We are a part of that river that flows stating “your shape may be different, but your content isn’t.”

He opened the session up to those who wanted to express themselves to him, with smiles and wisdom he welcomed the range of love shared.

At the end of the morning session, Prem surprised the audience and Lem Lasher, the former TimelessToday CEO, with an appreciation award for his efforts.

8b0fae00-d665-44c9-a30e-db9afb2747f9.Name: Session 7, 50th Anniversary
8b0fae00-d665-44c9-a30e-db9afb2747f9.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


Prem Rawat in Ivory's Rock Conference and Events Center, Ipswich, 2016. 
A 5-day conference celebrating the 50th anniversary of his relentless efforts to spread the message of peace.

For the past 50 years, Prem Rawat has been focused on one simple goal – to communicate his message of peace to as many people as possible.  His efforts have been relentless and the results have been extraordinary – but never as extraordinary as this past year. Indeed, in 2016, Prem reached more people than ever before.

In September 2016, 4,500 of these people attended a five-day event with Prem at the Ivory’s Rock Conference and Event Center (aka Amaroo) in Australia. By all accounts, the event was a most remarkable one.

Today, in honor of the holiday season and the many requests we’ve received, we are happy to announce the launch of an online 50th Anniversary Gift Set.  This comprehensive collection includes nine of Prem’s addresses from the 5-day celebration with material not seen before on TimelessToday.  It also features many of the extraordinary stories he told in Amaroo from the Mahabharata – a classic Indian epic infused with enduring principles still relevant today.

8c054695-7e32-4881-94d5-9ab6b1d48dc1.Name: Wild Wise Women - Part 1
8c054695-7e32-4881-94d5-9ab6b1d48dc1.Description: There are 3.4 million people living in Cape Town these days – South Africa’s second most populous city. On May 9th 2016, three of its lively citizens met with Prem Rawat for a few hours of spirited conversation. A hearty shout out to Lumka Ngxoli, Robin Lee Pretorius, and Fluffy O’Panda – delightful hosts of Assembly Radio’s Wild Wise Women show – for their insightful and entertaining interview. It all happened – the laughter, the banter, and the extraordinary rapport – at Assembly Radio, an online media outlet that caters to a trendy listening audience of 10,000 15-35 year olds. The interview, both hilarious and profound, is one you will not soon forget. Written by Mitch Ditkoff

8c71338c-0cca-4073-8cf6-5316c660fd93.Name: You, Emanating You
8c71338c-0cca-4073-8cf6-5316c660fd93.Description: What emanates from you is entirely special.

8c9f40da-7384-4282-b9f4-cd92135f953f.Name: 2020 A Heartfelt Resolution
8c9f40da-7384-4282-b9f4-cd92135f953f.Description: Year after year we tend to reflect on external things we want to change, making assumptions that if things were different, we would be happier. But the happiness we seek won't be found on the outside—it exists within us.   In a very special New Year’s Day message, Prem encourages us to make a new kind of resolution, not just for ourselves based on external happiness, but for a better world and a better future—a resolution that comes from the heart.

8cfdd509-8ff0-46ba-bede-c22e715b6b75.Name: Prem Rawat on South Africa fm News Radio
8cfdd509-8ff0-46ba-bede-c22e715b6b75.Description: There are 53 million people living in South Africa, the only country in the world that borders both the Atlantic and Indian Oceans.  On December 8th, 11 million of these people had a rare opportunity to listen to a live interview with Prem Rawat on South Africa’s oldest radio station, SAfm. The interviewer, long time-radio host, Rowena Baird, began the show with a bold declaration.  “International Peace Ambassador, Mr. Prem Rawat”, she explained, “was going to share some tips on how to eliminate violence through reconciliation, hope, and forgiveness.”  Bold, indeed, and timely, too. Returning to a country that had blacklisted him for refusing to abide by Apartheid principles at his Johannesburg public event in 1972,  Prem was now being given a country-wide platform to share his message of peace.  Which is precisely what he did for 13 power-packed minutes.  Responding to Ms. Baird’s questions with his own unique brand of straight talk, storytelling, and humor, Prem laid it all on the line – especially in response to the last question – about his specific message for South Africans. “You have the power,” he exclaimed.  “All you need is that determination. Don’t look at other people. Look at yourself.  From the strength of you – you can change a nation.” Written by Mitch Ditkoff

8f66e17f-97b6-4d32-887d-de82f110cda3.Description:
Amaroo 2018 Series - Episode 5


"A little bit of light can destroy a ton of darkness," Prem remarks in Episode 5 of Amaroo 2018, but "a quadrillion tons of darkness cannot destroy a little bit of light."

In this moving talk at the international retreat in Queensland Australia last year, Prem answers questions texted from the audience, and speaks about the power of clarity in the face of adversity. Find the light that is in you, he urged, and look for the clear path, not the obstacles, in your life.

Journey “down under” with Episode 5 of this nine-part series from Amaroo 2018.


Find more information here: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/amaroo2018/

8fea38e5-3bca-4c18-a54f-d503d97a16ba.Name: Session 4, Focus 5
8fea38e5-3bca-4c18-a54f-d503d97a16ba.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat


In this Amaroo session, Prem Rawat highlights the work he does with The Prem Rawat Foundation (TPRF) and invites a distinguished panel on to the stage to discuss the incredible impact that the Peace Education Program is having on people around the world.

The group shares how the program got its humble start 10 years ago and has now reached 300,000 people in 80 countries. They share profound stories of how the program is transforming the lives of university students, gang members, incarcerated people and more.

 Prem Rawat outlines how the program has become a key part of his outreach and celebrates the people who are helping make it happen. He also notes how the TPRF Food for People program is helping break the cycle of poverty in disadvantaged communities. At a follow-up meeting, Prem was able to spend some time with a group of TPRF volunteers from around the world.

8jaXmfty2ys.Name: Mann To Kahin Aur Hai - मन तो कहीं और है
8jaXmfty2ys.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization


Subscribe Now:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/rajvidyakender

Join Us:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rajvidyakender

Twitter: https://twitter.com/rvk_india

Blogger: http://rajvidyakender1.blogspot.in

8kJzhkRrums.Description:
श्री प्रेम रावत द्वारा हिंदी में सम्बोधित

8qEw21u3eJ8.Name: श्री प्रेम रावत जी मिर्ज़ापुर, भारत में
8qEw21u3eJ8.Description:
“अपने आप को जानना - यही शांति, आत्मज्ञान, सच्चे आनंद का रास्ता है। यही मानव होने का रास्ता है - ना कि और सब काम जो हम करते हैं।” प्रेम रावत

"रविवार, 2 मार्च को भारतीय समयानुसार प्रातः 9:00 बजे, श्री प्रेम रावत जी मिर्जापुर, भारत में एक कार्यक्रम में संबोधन देंगे। वह अपनी नई पुस्तक 'श्वास: जीवन के प्रति जागरूक हों' के हिंदी और अंग्रेजी संस्करण के विमोचन के अवसर पर अपने विचार प्रकट करेंगे। यह प्रेरणादायक पुस्तक हमारे जीवन में शांति और इसकी भूमिका के प्रति गहरी जागरूकता लाने के लिए श्वास की गहन शक्ति के बारे में है। अधिक जानकारी के लिए BreathBook.in पर जाएँ।

जो भी इस कार्यक्रम में शामिल होना चाहते हैं, वे टाइमलेस टुडे की ऐप्प या वेबसाइट के माध्यम से सीधे प्रसारण में भाग ले सकते हैं, जिसके लिए क्लासिक या प्रीमियर सदस्यता आवश्यक है। इस अनूठे कार्यक्रम का पुनः प्रसारण भी सदस्यों के लिए उपलब्ध होगा।

90YWlfMwkLY.Name: The Presence in the Present
90YWlfMwkLY.Description:
“Water has no shape. Air has no color. But when the two come together, they become a cloud. You can see it, and it’s changing so fast. What does it have in it? It has in it the promise of that one drop of rain. That one drop that can transform, that can change an arid desert into the most magnificent garden. That’s the promise.
Toronto, Canada. Sunday 13 July 2014

91289ce1-7d9b-473b-8278-304979fe18fd.Name: The Bridge Keeper
91289ce1-7d9b-473b-8278-304979fe18fd.Description:
Guru Puja Celebration, 2025


"The Bridge Keeper" is about the relationship between a student and teacher on the path to understanding life's deeper meaning. Using images of water and bridges, the poem describes someone who helps others move from everyday struggles to lasting truth.

The poem explores an interesting idea — how we sometimes need another person's help to discover who we really are. Based on ancient Sanskrit texts and brought into modern language, it connects with anyone who has looked for guidance during difficult times. It suggests that true transformation requires a master who lights the path of self-knowledge—someone whose wisdom helps us experience our life force within.

912b7124-9ef4-40b8-b9c2-41d71f025e19.Name: A conversation with La Repubblica Milano
912b7124-9ef4-40b8-b9c2-41d71f025e19.Description: Prior to his public address in Milan in mid-June, Prem met with journalist Gianluca Tizi of the Italian national newspaper "La Repubblica Milano." In a touching interview Prem talks about, among other things, the possibility for personal change (regardless of one's past)—and why he hasn't gotten into politics.

9154e6fa-00e2-4a4a-8a4b-3e1b45d87919.Name: Winning the War
9154e6fa-00e2-4a4a-8a4b-3e1b45d87919.Description: Not feeling “peaceful” every moment of every day? What’s important is making the effort. Peace is about the big picture, not every battle.

Prem Rawat is preparing to present his Peace Education Program (PEP), a course aimed at self discovery of our inner resources. As a lead up, the daily "Lockdown” will feature stories from PEP participants around the world.

Stay tuned for more details on the upcoming broadcast of Prem Rawat’s PEP!

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

92b373d4-e964-49c5-b21a-36c57a6b108d.Name: Session 5, 50th Anniversary
92b373d4-e964-49c5-b21a-36c57a6b108d.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


Prem Rawat in Ivory's Rock Conference and Events Center, Ipswich, 2016. 
A 5-day conference celebrating the 50th anniversary of his relentless efforts to spread the message of peace.

For the past 50 years, Prem Rawat has been focused on one simple goal – to communicate his message of peace to as many people as possible.  His efforts have been relentless and the results have been extraordinary – but never as extraordinary as this past year. Indeed, in 2016, Prem reached more people than ever before.

In September 2016, 4,500 of these people attended a five-day event with Prem at the Ivory’s Rock Conference and Event Center (aka Amaroo) in Australia. By all accounts, the event was a most remarkable one.

Today, in honor of the holiday season and the many requests we’ve received, we are happy to announce the launch of an online 50th Anniversary Gift Set.  This comprehensive collection includes nine of Prem’s addresses from the 5-day celebration with material not seen before on TimelessToday.  It also features many of the extraordinary stories he told in Amaroo from the Mahabharata – a classic Indian epic infused with enduring principles still relevant today.

92e74f87-ccb8-4633-8844-b51b9e6cabe1.Name: Peace is Possible - LiveStream Replay
92e74f87-ccb8-4633-8844-b51b9e6cabe1.Description:
Prem Rawat in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia


In the midst of an ever-changing world, where do we find our anchor? On October 27, best-selling author and global Ambassador of Peace Prem Rawat spoke with Malaysia TV presenter Kanchana Nanda Kumar about the inner strength that comes with personal peace. Prem also interacted with the young winners of the 2018 Storytelling Competition. 

The competition featured stories from Prem’s widely-acclaimed book, Splitting the Arrow, and was organized by Navagon Digital Sdn Bhd in partnership with Kifubon Malaysia. (Kifubon is a group that promotes peaceful coexistence through the sharing of donated, inspirational books with primary schools, prisons, and other institutions.)


Enjoy this LiveStream Replay in English. Spanish will be available soon.

92fc8261-eef2-40bf-8095-ea70c4e596ff.Name: Positive News
92fc8261-eef2-40bf-8095-ea70c4e596ff.Description: Barred from South Africa during apartheid for taking a stand against racism, International Ambassador of Peace and speaker Prem Rawat has returned to the country carrying his message of peace during his 16 days of activism tour. Along with his message of peace, Rawat talks the Business of Life and emphasizes that it is the most important thing. “When life is not right nothing else falls into place. When you don’t feel alive, everything else just seems so static”, he says. Asked about the importance of living a balanced life; Rawat says “Life will be balanced if those forces that throw it out of balance are removed. Life wants balance – there is a want for joy, there is a want for happiness. There is no limit on how happy we can be but for sadness, fear, pain, anger we definitely have low tolerance and that right there tells us something”

93edc653-a99b-4cec-93dc-b05ec57603e8.Description: We’re  all  dedicated  to  something—even  if  we  don’t  realize  it!  Being dedicated to fulfilling your heart's true desire can have beautiful consequences in your life.

948187b5-cedc-4797-a0e6-5fe331b2d944.Description: One 2 One with Prem Rawat | No. 15

948dd699-d1e3-4f3c-b017-87db03fa88bb.Description: Prem’s four international birthday celebrations for the year were kicked off in September at Ivory’s Rock Conference Center in Brisbane, Australia (Amaroo). Over 4000 guests from all over the world attended this 5-day convention.

94af0ff0-cfe0-49ce-9510-9c326ae61d24.Description:
Dignitaries in Toamasina, Madagascar, gave Prem Rawat an enthusiastic reception on November 16, expressing their support for his work in helping people find personal peace. The gathering honored Prem Rawat’s Peace Education Program and his bestselling book, “Hear Yourself: How to Find Peace in a Noisy World.” The impactful event was the result of the collaboration between WOPG and TPRF.

Find out more about The Prem Rawat Foundation (TPRF) and the Peace Education Program: 
tprf.org

95258bbe-b791-4695-966f-161a21b15a3c.Description: Despite problems and escalating uncertainties we all face living in this world, joy still dwells in the heart of each human being.

95c0a8f6-cf6b-4165-b333-1f542c2b79a0.Name: Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain
95c0a8f6-cf6b-4165-b333-1f542c2b79a0.Description: What is pain? The self that wants to be content, and then there’s this other stuff that wants to make it discontent, and that’s the noise—called “pain. Suffering.”

95dbe427-e5ad-4319-9762-02c2889f5d63.Description:

Prem Rawat

960437c3-209b-4030-bee9-446c7daa1864.Description:
“Lockdown” Day 82


“There is a possibility for every human being to be in the place where their heart speaks and they listen.” —Prem Rawat


 Prem Rawat’s daily “Lockdown” videos highlight his talks and how his Peace Education Program helps people discover personal peace. 

Stay tuned for details on how you’ll be able to join Prem virtually in the program soon.

962c8322-9930-45ee-be89-35f691de7813.Name: Mere Satguru Deyi Btaye
962c8322-9930-45ee-be89-35f691de7813.Description: Mere Satguru Deyi Btaye, a bhajan from Prem Rawat’s album Gifts. Listen now on TimelessToday.

96cee41a-92bb-49b5-afac-126a21a85f5f.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #51  (15 मई,, 2020)
96cee41a-92bb-49b5-afac-126a21a85f5f.Description:
"आप क्रोधित भी हो सकते हैं और आप आनंद में भी हो सकते हैं। आप प्यार भी कर सकते हैं, आप नफरत भी कर सकते हैं। दोनों चीजें साथ चलती हैं। बात यह है कि हम किस चीज को प्रेरणा देते हैं ?" —प्रेम रावत

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

96qrBOpRmzc.Description:
“Change the Core” is a five-minute video excerpt from Prem Rawat’s Understanding More™ Focus Session in Wiesbaden, Germany on July 9, 2023 on why it is so important – as Socrates noted 2,500 years ago – to “Know Thyself.”

97561e5e-611b-492e-9926-e1272d24e371.Name: The Timeless Breath Part 1
97561e5e-611b-492e-9926-e1272d24e371.Description:
Life Essentials, Episode 2, Part 1:  The Timeless Breath


What is the “Timeless Breath”? Good question! Speaking from his heart and in lively conversation with host June Sarpong, Prem answers this, and other most puzzling questions about life in this latest installment of the “Life Essentials” Series.

97d5b826-9325-4710-9250-af47e71d4474.Name: Prem Rawat in Mirzapur, Nov. 20
97d5b826-9325-4710-9250-af47e71d4474.Description:
Replay of Livestream with Prem Rawat from Mirzapur, India


The purpose of the two-day event in Mirzapur, India was met by Prem Rawat as he shared his strength and clarity with attendees from the region and 7600+ livestream viewers. An opportunity was given to learn how to move forward in life through the practice of self-knowledge.


You can now watch or listen to the replay of this event at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

97db0ec4-2a8f-42eb-9348-b6fadc239ee1.Name: 121st Hans Jayanti Celebration
97db0ec4-2a8f-42eb-9348-b6fadc239ee1.Description:
Throughout history, there have been teachers who have shown people how to uncover the peace within them.

This November 8th marks the 121st birth anniversary of one such beloved teacher, Shri Hans Ji Maharaj, who was also Prem Rawat’s father, in a celebration known as Hans Jayanti.

For more than fifty-five years, Prem has carried out his father’s wish that he bring this unique and compelling message to people around the planet, delivering it in such a way that it makes sense in today’s world.


A special message from Prem Rawat

987a3256-6f47-4b06-a676-40e0ddd940f6.Name: The Miserable Club
987a3256-6f47-4b06-a676-40e0ddd940f6.Description: Countless people have had exactly the same problems that we face. When we think our challenges are unique, it helps to keep a simple focus on the reality of the day.

98bbebc8-061d-421c-8041-1ec83cdd75d1.Name: Human Behind the Mask
98bbebc8-061d-421c-8041-1ec83cdd75d1.Description:
Prem Rawat in Kyoto, Japan


On May 16, 2025, Prem Rawat celebrated his 100th event in Japan since 1972. He addressed the universal challenge of embracing life amid personal difficulties. And he emphasized the importance of recognizing our authentic selves beneath societal masks.

The event featured "EVOLUTION: A Decade of Effort and Growth," a 12-minute video showcasing innovative tools developed to share Prem Rawat's message of inner peace and Self-Knowledge across all demographics. The presentation highlighted his dedication to breaking barriers, empowering individuals, and providing vital humanitarian aid to vulnerable communities – all in service of celebrating and fostering peace.

98e7c7dc-d74e-4fe1-81b9-f075f989aeff.Name: Simple is Extraordinary
98e7c7dc-d74e-4fe1-81b9-f075f989aeff.Description:
"That dirt that you don’t like so much is what you’re made out of." Prem Rawat


Carbon, Calcium, and Hydrogen are pretty common on Earth. And when they come together just right, they make something extraordinary—YOU!

98f7911f-a26a-4b0f-b9cf-d6b415221587.Name: The Ultimate Game
98f7911f-a26a-4b0f-b9cf-d6b415221587.Description: One 2 One with Prem Rawat | No. 17

99435e70-b0ce-43ee-be31-9d30c0b1e3d9.Description: “A lot of elderly people are busy hanging it up.  Why are you busy hanging it up? The breath isn’t hanging up on you. You’re hanging up on yourself!”

995c583f-ad14-4512-afdf-43238f3a881e.Name: Prem Rawat - New Year's Day Message

9990e5eb-7ead-4856-9b91-d1ba10514b8e.Name: Direction Within
9990e5eb-7ead-4856-9b91-d1ba10514b8e.Description:
The Global Virtual Event on Sunday, April 25, 2021, was a captivating, 48-minute live address by Prem Rawat, in which he discussed written concerns from viewers about what happens when you die. Asking viewers not to get caught in words, Prem said there is a reality to experience that leads to understanding and excelling in life every day.


Global Virtual Event with Prem Rawat | On-Demand Replay

99d86532-c97f-4515-b48c-d6f575f02d5a.Name: 2025 A New Year’s Message from Prem Rawat - Hindi
99d86532-c97f-4515-b48c-d6f575f02d5a.Description:
In 2024, across six continents, people embraced Prem Rawat’s inspiring wisdom, discovering a deep understanding of the opportunity that life offers to every individual. To ring in 2025, Prem has recorded a special New Year’s message to enjoy and share with anyone interested. No login needed.

You can find this message on the TimelessToday® app and website, Prem Rawat Official YouTube Channel and PremRawat.com.

Translation is available in French, Hindi, Italian, Chinese, German, Brazilian Portuguese and Spanish with more languages added as soon as possible.

May 2025 be a year of fulfillment, gratitude and the unshakable joy of being alive. Happy New Year!

99e2e369-d7e8-47d4-8ae4-54bab656a56d.Name: समानता (Samaanta)
99e2e369-d7e8-47d4-8ae4-54bab656a56d.Description: इस दुनिया के अंदर लोग हर एक चीज में भेदभाव करते हैं — तुम गोरे हो, तुम काले हो, तुम औरत हो, तुम मर्द हो, तुम बच्चे हो, तुम बूढ़े हो। परन्तु हम सब एक हैं।

99e5bbbc-0516-4bee-8520-89f5a53bb350.Name: Point Within
99e5bbbc-0516-4bee-8520-89f5a53bb350.Description: We often ask our parents about the world, and they are very willing to give us answers. But sometimes, it’s better to leave the questions open, so we can find out on our own.

99f8921b-870f-4c9a-87dc-9381ee0b818d.Name: 55th Anniversary Celebration
99f8921b-870f-4c9a-87dc-9381ee0b818d.Description:
A Milestone Event with Prem Rawat: Replay


Fifty-five years ago in July, Prem Rawat accepted the responsibility of his father’s vision to bring self-knowledge to humanity. The joyous impact of Prem’s lifelong efforts was celebrated on July 23, 2021 with a live address from Prem speaking in Hindi.


TimelessToday’s exclusive capture of Prem’s address in real time was livestreamed to Hindi speaking viewers across the world to enjoy from the safety and comfort of their home via the app and website.

Enjoy the Replay with a TimelessToday Classic or Premier subscription.

9ZQgEasvqns.Name: पहला सत्र, अमारू 2025
9ZQgEasvqns.Description:
इस वर्ष के पाँच दिवसीय सम्मेलन के लिए अमारू में एक बार फिर 2,000 से अधिक लोग एकत्रित हुए — उस उड़ान के लिए जिसकी हृदय को ज़रूरत है।

प्रारंभिक सत्र में श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने अपनी बुद्धिमत्ता, हास्य और हाल ही में लिखे व निर्मित गानों के माध्यम से (जो इस समय केवल अमारू के प्रतिभागियों के साथ साझा किए गए), सभी को प्रोत्साहित किया कि वे अमारू में सीखे गए अनुभवों को अपने दैनिक जीवन में अपनाएँ।

शांति शिक्षक और प्रसिद्ध कहानीकार श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने 'आनंद' की अमेरिकी मनोवैज्ञानिक संघ (APA) द्वारा दी गई परिभाषा साझा की — यह एक गहरी भलाई की अनुभूति है, जो सामान्य खुशी से अलग होती है, कठिन समय में भी बनी रह सकती है और अक्सर दूसरों को दिखाई नहीं देती। उन्होंने इस पर ज़ोर दिया कि यही वह अनुभव है जिसे समझना और अपने जीवन में स्थान देना ज़रूरी है।

पहला सत्र देखें : https://www.timelesstoday.tv/hi/store

9a45e7c7-a2d4-404b-8e3b-6910653d5c9a.Name: Things Change
9a45e7c7-a2d4-404b-8e3b-6910653d5c9a.Description: Being in touch with the ageless qualities of the heart can lead to a lifetime of contentment.  7:51 min. Video excerpted from Amaroo 2018 Series, Episode 7.

9a85784f-a4d8-4da0-a9aa-0b4cfa829498.Description: One 2 One with Prem Rawat | No. 11

9a85baf9-e92f-4f25-945a-49b3890a5bbc.Name: The Hunger We Share
9a85baf9-e92f-4f25-945a-49b3890a5bbc.Description: Every cuisine has evolved from a universal urge—hunger. Do we recognize our hunger for peace?  This is an excerpt from Prem Rawat's interview with Fernando Mauro Trezza in São Paolo, Brazil.

9aa0ff39-5fb1-4970-8570-5695cd6c9e7a.Name: जीवन की किताब (Jeevan Ki Kitaab)
9aa0ff39-5fb1-4970-8570-5695cd6c9e7a.Description: एक किताब है, यह किताब खुली तब, जब तुम पैदा हुए। यह पन्ना पलटता रहेगा, पलटता रहेगा, पलटता रहेगा, पलटता रहेगा। कब तक ? जब तक आखिरी पन्ना पलट नहीं जाता।

9ac59e75-e3ef-4242-92fd-f1da3ba2fc02.Name: Lockdown with Prem Rawat - Day 45
9ac59e75-e3ef-4242-92fd-f1da3ba2fc02.Description:
“Lockdown” Day 45


“Peace isn’t the absence of war; peace is the absence of war within inside of us.” — Prem Rawat




Prem Rawat is preparing to present his Peace Education Program (PEP), a course aimed at self discovery of our inner resources. As a lead up, the daily "Lockdown” will feature stories from PEP participants around the world.

Stay tuned for more details on the upcoming broadcast of Prem Rawat’s PEP!

9b1460f8-762b-41d3-86f5-88c7a37446e4.Name: शांति क्या है
9b1460f8-762b-41d3-86f5-88c7a37446e4.Description: अंदर की शांति यह नहीं है कि हमारी समस्याओं का हल हो जाए तो हम शांत हो जाएंगे क्योंकि हमारी समस्याएं बदलती रहेंगी।

9b69fd01-0458-4d39-8d83-b247a9c4a65e.Name: Clarity Feels Good
9b69fd01-0458-4d39-8d83-b247a9c4a65e.Description: Where do the problems and obstacles we face originate?  Being clear about the part we play in our own issues gives us a whole new perspective.

9bcu0RSvgcE.Name: "असली रंग" श्री प्रेम रावत जी देहरादून में (अंश 2)
9bcu0RSvgcE.Description:
9 मार्च 2025 को, श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने उत्तरी भारत के उत्तराखंड प्रदेश - देहरादून में एक बड़े दर्शक समूह को संबोधित किया, और सभी को सच्चे रंग, वास्तविक खुशी और संतोष के लिए आवश्यक बातें याद दिलाई।

कबीर दास जी के भजन "मेरे सतगुरु दई बताय, दलाली लालन की" का उल्लेख करते हुए, श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने कहा कि असली रंग वही है जिसमें हमें रंगा होना चाहिए - और वह रंग है दिव्यता का रंग। 

श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने याद दिलाया कि हमें अपने भीतर की दिव्यता को पहचानना होगा। उनके सन्देश ने एक सरल और अद्भुत रहस्य से पर्दा उठाया, जो हमें सच्चे सुख और संतोष की ओर ले जाता है।

इस अद्वितीय सार्वजनिक संबोधन का 86 मिनट का पुनः प्रसारण अब टाइमलेस टुडे® ऐप और वेबसाइट पर क्लासिक या प्रीमियर सदस्यता के साथ उपलब्ध है।
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/hi/product/1f6dcb0b-2611-43e2-a0c3-c48884a2d7bc

9c4c19d1-cd6f-4376-9840-7b6b9a523ade.Name: You Too Have a Gift
9c4c19d1-cd6f-4376-9840-7b6b9a523ade.Description: Each of us has a gift, but we don’t often recognize our capacity for greatness. Prem emphasizes this and lends insight on into how we can attain clarity and understanding within ourselves.

9c86318d-6b72-442e-9695-59605d1f6694.Name: One Day Would Be Enough - Part 2
9c86318d-6b72-442e-9695-59605d1f6694.Description:
An Audience with Prem Rawat is a brand-new series of audio podcasts from the sell-out 2017 World Tour.

Listen to Prem Rawat offer his unique perspective on the pathway to peace and how we can all reconnect with our essential humanity, in the face of seismic global change.

In conversation with a new host at each event, Prem explores different themes of self-discovery, as well as answering burning questions from the audience.

In a way that only Prem Rawat can do, you will see that the answers are never far away.

9cd34a84-6449-4cc7-8c18-a8d25bdc3487.Name: Business of Being Alive (8-min)
9cd34a84-6449-4cc7-8c18-a8d25bdc3487.Description: Milestones in business mark a significant phase of advancement. What are the milestones of life that indicate you are reaching your personal potential?  This is an excerpt from Prem Rawat’s address at Young President’s Organization in Cascais, Portugal.

9ce13261-3cae-4266-815e-99766fb01a2c.Name: The Value of Now
9ce13261-3cae-4266-815e-99766fb01a2c.Description:
The reality that one day we won't be here should fundamentally change how we live right now.

“The song of life makes you feel good, not because of what you might get, but because you understand you’ve been given the greatest gift of all.” —Prem Rawat

9d4b13cf-e2b3-42bb-ac16-603bbdc1a6ac.Description: जो थोड़ी-थोड़ी समस्याएं आती हैं या कोई ऐसी चीज कर देता है, जिससे कि हमको दुःख होता है या हम किसी का दुःख नहीं सहन कर पा रहे हैं — ये हैं वो मक्खी और मच्छर! अगर हम इनसे बचना चाहते हैं तो खिड़की बंद करने की जरूरत है।

9e04becf-dcfc-4cf9-9ac2-474ef03d2745.Name: तुम असली में कौन हो
9e04becf-dcfc-4cf9-9ac2-474ef03d2745.Description: अगर तुम अपने आपको समझ जाओ, तुम अपने आपको जान जाओ कि तुम्हारे अंदर की चीज क्या है तो तुम समझने लगोगे कि तुम असली में कौन हो।

9e1f3904-17c4-434a-84c3-4ca94d25d482.Name: Session 9, Focus 5
9e1f3904-17c4-434a-84c3-4ca94d25d482.Description:
Amaroo 2022 with Prem Rawat


During this final Focus 5 Amaroo 2022 session Prem translates Hindi and English weaving in a mix of traditional Indian stories and modern examples. He reflected that in today’s world the value of a human being is disappearing. While we might live in a time of  political correctness, it hasn’t resulted in a sense of closeness, rather we are more and more divided.

Prem reminds us that we look for love and kindness in the environment, not realizing that what we are looking for is inside. As he has stated for years, it is only when each of us becomes kind that society will be  kind. Dedicate your life to understanding  the Divine, without concepts but by personal experience. Concepts are the drug that gets in our way.

9e6edf85-b470-4a5d-b1c1-ea0c1b59b66f.Name: Dream Within a Dream
9e6edf85-b470-4a5d-b1c1-ea0c1b59b66f.Description: Through the ages there have been stories that convey an underlying truth about being human. Discovering their meaning can have lasting benefits.  Excerpted from "Amaroo 2018 Series, episode 8".

9e7a937a-ea60-4de7-9a5b-935dd68c96e9.Description: Prem Rawat addressed over 4000 guests at the CCIB Forum Auditorium in Barcelona, Spain. This celebration event was one of the first to be LiveStreamed on TimelessToday.

9eade405-c0a0-4a34-bd15-1a5c9792e44e.Name: The Feeling of Belonging Part 1
9eade405-c0a0-4a34-bd15-1a5c9792e44e.Description:
Life Essentials, Episode 1, Part 1:  The Feeling of Belonging


What does it take to truly “belong?” In the first episode of our four-part series “Life Essentials,” Prem brings his unique—and often humorous—perspective to such life challenges as finding your place, recognizing your strengths—and learning from your mistakes. Recorded in Belfast, Northern Ireland with stand-up comedian Ryan McDonnell as MC, the release includes Prem answering questions texted to him by the audience.

Enjoy it—as well as all upcoming episodes in this series.

9ef45a9b-fbec-47da-a758-f00aae85b759.Name: Uncover Life
9ef45a9b-fbec-47da-a758-f00aae85b759.Description:
Prem Rawat in Buenos Aires, Argentina Something special happened in Buenos Aires on Friday night, March 27, 2026 — the opening night of Prem Rawat’s 3-Day Global Gathering — the first of its kind. Prem Rawat took the stage and did what he does best — cut through the noise and conveyed a feeling and clarity about the quiet stillness of life. Woven throughout the evening were two of his original songs, Come On In and Here Today, Gone Tomorrow. Recorded in English, Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese, the songs were a delight for the Latin American audience. Reciting lyrics from Come On In, he said, “‘Slow down, unwind, step through the doorway of the divine.’ That's the only way you can step into that doorway. Not wound tight, not full of questions, not full of ideas, but when you have unwound, then you can come in.”

The replay awaits with your Classic or Premier subscription.

Looking for coverage of Saturday & Sunday Morning Sessions? Visit Intelligent Existence.

9f1Ooel7UzY.Name: Meri Khoobi - मेरी ख़ूबी
9f1Ooel7UzY.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization

9f9bc3ee-ac61-4784-b34f-b707c7f81b18.Description:
Livestream Replay with Prem Rawat in Mumbai | English


At the core of Prem Rawat’s message in Mumbai was a powerful reminder that we live as if we'll be here forever, but that we are all merely visitors on this planet. Prem encouraged the audience to understand that to truly live and be happy, one must know oneself and respect the temporary nature of life.

A1-Am9dYOG8.Name: A Special Celebration with Prem Rawat - Hindi
A1-Am9dYOG8.Description:
श्री प्रेम रावत जी, 31 जुलाई, 2022 को आत्म-ज्ञान के सरल एवं स्पष्ट दृष्टिकोण को साझा करते हुए 56 वां वर्ष अंकित करेंगे।

जीवन यात्रा में, गुरु-शिष्य के अनुपम सम्बन्ध और इस विशेष पर्व के उपलक्ष में श्री प्रेम रावत जी द्वारा रिकॉर्ड किया गया एक सन्देश, रविवार, 31 जुलाई, 2022 को भारतीय समयानुसार प्रातः 8:00 बजे (यूनिवर्सल समयानुसार प्रातः 2:30 बजे) से उपलब्ध होगा।

टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप्प, वेबसाइट एवं श्री प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल पर यह वीडियो निःशुल्क प्रसारित होगा । आप इसका आनंद किसी भी समय ले सकते हैं।  हिंदी से अंग्रेजी में अनुवाद भी उपलब्ध होगा।

अवगत रहने के लिए टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप्प की सेटिंग में अधिसूचना (नोटिफिकेशन) चालू करना सुनिश्चित करें और  श्री प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें।

https://info.timelesstoday.tv/streams-and-replays-hi-3

श्री प्रेम रावत जी के संदेश का आनंद लेने के लिए अपने प्रियजनों और परिवार को टाइमलेस टुडे की सदस्यता का उपहार दें और साथ ही सीधे प्रसारण, तात्कालिक तथा पूर्ण संस्करण पुनः प्रसारण, रुचि के विषय, श्रृंखलाएं, वैश्विक आभासी कार्यक्रम और बेहतरीन प्रीमियर विषयवस्तुओं तक असीमित प्रविष्टि प्रदान करें।#PremRawatOfficial #celebration #SelfKnowledge

ArVQdHPxqcw.Name: Bow to the Breath - Prem Rawat in Bologna
ArVQdHPxqcw.Description:
Bologna Welcomed  Prem Rawat for an Inspiring Evening

On July 5, 2025, bestselling author Prem Rawat brought his message of peace and self-discovery to Bologna, Italy, for the first time. Acclaimed Italian actor Neri Marcorè served as host for the evening. The event included a dynamic question-and-answer session which touched on everything from the perfect Italian pizza to revolutionary ideas about success and happiness.

"If you want to truly celebrate the celebration of life, the next time you take a breath, know what you just did." Prem Rawat 

The evening demonstrated how making a difference begins with transforming your own life – one breath at a time.

BV3DIuisK84.Name: Messengers of Peace / Prem Rawat with Scouts
BV3DIuisK84.Description:
As part of an initiative to help young people do more for a peaceful world, Prem Rawat and the Scouts Association of Malaysia signed a “Pledge to Peace” in September 2014 at an event in Putrajaya attended by 500 scouts and scout leaders. Prem Rawat spoke particularly to the younger scouts, emphasizing that by beginning to train themselves to choose peace now, they can begin to make a difference not only in their own lives but also in their communities when they become adults.
Putrajaya, Malaysia. Tuesday 30 September 2014

BYfBdzq-Ofg.Name: Moments of Possibility: Prem Rawat in Brighton, UK
BYfBdzq-Ofg.Description:
Prem Rawat first spoke in the United Kingdom in 1971 on the Pyramid Stage at Glastonbury. He has returned often to the UK since then. Now, nearly 53 years later, on June 8, 2024, he again shared his uniquely compelling and heartful message in Brighton.

Focused once again on the art of enjoying and understanding life, he said that, although we can’t hold onto life, we can hold onto the joy it brings. Whether navigating ever-changing technologies or feeling daunted by world events, we can grow our own wisdom and make the most of our time.

Watch “Moments of Possibility” Replay: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/240608-brighton-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

BbeXqrk-Uxk.Name: Amaroo 2024 Session 8 (A glimpse)
BbeXqrk-Uxk.Description:
“Allow yourself to be distracted from your problems, because an incredible candy has been handed to you.It’s called “Knowledge!  Go within and truly taste the magnificent sweetness of being alive.” Prem Rawat

On this final morning of Amaroo 2024, 13th September, Prem strongly encouraged everyone to take advantage of the opportunity and need to put the practice of Knowledge into action. He suggested that we don’t need our concepts to feel the beauty of the divine. We are a part of that river that flows stating “your shape may be different, but your content isn’t.” 

He opened the session up to those who wanted to express themselves to him, with smiles and wisdom he welcomed the range of love shared. 

A surprise to all, at the end the morning session, including Lem Lasher, the former TimelessToday CEO was an award from Prem in appreciation of his efforts.

Session 8 of the 5-day event is now available in the Amaroo 2024 Bundle on the website: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/product/bundle/95f259c1-c6eb-4eba-aa70-21151e9ab275/?utm_source=WA&um_medium=org
