b30c57a6-621b-423d-b8d2-0bfaae982a42.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #56  (20 मई,, 2020)
b30c57a6-621b-423d-b8d2-0bfaae982a42.Description:
"मैं अपना संबंध अंधेरे से नहीं, प्रकाश से बनाना चाहता हूं। मैं अपना संबंध मौत से नहीं, जीवन से बनाना चाहता हूं।" —प्रेम रावत

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

b3335bda-2304-4615-80d0-1d2859a8d99d.Name: उन्नति
b3335bda-2304-4615-80d0-1d2859a8d99d.Description: जिस चीज की मनुष्य को जरूरत है, सबकुछ उसके पास है। सारी आशाओं का कुंआ, मनुष्य के अंदर पहले से ही है।

b337abf6-41d1-4f30-86f8-d56b7c1f0334.Name: Lockdown with Prem Rawat, Day 35
b337abf6-41d1-4f30-86f8-d56b7c1f0334.Description:
“Lockdown” 35: A personal message from Prem Rawat.


“Keep things simple. Keeping things fluid. Be that tree that knows how to sway in the wind and not break in the wind.” — Prem Rawat


If you have questions you would like Prem to respond to, please send them to PremRawat.com via the contact page.

b368e3dc-f8b0-43ef-8272-3f9cd122d362.Name: Journey to the Self - Part 2
b368e3dc-f8b0-43ef-8272-3f9cd122d362.Description:
An Audience with Prem Rawat is a brand-new series of audio podcasts from the 2017 World Tour.

Listen to Prem Rawat offer his unique perspective on the pathway to peace and how we can all reconnect with our essential humanity, in the face of seismic global change.

In conversation with a new host at each event, Prem explores different themes of self-discovery, as well as answering burning questions from the audience.

In a way that only Prem Rawat can do, you will see that the answers are never far away.

b37a42ef-11d8-4059-9592-fb10dcaa78a6.Name: Festival of Colors
b37a42ef-11d8-4059-9592-fb10dcaa78a6.Description:
Holi 2022 with Prem Rawat


The traditional Indian Festival of Holi marks the arrival of spring and, more importantly and timely, celebrates the victory of good over evil and moving forward in difficult times.

Pre-show: From start to 27 minutes

Prem Rawat: starts at 27 minutes and goes to 50 minutes

Post-show: From 50 minutes and ends at 58:47


Access this On-Demand message in Hindi with English translation with a Classic or Premier subscription. In addition, translation into French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Spanish and Tamil will be available as soon as possible.

A 3-min. excerpt of this full-length video with English subtitles is also available on Prem's Official YouTube Channel. Enjoy, share and subscribe. YouTube.com/PremRawatOfficial

Give the gift of a TimelessToday subscription to friends and family to enjoy this inspiring message and unlimited access to all premium content, including LiveStreams, Full-length Videos and Audios, On-Demand Replays, Series, Global Virtual Events and much more.

b3eaec99-0123-4425-b49f-14fc1d286bdd.Name: Maximize Preciousness
b3eaec99-0123-4425-b49f-14fc1d286bdd.Description: Learn to accept the beauty within you.

b42d71cd-16b1-43cd-99e8-ed031868c7cc.Name: Good vs Pleasant
b42d71cd-16b1-43cd-99e8-ed031868c7cc.Description:
Prem Rawat in Raipur On February 23, 2025, Prem Rawat returned to Raipur, India, after 14 years, to deliver a powerful message about knowing how to live, peace and the subtleties of our breath.

Stay informed by joining the TimelessToday mailing list.

b47d18bb-4200-4c63-9a5d-5b2ae960c9e7.Name: A Solitary Passenger
b47d18bb-4200-4c63-9a5d-5b2ae960c9e7.Description:
Prem Rawat in San José, Costa Rica


In a first for Costa Rica, Prem Rawat brought his engaging perspective to San José, addressing challenges we all face. He compared having a limited time on Earth to visiting the “Beach of Life.” Giving a simple antidote to disappointment, he shared insights as to what we truly need to thrive.

b48b245c-f51a-45c1-832f-87039e43e9fa.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #38  (30 अप्रैल, 2020)
b48b245c-f51a-45c1-832f-87039e43e9fa.Description:
"एक तरफ जो हम करते हैं उससे तो यही स्पष्ट लगता है कि हम कभी, कहीं नहीं जा रहे हैं, परंतु यह सत्य नहीं है एक दिन सबको जाना है और इसकी क्या तैयारी है ? इस बात को सामने रखते हुए हम किस प्रकार अपने व्यवहारों को बदलते हैं ?" —प्रेम रावत (30 अप्रैल, 2020)

b4b0897a-f61a-49f2-82dd-86a043dc9fda.Name: खोज किसकी
b4b0897a-f61a-49f2-82dd-86a043dc9fda.Description: असली चैन मनुष्य को तभी मिलेगा जब उसके अंदर का दीया जलेगा। जब तक अंदर का दीया नहीं जलेगा तब तक तुम्हारे मन के अंदर प्रकाश नहीं होगा।

b4f2025c-2f38-4081-ae55-edc4f9dd1893.Name: A Most Memorable Event
b4f2025c-2f38-4081-ae55-edc4f9dd1893.Description: Prem Rawat has traveled the globe and met with world leaders for over fifty years. His most memorable encounter might surprise you.

b51ed64e-7d2a-4751-a51f-3d4bdc9ae872.Name: A Powerful Force
b51ed64e-7d2a-4751-a51f-3d4bdc9ae872.Description: There is a force that is keeping you alive.

b545dccc-6a2c-4992-9570-12b4678c98ef.Name: Your Time
b545dccc-6a2c-4992-9570-12b4678c98ef.Description: Having clear priorities will dictate how you spend your time. Spend it wisely! Enjoy this 5-minute excerpt by Prem Rawat.

b55b64c5-7baf-47cf-b0af-8624b0001b85.Name: Session 3, Amaroo 2024
b55b64c5-7baf-47cf-b0af-8624b0001b85.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


Session 3 occurred on Tuesday evening, 10th of September, with Prem excited to share a wide range of stories that illustrate his compelling message. He told a story about a young man who asked a wise man, “What happens when we die?” The response was, “That’s not a question with an answer.” Prem assured the audience that devotion is a natural outcome of an individual's effort. It is a compelling, powerful session.

b5a4ffdf-b3dd-4d23-a0c5-f328dc8534f2.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #28  (20 अप्रैल, 2020)
b5a4ffdf-b3dd-4d23-a0c5-f328dc8534f2.Description:
"सपना क्या है और असलियत क्या है ? असलियत है कि तुम जीवित हो, और जो कुछ तुम्हारे इर्द-गिर्द हो रहा है, वह असलियत नहीं है। असलियत यह है कि तुम इस समय जीवित हो और तुम्हारे अंदर अविनाशी विराजमान है। " —प्रेम रावत (20 अप्रैल, 2020)

यदि आप प्रेम रावत जी से कोई प्रश्न पूछना चाहते हैं, तो आप अपने सवाल PremRawat.com (www.premrawat.com/engage/contact) के माध्यम से भेज सकते हैं।

b65134f9-3b04-4e10-892e-f2c0263af7d9.Name: The Expert
b65134f9-3b04-4e10-892e-f2c0263af7d9.Description: If you are quick to anger, or to get stressed, anxious, or upset, then you must practice those feelings often. Is it time to change your strategy and practice something positive?

b6b12abf-03a7-4e0c-8704-c001c94fe9f8.Name: Hans Jayanti Celebration 2018
b6b12abf-03a7-4e0c-8704-c001c94fe9f8.Description:
Hans Jayanti LiveStream REPLAY


Throughout history, there have been teachers who have shown people how to uncover the peace within them. November 8th marked the 118th birth anniversary of one such beloved teacher, Shri Hans Ji Maharaj, who was also Prem Rawat’s father, in a celebration known as Hans Jayanti.

Catch the Replay of this extraordinary celebration of the tradition connecting Shri Hans Ji Maharaj and Prem—and teachers and students for generations—in the experience of personal peace.

b6cb75c9-48b8-4a87-99a2-c08acea17059.Name: कहानियों का महत्व
b6cb75c9-48b8-4a87-99a2-c08acea17059.Description:
एक बातचीत प्रेम रावत जी के साथ


इस साक्षात्कार में प्रेम रावत ने कहानियों के महत्व पर जोर दिया, जो मानव संबंध का एक साधन है, जो कल्पना को जगाता है और एक दिल से दूसरे दिल तक संदेश पहुँचाता है। वह कहते हैं कि जबकि आधुनिक मनोरंजन आसानी से उपलब्ध है, सच्ची कहानी सुनाना मन और दिल को जोड़ता है, जिससे समझ और विचार-विमर्श की वृद्धि होती है।

b711edaf-cf48-4357-b8ff-8ffc34f16d6b.Name: If You Want to Win
b711edaf-cf48-4357-b8ff-8ffc34f16d6b.Description: If you can in your life embrace that which is good, then that’s all you need to do. You don’t need to go chase the wrongness and say get out of here, you don’t need to do that.

b714aab7-ed8c-425f-90ca-a83c72691602.Name: Finding Peace... In You (Trailer)
b714aab7-ed8c-425f-90ca-a83c72691602.Description:
Prem Rawat in Medellin, Colombia


After 52 years of war and conflict in Colombia, relief came in 2016 as both sides agreed to a peace treaty, initiating a series of reconciliation efforts and a chance to rebuild. With the inclusion of the Peace Education Program, Prem’s message is now reaching hearts across the country—bringing hope for a new era of peace, transformation and understanding.

While in Medellin, Prem discusses the perspective of good and bad, shares the simple answer to finding peace, and talks about the value of what lies within each of us.


Available in the Events section of the TimelessToday app and website.

b755cb2a-e41d-4dfd-b7d8-77edb581ccdb.Name: Lockdown with Prem Rawat - Day 8
b755cb2a-e41d-4dfd-b7d8-77edb581ccdb.Description:
“Lockdown” Day 8, a personal message from Prem Rawat addressing these trying times.


“This is really a good time to give each other some respect, some space, some empathy, some sympathy when it’s necessary, an understanding—and appreciate each other’s company. When you appreciate, something beautiful actually takes place.” — Prem Rawat

b7ecbdb8-6425-4503-9c18-18ce0d34c73a.Name: 50th Anniversary Day 1
b7ecbdb8-6425-4503-9c18-18ce0d34c73a.Description:
2016 Amaroo, Australia


For the past 50 years, Prem Rawat has been focused on one simple goal – to communicate his message of peace to as many people as possible.  His efforts have been relentless and the results have been extraordinary – but never as extraordinary as this past year. Indeed, in 2016, Prem reached more people than ever before.

In September 2016, 4,500 of these people attended a five-day event with Prem at the Ivory’s Rock Conference and Event Center (aka Amaroo) in Australia. By all accounts, the event was a most remarkable one.

Today, in honor of the holiday season and the many requests we’ve received, we are happy to announce the launch of an online 50th Anniversary Gift Set.  This comprehensive collection includes nine of Prem’s addresses from the 5-day celebration with material not seen before on TimelessToday.  It also features many of the extraordinary stories he told in Amaroo from the Mahabharata – a classic Indian epic infused with enduring principles still relevant today.

Written by Mitch Ditkoff

b8183a02-8a16-48e8-942d-30e0a5c8da20.Name: Prem Rawat's Peace Education and Knowledge (PEAK)
b8183a02-8a16-48e8-942d-30e0a5c8da20.Description:
As human history has evolved, there was a point where people began to realize there’s a level of consciousness beyond day-to-day thinking. What has been missing for most of us is an awareness of a practical, heartfelt way to go beyond our limitations, assumptions, and habits. One might say it is our life’s purpose to know and experience peace and gratitude.

Prem Rawat’s Peace Education and Knowledge (PEAK) program engages you in his practical approach, free for all interested in exploring a journey to personal peace. TimelessToday, Prem’s media company, is proud to deliver the PEAK mobile app. Packed with videos and designed to be self-paced, PEAK is available at no charge on the TimelessToday app from the Apple AppStore or Google Play Store.


You can also find plenty of free content on the TimelessToday app and website, including audios and videos of Prem addressing live audiences. In addition, a TimelessToday subscription provides access to Prem Rawat’s livestream events and other premium content.

b863a206-5047-476b-b3a6-2eb276807d4f.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #26  (18 अप्रैल, 2020)

"सुख और शांति में यह अंतर है कि जिसके पास शांति है, उसके पास एक बहुत ही अद्भुत सुख है और वह सुखी है। परन्तु जो सुखी है, उसके पास जरूरी नहीं कि शांति भी है।" —प्रेम रावत (18 अप्रैल, 2020)

b8883573-08c7-4f2e-b85c-ade3529da5dd.Description: जो यहां के नागरिक हैं, जबतक वो जिम्मेवारी नहीं लेंगे और वो समझेंगे कि ऐसी सरकार आए, जो उनके सारे प्रॉब्लम्स को सॉल्व कर दे, वो कभी होगा नहीं।

b88eec99-474a-4199-accd-a5a24e3306a4.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #10 (2 अप्रैल, 2020)

b8S4hzz19KY.Name: The Good Within: Prem Rawat in Kuala Lumpur
b8S4hzz19KY.Description:
Prem Rawat returned to Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia on October 12, 2025, with a thought-provoking question: "If you don't know what ‘good’ is, how will you know you're having a good day?" His insights encouraged listeners to move past the worries and struggles of daily life to something profound — the simple act of breathing and the life story it sustains.

"When you wake up in the morning, give yourself a boon to remember this breath, to remember the kindness that's inside of you, to give yourself a boon of joy." Prem Rawat 

The full video is available for TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

b8bfd7a6-0952-44ef-91b2-a9ee7f7d5c6e.Description: Prem talks to radio hosts Zizo and KCi about the true purpose of his travels around the globe: to share a message that will cause people to think for themselves, “Peace has always been inside me.”

b8f3f68f-c999-4275-8d5a-6e0a495ab6fa.Name: संवाद : पी.टी.सी. न्यूज के साथ (PTC News Interview)
b8f3f68f-c999-4275-8d5a-6e0a495ab6fa.Description: बुरा समय भी आता है, अच्छा समय भी आता है। जब बुरा समय आता है तो एक बात का ख्याल रखो — एक दिन यह जाएगा।   श्री प्रेम रावत, पी.टी.सी न्यूज़ के साथ संवाद

b907fec0-5572-4956-9c32-49521d274d15.Description:
Birthday Celebration with Prem Rawat


"The satisfaction is when you find yourself, when you see yourself...when you are no longer in this mysterious state where you exist, but you don’t know why you exist." —Prem Rawat

On December 9, 2020 Prem Rawat spoke from the heart during two live sessions of “Celebrating Life”––one in English and one in Hindi––which were broadcast worldwide to all TimelessToday subscribers.



On-Demand Replay Now Available (English)

bba6f17b-8362-4126-af0d-69e06f49d478.Name: 125th Hans Jayanti Celebration
bba6f17b-8362-4126-af0d-69e06f49d478.Description:
Session 2: Prem Rawat in Delhi At the second session of the 125th Hans Jayanti celebration in Delhi, Prem Rawat explored the crucial difference between imagination and reality, with his message reaching 15,000 online viewers worldwide via TimelessToday. Using the tragic 2025 Air India crash as an example, he explained that people tend to live in imagination but are unprepared when reality strikes. He distinguished between imagined peace that the world chases and true peace that comes from knowing the divine within. Prem Rawat emphasized that reaching the divine essence within - which even the greatest spiritual masters meditate upon - is actually easy, not difficult. What's needed is a true teacher who provides knowledge and practical guidance until one’s last breath, not speeches. He described two prisons: one with physical bars and the prison of ignorance. True freedom comes from experiencing the divine within one's heart. This is the time to experience joy and to fulfill one’s life with love, knowledge and bliss.

125th Hans Jayanti Celebration with Prem Rawat in Delhi • 81 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

bbd71b45-1dfb-4c79-aec6-a0a68f6bfdce.Name: 125th Hans Jayanti Celebration
bbd71b45-1dfb-4c79-aec6-a0a68f6bfdce.Description:
Session 3: Prem Rawat in Delhi In the third session of the 125th Hans Jayanti celebration, Prem Rawat inspired the audience toward life's true purpose. He explored three essentials of personal transformation: service, genuine listening and the daily practice of Self-Knowledge. He emphasized that authentic service comes from a direct relationship with one's teacher, not institutional duty, and that true listening means letting a message reach the heart — not just collecting words. Addressing our tendency to make excuses, he noted how people claim they're too busy to practice the techniques of Self-Knowledge taught by Prem Rawat, yet somehow find time when self-interest is involved. He concluded powerfully: "The day you stop making excuses — with the world, with yourself — to not practice this Knowledge, and start making excuses to practice Knowledge, that day everything will change for you." In a captivating fusion of tradition and innovation, Prem Rawat unveiled his musical compositions — Indian devotional songs reimagined through cutting-edge technology. The third session electrified over 15,000 viewers on the TimelessToday app and those gathered in person, with these timeless melodies transformed into stunning new arrangements that bridged centuries of spiritual heritage with modern sound.

125th Hans Jayanti Celebration with Prem Rawat in Delhi • 56 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

Against the breathtaking backdrop of the Himalayan foothills, people gathered on April 23rd to listen to Prem Rawat, whose connection with Nepal spans decades since his first visit in 1974. A virtual audience of 7,700+ was also present. 

With uplifting clarity, Prem spoke about the journey toward self-fulfillment through knowing one's heart. He emphasized that the self-Knowledge he offers is a practice – one that requires dedication and deserves the highest priority in each individual’s life.

His message resonated with those in attendance, enriching countless lives across Nepal and around the globe.

c324171a-8eca-4ade-b750-fe2c296af43a.Name: The Season of Peace
c324171a-8eca-4ade-b750-fe2c296af43a.Description:
An excerpt:

People say, “There’s so much greed in this world.” Yes, there is! But why is there greed? Why is there greed? You think human beings are only capable of greed? No, human beings are also capable of generosity.

I just want the wind to blow so you can fly the kite. I want the river to run. I want the well to be full of water, so you can be in the glory of a human being—the glory of a human being. The flower that blooms, blooms! Petals open, colors vibrant, beauty unmatched, fragrance, hypnotizing. Bloom! That’s what needs to happen!

Know! Know that the peace dwells in your heart, not because I said it, but because you felt it. That’s knowing. Know that that Divine dwells in your heart, not because I said it—because you felt it, not one day, not two days, not three days, but all your life. This is the realm. There is no time—there is no “young”; there is no “old.” It is the same for everyone.

When spring comes, it comes the same for everyone—like a baby, a hundred-year-old, a fifty-year-old, forty, thirty, twenty. It comes for everyone in the same way. When the summer comes, it is the same way. When it is fall, it is the same way. When it is the winter, it is the same way.

Let the season of peace come in your life. The time has come. The time has come; let the season of peace come in your life.

- Prem Rawat

c33e72d6-7b42-46c2-9216-7cb7d3985f9c.Name: Elegant, Beautiful & Simple

c3e85704-4b16-4746-90f0-0b6fba95e6aa.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #55  (19 मई,, 2020)
c3e85704-4b16-4746-90f0-0b6fba95e6aa.Description:
"जो भी मैं अपने जीवन में करूं, मैं एक चीज को ध्यान में हमेशा रखूं कि मेरी खुशी बाहर से नहीं आएगी, मेरी खुशी मेरे अंदर से आएगी। मेरी शांति बाहर से नहीं आएगी, मेरी शांति मेरे अंदर से आएगी।" —प्रेम रावत

प्रेम रावत जी "पीस एजुकेशन प्रोग्राम" कार्यशालाओं की वीडियो श्रृंखला को आप तक प्रस्तुत करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं। इस दौरान हम उनके कुछ बेहतरीन कार्यक्रमों से निर्मित लॉकडाउन वीडियो आप के लिए प्रसारित करेंगे।

c3f73184-ddae-4407-8d67-bbd4c882883d.Name: अपनी छुट्टी का मज़ा लो (Apni Chutti Ka Maza Lo)
c3f73184-ddae-4407-8d67-bbd4c882883d.Description: बनाने वाले ने तुमको धूल होने से छुट्टी दी है, तुम अपनी छुट्टी का मज़ा ले रहे हो या नहीं ?

c58d278b-dde2-4378-b64c-63bd1beed0b2.Name: 120 वां हंस जयंती महोत्सव 2020
c58d278b-dde2-4378-b64c-63bd1beed0b2.Description:
120 वां हंस जयंती महोत्सव 2020 प्रेम रावत जी के साथ | ऑन-डिमांड सम्पूर्ण वीडियो केवल टाइमलेस टुडे पर


इस वर्ष, हम आंतरिक शांति के श्रद्धेय शिक्षक और प्रेम रावत जी के पिताश्री, श्री हंस जी महाराज की 120 वीं वर्षगांठ मनाते हैं।

हमारे हिंदी दर्शकों के लिए, प्रेम रावत जी के सदेश का सम्पूर्ण ऑडियो और वीडियो अब टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप और वेबसाइट पर सदस्यता के साथ देखने के लिए उपलब्ध है। इस ऑन-डिमांड वीडियो या ऑडियो को आप किसी भी समय देख सकते हैं।

सदस्यता है तो यह सुनिश्चित करें कि आप अपने अकाउंट में लॉग इन हैं।

इस विशेष महोत्सव को मानाने के लिए टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप, वेबसाइट और यूट्यूब पर एक 38 मिनट का अंश निशुल्क उपलब्ध रहेगा। इस वीडियो का आनंद लें और प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चॅनेल पर सब्स्क्राइब करें।


सम्पूर्ण ऑडियो और वीडियो अब उपलब्ध

c6933971-d30d-418f-9a18-ddcd7bec9c52.Name: Author Event with Prem Rawat
c6933971-d30d-418f-9a18-ddcd7bec9c52.Description:
Livestream Replay | Book Launch and Guinness World Records Holder Ceremony


Following a typhoon that hit Lucknow, India only days before Prem Rawat’s Author Event on April 2, 2023, over 114,000 people gathered for the launch of the Hindi version of his book, “Hear Yourself.” An additional virtual audience of 8,923 logged in from 86 countries, and Anjan TV also shared the celebration.

The bestselling author read from his “Hear Yourself” book, Chapter 3: “Ground Yourself in Infinite Peace,” in Hindi, and answered questions from the Indian actress, Bhagayashree, who joined him on stage.

The author’s heartfelt words, based on decades of experience, emphasized the importance of finding one’s own joy and peace within, no matter the situation, and how this is humankind’s greatest possible achievement.

Surprising the audience at the end of the event, an adjudicator from Guinness World Records came on stage and announced that Prem Rawat had smashed the 2018 prior record for the largest audience attending a single author’s reading. Congratulations, Prem Rawat!

cIZCj1b43zg.Name: Ek Ek Pal Ki Planning Kijiye - एक एक पल की प्लैनिंग कीजिए - Prem Rawat
cIZCj1b43zg.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization

cQDpdx0bDsg.Name: अंतर्दृष्टि, प्रेम रावत जी, काठमांडू में (एक अंश)
cQDpdx0bDsg.Description:
हिमालय की मनोरम पहाड़ियों की गोद में, 23 अप्रैल को एक अद्भुत दृश्य देखने को मिला। सैकड़ों लोग श्रद्धा और उत्सुकता से एकत्रित हुए थे, क्योंकि वे सुनने आए थे श्री प्रेम रावत जी को—जिनका नेपाल से जुड़ाव कई दशकों से चला आ रहा है। पहली बार वे 1974 में यहाँ आए थे, और तब से यह संबंध और भी गहरा होता गया है। 

श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने अपनी प्रेरणादायक स्पष्टता के साथ आत्म-संतुष्टि की यात्रा पर प्रकाश डाला—एक ऐसी यात्रा जो अपने हृदय को जानने से शुरू होती है। उन्होंने इस बात पर जोर दिया कि आत्मज्ञान केवल एक विचार नहीं, बल्कि एक अभ्यास है—एक ऐसा अभ्यास जो समर्पण मांगता है और प्रत्येक व्यक्ति के जीवन में सर्वोच्च प्राथमिकता का हकदार है।

उनका संदेश वहाँ उपस्थित लोगों के दिलों में गूंज उठा—सिर्फ नेपाल में ही नहीं, बल्कि पूरी दुनिया में, जहाँ अनगिनत जीवन इस प्रेरणा से समृद्ध हुए। यह केवल शब्दों की गहराई नहीं थी, बल्कि एक अनुभव था—जो आत्म-खोज और आंतरिक शांति की ओर प्रेरित करता है।

cb5e4b8e-1a31-4db8-82b5-214f1eaaf3eb.Name: Practice Life
cb5e4b8e-1a31-4db8-82b5-214f1eaaf3eb.Description:
Prem Rawat in Ljubljana, Slovenia Prem Rawat’s inspiring book “Breath: Wake Up to Life,” newly released in Slovenian, Croatian, Bosnian and Serbian, was the backdrop to a captivating event with the author in Ljubljana, Slovenia on July 9th. Prem delivered his profound, simple and clear message for audiences across the Balkans. The evening began with the lights dimmed and MC and storyteller Mrs. Tjaša Koprivec Vuga setting the stage for Prem's powerful address. During his talk, Prem emphasized that knowing and practicing life has nothing to do with our jobs, relationships or daily responsibilities. "The world that's inside is similar but different," he told the audience. "It’s where peace can happen. It doesn’t happen in the outside world." The author touched on how even the United Nations' definition of peace never once takes into account what all humanity in every nation has in common – this breath. Rather than offering abstract definitions, Prem focused on encouraging people to actually feel peace and discover that clarity for themselves

“Practice Life” • Prem Rawat in Ljubljana, Slovenia • 62 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

On September 13, 2020, Prem Rawat delighted over 13,000 Hindi speaking viewers worldwide with his public address in Hindi during this TimelessToday livestreamed event. A small, live audience was present and maintained social distancing.

Prem shared vivid stories from which he extracted age-old wisdom, making them relevant to people living in today’s world.

This timeless message, that the God that people are looking for can be found within inside, is told here in a new and powerful way.

Two pre-recorded radio interviews were shown during the broadcast.


On-demand Replay of Prem Rawat Livestreamed from the UK

ccd35677-59e4-415c-b458-5b6ada4e624e.Name: The Silence in You
ccd35677-59e4-415c-b458-5b6ada4e624e.Description:
Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain In this powerful presentation in Barcelona, Spain, Prem Rawat connects with the audience in the hall and more than 8,000 individuals joining remotely, encouraging them to explore what true intelligence really means and how to recognize it in one’s lifetime. Rather than settling for unproven promises about the afterlife, he invites us to discover "the heaven here," emphasizing that without inner peace, we create outer conflict. Through vivid analogies – from helicopter pilots reading wind patterns to the subtle power hidden in our breath – he illustrates how self-knowledge begins with awareness of our own breathing

Learn more about how knowing yourself can transform everything you gather from life. 

“The Silence in You” • Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain • 65 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

cde6760b-b22d-44c0-a460-b7ca4b5a0ea8.Name: Amaroo 2018! (Trailer)
cde6760b-b22d-44c0-a460-b7ca4b5a0ea8.Description:
5-Day conference, Queensland, Australia.


Last September for five full days, thousands of people from every corner of the globe came together with Prem on a pristine patch of land in Queensland, Australia to unplug, unwind—and make the most of a unique opportunity to focus on the essentials of living a fulfilled life.

Immerse yourself as Prem shares his keen perspective on everything from the epic stories of the Mahabharata to love and relationships in our times. There are personal exchanges with audience members that surface practical life hacks and piercing insights…and far-ranging talks that shed new light on the life we’ve been given…all infused with Prem’s candor, warmth and humor.


Amaroo 2018 consists of 9 episodes and will be released one episode at a time every week for nine weeks, starting March 9th. 

Don't have the access needed to watch or listen to all 9 episodes? Find more information on https://www.timelesstoday.tv/amaroo2018/

ce103d46-abf9-4c41-955d-c7c4a5dd4ecf.Name: Session 9, Amaroo 2024
ce103d46-abf9-4c41-955d-c7c4a5dd4ecf.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


Amaroo 2024 drew to a close on the evening of 13th of September.

Prem continued to provide the opportunity for individuals to express their love and tell a little bit about their journey in preparing to reach Australia.

In some of the examples, health, death and various challenges were shared and Prem passionately listened and responded.  He reminded everyone of his philosophy saying “There is only a little control you have whilst you’re alive. So, find the Divine, hug the Divine, and hang onto the Divine.”  

As the evening wrapped up, he encouraged everyone to remember the lessons learnt, stay healthy and more events will be forthcoming.

d6ef89d2-82c0-4c8b-8967-a3b334b8111b.Name: 125th Hans Jayanti Celebration
d6ef89d2-82c0-4c8b-8967-a3b334b8111b.Description:
Session 1: Prem Rawat in Delhi At the 125th Hans Jayanti celebration in Delhi, Prem Rawat addressed approximately 50,000 attendees, offering profound insights on the essence of life and the importance of self-knowledge. Using a simple yet powerful analogy, he explained that just as reading a cookbook doesn't satisfy hunger, merely reading religious scriptures doesn't bring spiritual fulfillment. Real experience is necessary. He emphasized that human life is a priceless opportunity that won't come again, and must be taken full advantage of. Prem Rawat stressed the invaluable nature of breath, saying it is so precious that all the wealth on earth cannot pay for even one breath. Explaining the importance of a teacher, he said that giving knowledge is the master’s responsibility, but practicing it is the student's. He called for making life successful through listening and the practice of self-knowledge. Challenging the audience to recognize what they truly possess within themselves, he used the metaphor that everyone has a "bundle of jewels" but hasn't opened it to see what's inside. He stressed that this lifetime is singular - not two, three or four  — and when the day of departure comes, no relatives, siblings or friends will accompany anyone. Therefore, one must know oneself, recognize this life and make it successful.

125th Hans Jayanti Celebration with Prem Rawat in Delhi • 63 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

d735f4ec-5ddf-47ed-93bb-e53035ce1eb6.Name: Fernando Trezza interviews Prem Rawat (Part 1)
d735f4ec-5ddf-47ed-93bb-e53035ce1eb6.Description:
Part 1: Brazilian Association of Community Channels, Sao Paulo, Brazil


In Sao Paulo, Brazil, the Words of Peace television series had been airing for over ten years reaching over 10 million homes in the city of Sao Paulo and over 40 million homes in all of Brazil. To celebrate this milestone in 2013, Fernando Mauro Trezza, President of the Brazilian Association of Community Channels, sat down with Prem Rawat to ask him about his work, his message and why peace matters.

Fernando Mauro Trezza: "For many people today, peace seems to be a boring subject. Can this perspective be changed?" 

Prem Rawat: "Of course, because they're coming from a concept of what peace is. They're not coming from the need. They have to feel the need."

d7b93d18-b274-40b8-8f68-f6c5129f1ba3.Name: Session 1, Amaroo 2025
d7b93d18-b274-40b8-8f68-f6c5129f1ba3.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Amaroo, Australia More than 2.000 people gathered once again in Amaroo for this year’s 5-day retreat and focused on what the heart needs to soar. The opening session with Prem Rawat did just that: with his wit, wisdom and recently written and produced music tracks (shared only with Amaroo attendees at this time), he encouraged everyone to apply what they learn in Amaroo to their everyday life. The peace educator and renowned storyteller shared the American Psychological Association's definition of 'joy' - a deep sense of well-being that differs from happiness, can persist through difficult times and often remains invisible to others.

Watch anytime with your Classic or Premier subscription.

d7ee9048-b927-41d5-a786-980731a9390d.Name: A Worry-Free Room
d7ee9048-b927-41d5-a786-980731a9390d.Description: Without peace, the world is going to come apart. A fundamental part of being human is to be able to feel a certain sense of comfort. This is what’s good for life—all life.

d83718b2-6a4c-4ac7-ae9a-a3e6575cc944.Name: Discover Your Forever
d83718b2-6a4c-4ac7-ae9a-a3e6575cc944.Description:
Prem Rawat in Miami-Hollywood, FL From start to finish, Prem Rawat's public event offered compelling wisdom that nourishes the heart and quiets the mind. "I'm not trying to be mystical," he explained. "If you feel that your breath is mystical, you missed the point completely." Instead, he invited the audience to recognize the magnificent gift of being alive right now — to discover the infinite within the most obvious, down-to-earth miracle: the breath that sustains you. A powerful reminder that what we seek isn't distant or complex, but a beautiful simple feeling that is always present.

• Prem Rawat in Miami-Hollywood, FL • 63 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website.

da71487e-41b2-4d77-8fbb-cb12c4e9cc70.Name: Session 4: 124th Hans Jayanti Celebration
da71487e-41b2-4d77-8fbb-cb12c4e9cc70.Description:
Replay of livestream with Prem Rawat in Delhi, India. In his closing address at the 124th Hans Jayanti Celebration in Delhi, Prem Rawat shared heartfelt memories from his youth, recalling moments spent with his father and revered teacher, Shri Hans Ji Maharaj. These memories served as a reminder of the values and legacy that have shaped his journey and relentless effort to reach more and more people with his message of peace. Prem emphasized once again, the need to transform society to ensure that women are respected and granted the dignity they deserve. He highlighted the stark reality of a world where systems often profit from human suffering — wars generate profit, the healthcare industry can thrive on illness, and technology is frequently used to distract rather than uplift. Amid these concerns, he urged individuals to be conscious, make wise choices, and avoid falling prey to societal traps. Concluding his address, he inspired the audience to “take his words from their ears to their heart,” urging them to let it resonate within their hearts. This, he shared, requires a thirst for understanding and clarity of purpose.

With your  TimelessToday subscription  — Premier (video) or Classic (audio) — you have full access to all of Prem Rawat’s premium content, including livestreams, replays, popular series and multilingual content.

Prem Rawat at the Die Duine Primary School, Cape Town Flats


Beset by violence, Cape Town Flats has been a star in learning to use the Peace Education Program to transform their community towards peace. On Saturday, August 15, 2020, Prem Rawat reached a global audience in real time, connecting his unique message to living a life fulfilled.

Asking the question, “Do I enjoy my life?” he talked about recapturing the heart of a child––the innocence that is still there, in spite of all of the changes.

The broadcast begins with an engaging, uplifting slideshow with music tracks, and segues into four segments with Prem, including a Q&A on a wide range of topics that matter most.

dd724263-5c37-4ff6-ad4a-88157b787dae.Name: REPLAY of Prem Rawat's LIVE New Year's Day
dd724263-5c37-4ff6-ad4a-88157b787dae.Description: The TimelessToday App team is acutely aware of the frustration people felt in trying to access the New Year’s Day LiveStreams.  The team has spent many hours diagnosing the issues and are now repairing, upgrading, and addressing the breakdown by:   Improving the way the app loads to handle the large number of users that connect to LiveStreams at the same time. Making the background infrastructure scale automatically and smoothly to handle high capacity loads. The groundswell of positive support from you — for the app and more precisely its content — has been an inspiration to the whole team. So many of you have expressed your support, appreciation, and good wishes for its success.  We thank you for your patience and appreciate your feedback and insight. We are committed to making this app something that’s a joy to us.

dda5144c-7d2b-4ae9-821d-3eabb3f0dafe.Name: Celebrating 55 Years!
dda5144c-7d2b-4ae9-821d-3eabb3f0dafe.Description:
On July 31st, a live audience came to Southern California to celebrate an incredible milestone with Prem Rawat.

On this date In 1966, a young Prem stepped forward after his father’s sudden passing to continue Shri Hans’ work. Now 55 years later, Prem Rawat’s passion and commitment to bringing peace to anyone interested has not changed.

Thousands of vIrtual attendees in 72 countries were also fortunate to be part of the livestream celebration. Prem’s illuminating understanding of human existence always surprises and delights. He poked fun at societal norms and presented extraordinary possibilities life has in store when we take the courageous steps to know ourselves.


LiveStream Replay of Celebration Event with Prem Rawat  |  English

ddd3c8c8-c863-4866-ac37-b7066108aae5.Name: Prem Rawat in Paris (Trailer)
ddd3c8c8-c863-4866-ac37-b7066108aae5.Description:
Straight from “the city of love”: We’re thrilled to release the recording of Prem speaking to a packed audience at Le Casino de Paris this June about the self-love and peace that come with self-knowledge. Here is Prem in conversation with author and lecturer Florence de Vulpillières as well as addressing the audience directly as he explores the universal themes in his book Quand le désert fleurit (“When the desert blooms”), and what it takes for a heart—and life—to blossom.


With author and lecturer Florence de Vulpillières

deaDJdjIUI8.Name: Amaroo 2024 Session 3 (A glimpse)
deaDJdjIUI8.Description:
"We forget the importance of this breath. Does anybody set an alarm to remember how important this breath is?" Prem Rawat

Session 3 occurred on Tuesday evening, 10th of September, with Prem excited to share a wide range of stories that illustrate his compelling message. He told a story about a young man who asked a wise man, “What happens when we die?” The response was, “That’s not a question with an answer.” 

Prem assured the audience that devotion is a natural outcome of an individual's effort. It is a compelling, powerful session.

Session 3 of the 5-day event is now available in the Amaroo 2024 Bundle on the website: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/product/bundle/95f259c1-c6eb-4eba-aa70-21151e9ab275/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

dff4e06e-0155-4f0f-b03d-c80e07df384b.Name: Feel Your Thirst
dff4e06e-0155-4f0f-b03d-c80e07df384b.Description:
Prem Rawat in Colombo, Sri Lanka On October 18, 2025, Prem Rawat returned to Sri Lanka after seven years to address a fundamental human need: peace. Speaking to an audience in Colombo, he challenged the idea that the divine exists somewhere outside of us, pointing instead to what's already present: the breath, which he called a blessing and a reminder of life itself. He encouraged the audience to feel their thirst for peace, joy and clarity first and then to recognize that true contentment comes from turning within and experiencing the self.

“Feel Your Thirst” • Prem Rawat in Colombo, Sri Lanka • 64 min. Replay • Tap/click the “cc” icon to activate in the app/website.

djd5THkx7Hs.Name: विश्वास की बजाय अनुभव को चुनिए... पथ प्रदर्शक Prem Rawat | 'स्वयं की आवाज़' पर चर्चा | Sahitya Tak
djd5THkx7Hs.Description:
#premrawat #premrawatbhajan #hearyourselfbook #swayamkiawaaz #sahityatakshabdrathi #premrawatbook #authorinterviews #peace #experience #sahityatakbookcafe #sahityatak #sahityaaajtak  #ep53

इंसान के भीतर ही शांति का वास होता है, इसे बाहर ना खोजें... यह बात कही थी महात्मा बुद्ध ने. वैसे तो हर इंसान दुनिया में शांति तलाश करता है. सुकून की तलाश में दर-दर भटकते हुए वह क्या कुछ नहीं करता. मसलन पाठ-पूजा करना, दान करना, सेवा करना, और भी बहुत कुछ. मगर बहुत से लोगों को फिर भी मनचाही शांति हासिल नहीं हो पाती. अगर आप इसका कारण ढूंढेंगे तो वह कहीं बाहर नहीं, आपको स्वयं में ही मिलेगा. ऐसा हम नहीं कह रहे, ऐसा कह रहे हैं जाने-माने आध्यात्मिक गुरु, पथ प्रदर्शक, अध्यापक प्रेम रावत. प्रेम रावत एक विश्वविख्यात आध्यात्मिक गुरु हैं, जिनके प्रवचन से न जाने कितने ही लोगों की ज़िंदगी में रौशनी आई है. 
प्रेम रावत का जन्म 1957 में हुआ. आपके पास जीवन की अपनी असाधारण यात्रा का 55 से अधिक वर्षों का अनुभव है. एक विलक्षण प्रतिभा-सम्पन्न बालक से, 70 के दशक की एक मशहूर किशोर हस्ती से, इक्कीसवीं सदी के अन्तर्राष्ट्रीय शांतिदूत तक की अपनी यात्रा में प्रेम रावत ने करोड़ों लोगों को असाधारण स्पष्टता, प्रेरणा और जीवन की गहरी सीख दी है. यह कहना मुश्किल है कि वे कहां निवास करते हैं? अमेरिका में, योरोप में, एशिया में या अपने प्रशंसकों के बीच. दुनिया भर की यात्राओं के बीच 'दि प्रेम रावत फाउन्डेशन के संस्थापक' की भूमिका में उन्होंने लाखों लोगों के जीवन को प्रभावित किया है. 
साहित्य तक स्टूडियो में प्रेम रावत अपनी अंग्रेज़ी की पुस्तक  'Hear Yourself- How To Find Peace In A Noisy World' के हाल ही में प्रकाशित हिंदी संस्करण 'स्वयं की आवाज़- शोर भरी इस दुनिया में शांति कैसे पाएं' पर बातचीत करने आए थे. इस पुस्तक के बारे में ग्रैमी पुरस्कार विजेता, गायक और गीतकार माइकेल बोल्टन कहते हैं कि 'जीवन के बारे में प्रेम रावत की गहरी समझ, मुझे उन सभी प्रश्नों के उत्तर प्रदान करती है, जिन्हें मैं दशकों से तलाश रहा था. यह किताब पाठकों को शांति पाने के लिए प्रेरित करती है- उसे इस अशांत दुनिया में तलाश करने के बजाय, अपने अंदर पाने का एक व्यावहारिक तरीका और विवेक प्रदान करके, उन्हें तृप्ति देती है.'  
निश्चित तौर पर यह पुस्तक आपको खुद मिलाने की कोशिश करती है, और निस्संदेह इसमें सफल भी होती है. आज साहित्य तक स्टूडियो में बुक कैफे के खास कार्यक्रम 'शब्द-रथी' के लिए अतिथि के तौर पर मौजूद थे आध्यात्मिक गुरु, पथ प्रदर्शक प्रेम रावत. वे हार्पर हिन्दी से प्रकाशित अपनी पुस्तक पर चर्चा के साथ ही मनुष्यता पर अपने विचारों के साथ  उपस्थित थे. पुस्तक'स्वयं की आवाज़- शोर भरी इस दुनिया में शांति कैसे पाएं' में कुल 233 पृष्ठ हैं और इसका मूल्य 299 रुपए है. सुनिए चर्चित पथ प्रदर्शक प्रेम रावत से वरिष्ठ पत्रकार जय प्रकाश पाण्डेय की यह खास बातचीत, सिर्फ़ साहित्य तक पर.

Sahitya Tak - Welcome to the rich world of Hindi Literature. From books to stories to poetry, essays, novels and more, Sahitya Tak is a melting pot where you will keep abreast of what's the latest in the field of literature. We also delve into our history and culture as we explore literary gems of yesteryears from Surdas, Kabir, Tulsi, Bhartendu, Premchand, Prasad, Nirala, Dinkar, Mahadevi, etc. To know more about how literature shapes our society and reflects our culture subscribe to Sahitya Tak for enriching stories, poems, shayari, ghazals, kawali and much more. drjnB5kubyE.Name: "Courage with Clarity" Day 2: Birthday Celebration with Prem Rawat
drjnB5kubyE.Description:
“There are many kinds of courage. But you have to have the right kind of courage, the courage that is clear, devoid of false information.” - Prem Rawat

On the second day of his birthday celebration in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Prem Rawat emphasized the importance of a specific kind of courage. This type of courage plays a crucial role in preserving clarity in our life. It is this courage that becomes essential in maintaining how we perceive and experience life. 

You can now watch or listen to the replay of Day 2 in English anytime, anywhere with your TimelessToday® Classic or Premier subscription: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/231210-kualalumpur-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

e49662dc-b477-4431-9644-65fcfaf1a1d5.Description:
Colombo, Sri Lanka


While in Sri Lanka, Prem sheds light on peace: What is it? Where does it come from? How is it possible? Do you recognize it’s already within you? Additionally, due to his work through the Peace Education Program, Prem was presented a scroll of appreciation from the inmates at Welikada Prison, the largest prison in Sri Lanka.

His message continues to spread hope and illumination across the globe—peace is possible.

e53fef6a-0517-4cc9-8527-0684717167c3.Name: Session 3, 50th Anniversary
e53fef6a-0517-4cc9-8527-0684717167c3.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration series


For the past 50 years, Prem Rawat has been focused on one simple goal – to communicate his message of peace to as many people as possible.  His efforts have been relentless and the results have been extraordinary – but never as extraordinary as this past year. Indeed, in 2016, Prem reached more people than ever before.

In September 2016, 4,500 of these people attended a five-day event with Prem at the Ivory’s Rock Conference and Event Center (aka Amaroo) in Australia. By all accounts, the event was a most remarkable one.

Today, in honor of the holiday season and the many requests we’ve received, we are happy to announce the launch of an online 50th Anniversary Gift Set.  This comprehensive collection includes nine of Prem’s addresses from the 5-day celebration with material not seen before on TimelessToday.  It also features many of the extraordinary stories he told in Amaroo from the Mahabharata – a classic Indian epic infused with enduring principles still relevant today.

e6dff632-adaa-47c1-9d79-f860da594026.Name: A Ride Called Life
e6dff632-adaa-47c1-9d79-f860da594026.Description: Human concepts about God are often the very thing that prevent a real sense of connection with our Creator.

e830c372-0be2-4396-8a06-07a6f9a023e9.Name: The Power of the Individual
e830c372-0be2-4396-8a06-07a6f9a023e9.Description: Jeremy Gilley, whose efforts led to Peace Day–a global ceasefire and commitment to non-violence on 21 September–sits down with Prem for a heart to heart.  The two discuss the urgency of reversing climate change and shifting our thinking from a "they" mentality to empowerment–both collectively and as individuals–to do something!  Whether it’s loving like there’s no tomorrow or simply appreciating this beautiful planet we call home, today we look at what peace means to each one of us around the world, and how we can make Peace Day, every day.

eLGycC6oQT4.Name: LiveStream from Mirzapur, India
eLGycC6oQT4.Description:
The excitement from the surprise of a world record reading by Prem Rawat still resonates and continues on to Mirzapur. The global press coverage of the Guinness World Records achievement is a reflection on how good news, which has been the focus of Prem’s life work, can still be heard around the world.

With Prem Rawat, it is never about the number of people hearing his message of personal peace, but it is about the heartful quality that resonates within each individual.

We can’t forget the highly successful launch of the “Hear Yourself” book, with the Hindi version now available, which began in Lucknow and continues in Mirzapur on Sunday, April 9, 2023 at 10:00 a.m. IST. Mirzapur is a city situated on the banks of the Ganges River, surrounded by hills and forests. 

Watch it on the TimelessToday app or website: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

eb90df1e-5647-4176-89a3-cefb91fcb587.Name: Today: The Bright Future
eb90df1e-5647-4176-89a3-cefb91fcb587.Description:
Prem Rawat in São Paulo, Brazil | English The highly anticipated 2024 tour of South America culminated in an uplifting event in São Paulo, Brazil on March 30, 2024. According to Prem Rawat, the promise of living a fulfilled life depends on accessing the heart. He urged attendees to live for today and to let go of the conflicts and pain from the past, while avoiding projecting them into the future. He reminded the audience that the promise of true fulfillment can’t be proven, but it can be experienced. “You have to be ready to feel,” he said.

All livestreams and replays from the South American tour are free in Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese until April 15, 2024; then you can continue to enjoy them any time, as many times as you like with a TimelessToday® Classic or Premier subscription.

ebd76559-ae3f-443a-8f5d-37c660f8407b.Description: Know the difference between knowledge and wisdom. Know yourself, your strength. Garner empathy, not sympathy.

ebf212d2-066f-4e43-bfc2-a8ca112c9c3f.Name: Wild Wise Women - Part 2
ebf212d2-066f-4e43-bfc2-a8ca112c9c3f.Description: There are 3.4 million people living in Cape Town these days – South Africa’s second most populous city. On May 9th 2016, three of its lively citizens met with Prem Rawat for a few hours of spirited conversation. A hearty shout out to Lumka Ngxoli, Robin Lee Pretorius, and Fluffy O’Panda – delightful hosts of Assembly Radio’s Wild Wise Women show – for their insightful and entertaining interview. It all happened – the laughter, the banter, and the extraordinary rapport – at Assembly Radio, an online media outlet that caters to a trendy listening audience of 10,000 15-35 year olds. The interview, both hilarious and profound, is one you will not soon forget. Written by Mitch Ditkoff

Saturday 4 August 2012

August 29, 2010.

edfd2947-0cda-4f5c-be01-8a3295ffdf41.Name: Involuntary Learning
edfd2947-0cda-4f5c-be01-8a3295ffdf41.Description:
Prem Rawat in London, UK Prem Rawat’s Author Event in London on July 20, 2025 was focused on a powerful and simple reminder of what truly matters. In a world often marked by turbulence, he said that people have tried for centuries to bring peace to this world, yet no one has succeeded. “But the world within?” he said. “With just a little effort and understanding, you have peace.” He stated that he was not an inspirational speaker, but rather someone offering a practical, life-changing opportunity to feel the beauty in being alive and know gratitude every day.

“Involuntary Learning” • Prem Rawat in London, UK • 72 min. Enjoy any time on the TimelessToday app/website

ee269279-06eb-4c6c-a41a-900df354ccb6.Name: Session 2, 50th Anniversary
ee269279-06eb-4c6c-a41a-900df354ccb6.Description:
Amaroo 2016 Celebration Series


In September of 2016, over 4,500 people from around the world accepted Prem Rawat’s invitation to gather at Ivory’s Rock Conference Center in the Australian outback.

During this first morning session on September 20, 2016, Prem Rawat reminded the in-person attendees that this was not an ‘event,’ but rather a celebration of 50 years of helping people thrive through self-discovery.

Prem Rawat has clearly worked tirelessly to preserve the sanctity of what he teaches. Seeing the potential in people, he helps them realize it and experience it every day. This is why he does what he does.

He spoke to the innate thirst and need in every human being for clarity. He said, “If you did not have this want for clarity in your life, you would self-destruct.” Profoundly, he reminded the audience that, in order to play the role of a human being, you need wisdom and clarity.

ef7c509e-67d4-4b50-9182-e5b21452df6a.Description: जो भी मैं अपने जीवन में करूं, मैं एक चीज को ध्यान में हमेशा रखूं कि मेरी खुशी बाहर से नहीं आएगी, मेरी खुशी मेरे अंदर से आएगी। मेरी शांति बाहर से नहीं आएगी, मेरी शांति मेरे अंदर से आएगी।

ef8d9c8c-5967-41fe-8ffe-60fa2591de12.Name: The Student’s Reality
ef8d9c8c-5967-41fe-8ffe-60fa2591de12.Description:
One-liner: Prem Rawat in Tokyo, Japan | English The opportunity to listen deeply was extended to the 5,930 livestreamed viewers across 75 countries and to a small audience in Tokyo, Japan, on October 22, 2023. For more than 70 minutes, Prem Rawat spoke passionately about the profoundness and grace of simply being alive. He described the importance of having a warrior-like focus, not on improving the world around us, but by being a student of life to become a better person. Distilled to the simple truth that peace is a human necessity, his message evokes a joy in learning, regardless of the challenges we face.

Subtitles in English are available on the video above. Tap or click the “cc” icon to activate.

Prem Rawat at InfoSys, Pune, India. April 7th 2018


Prem Rawat was invited by InfoSys on April 7th, 2018, to address the business consultants and staff at their campus in Pune, India. His message was not only geared towards each individual in attendance but also pertinent to today’s corporate world. The convention was titled ‘The Business of Life’.

InfoSys Limited is an Indian multinational corporation that provides business consulting, information technology and outsourcing services. (Source: Wikipedia)

f1e55203-c06b-485c-8059-7c2d3d5deafe.Name: Celebrating 54 Years
f1e55203-c06b-485c-8059-7c2d3d5deafe.Description:
Teaching Inner Peace


Prem Rawat honors the age-old tradition in India of celebrating the connection between student and teacher.

This year marks the 54th anniversary of Prem becoming a teacher of self-knowledge at the age of eight. Prem’s commitment to humanity’s well-being stands in bright contrast to the fears of so many during the Covid-19 pandemic. His simple and powerful message reminds all of us to experience “this world within—the true world.”

f76d3f10-21f2-4e00-984c-8d1135b02eab.Name: Session 5, Amaroo 2025
f76d3f10-21f2-4e00-984c-8d1135b02eab.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Amaroo, Australia On September 10th, participants from around the world came together at the beautiful amphitheatre in Amaroo, Australia and through a global livestream — for Prem Rawat's AUSpicious Connection training. "If you don't know how to live life, perhaps you should first experience what knowledge is, because knowledge is taking you back to those fundamentals of being alive." The celebrated peace educator talked about the unique connection between Master and student. On a related matter of trust, he said “When you allow what’s being said to go to your heart, it becomes harmonious. It becomes real. This is the vessel in which all that is so beautiful resonates.”

An excerpt from Session 5 (September 10, Afternoon Session) is available. Purchase and watch the complete session at IntelligentExistence.com (until March 31, 2026).

f7a023ba-bb88-4ef2-9344-f5c906801ea3.Name: A Strategy for Life
f7a023ba-bb88-4ef2-9344-f5c906801ea3.Description: There is no shortage of advice on having a life plan and suggestions on how to gain what we want. In this short audio clip, Prem Rawat neatly encapsulates his perspective.

f7b40ba4-d88e-4b08-ad71-bb88fece46cb.Name: संवाद: 94.3 FM Radio One के साथ
f7b40ba4-d88e-4b08-ad71-bb88fece46cb.Description: हम अपनी जिंदगी को कैसे सुंदर बनाएं, क्योंकि वो सुंदरता, जिसका हम ख़्वाब बाहर देखते हैं, वह पहले से ही हमारे अंदर है।

f8191a72-197a-45f8-89db-ac296fe65dd9.Name: Lockdown with Prem Rawat - Day 9
f8191a72-197a-45f8-89db-ac296fe65dd9.Description:
“Lockdown” Day 9, a personal message from Prem Rawat addressing these trying times.


“What have you got? Take a look at the basics: You have life, this wonderful thing called ‘existence’. You are! You can feel. You can understand. You have a heart. You still favor kindness over hate, joy over pain, clarity over doubt—because of who you are...a human being.” — Prem Rawat

f86e463b-e630-4176-9b3e-43dc7487d07a.Name: Session 4, Amaroo 2025
f86e463b-e630-4176-9b3e-43dc7487d07a.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Amaroo, Australia Prem Rawat began his AUSpicious Connection training with a masterful lesson in perspective. Powerful images shared on the stage showed how tiny we are compared to the physical world around us. Prem explained if you reduced the sun to a marble, Earth would measure barely 0.009 centimeters across. Yet through his signature blend of warmth and wisdom, he transformed this humbling reality into pure inspiration: though we may be tiny in the cosmic scheme, our ability to choose remains extraordinarily powerful.

An excerpt from Session 4 (September 10, Morning Session) is available. Purchase and watch the complete session at IntelligentExistence.com (until March 31, 2026).

f90b18ad-499f-4cf4-86be-67500d741cb5.Description: Denmark’s renowned media host Helle Solvang interviewed Prem Rawat for the Danish Broadcasting Corporation. Prem offered a compelling outlook on the tipping point that can occur when human beings express their need for peace.

f9803852-0b40-4116-930c-9970709b7cd1.Description: Home is not always a place. Often, home is a feeling. When we practice coming home to ourselves, we can start living in peace.  This is an excerpt from Prem Rawat's address in Medellin, Colombia.

f9e41816-5795-4d3d-95af-2fa339b6c771.Name: Amaroo 2018 Episode 8
f9e41816-5795-4d3d-95af-2fa339b6c771.Description:
Amaroo 2018 Series - Episode 8


“Treat truth as the truth—and the dream as a dream,” notes Prem in Episode 8 of Amaroo, “and your life will be untangled.”

On the last day of the international retreat in Australia last year, Prem shined a light on the difference between reality and fantasy, and what it takes to lead a life of joy, clarity and purpose.

Immerse yourself in Episode 8 for a one-of-a-kind reality check.

fAtLnMjKTaM.Description:
An entertaining and insightful address in which Prem Rawat speaks about the importance of knowing the key elements in a person’s life, rather than focusing on ideas of what might bring peace and fulfillment.
Hualien, Taiwan. Saturday 12 April 2014.

fNs_5M0eG-k.Name: Sara Sidner interviews Prem Rawat on CNN
fNs_5M0eG-k.Description:
In this interview, CNN’s Sara Sidner describes Prem Rawat as “perhaps the most famous speaker in the world that you may have never heard of.”

She discusses with Prem his NY Times bestseller “Hear Yourself - How to Find Peace in a Noisy World” while giving context to how Prem Rawat’s lifelong commitment to helping individuals know peace inside, has not been without challenges.

For over half a century now he's traveled the world to speak about how humans can access peace inside and why that is so important.

fYPnTC6ErSU.Name: Today: The Bright Future (Prem Rawat in São Paulo)
fYPnTC6ErSU.Description:
The highly anticipated 2024 tour of South America culminated in an uplifting event in São Paulo, Brazil on March 30, 2024.

According to Prem Rawat, the promise of living a fulfilled life depends on accessing the heart. He urged attendees to live for today and to let go of the conflicts and pain from the past, while avoiding projecting them into the future.

He reminded the audience that the promise of true fulfillment can’t be proven, but it can be experienced. “You have to be ready to feel,” he said.

Enjoy the 58-minute full-length address on TimelessToday app or website:
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/240330-sao-paulo-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

fa2af5d2-122f-4961-95f8-5cc29a5eacee.Name: लॉकडाउन प्रेम रावत जी के साथ  #36  (28 अप्रैल, 2020)

fa3ccb65-de44-49f8-bab9-0ad4739304b6.Name: Hope: Opportunity Accepted
fa3ccb65-de44-49f8-bab9-0ad4739304b6.Description:
On November 4, 2023, the Arabic version of Prem Rawat’s bestseller, “Hear Yourself,” was launched in Dubai, UAE, during an historic gathering and Q&A. This inspiring author event was also livestreamed around the world to over 7,000 viewers. 

One of the core themes during the event was the necessity for a life full of self-discovery, even in the midst of our challenges and distractions.


Now you can enjoy the wisdom offered during this hour-long replay with your TimelessToday® Classic or Premier subscription.

fa3f5e10-a2b1-4da9-af05-514a3811ef1f.Name: Lockdown with Prem Rawat, Day 31
fa3f5e10-a2b1-4da9-af05-514a3811ef1f.Description:
“Lockdown” 31: A personal message from Prem Rawat.


“One day at a time, feel good. Be well. Be safe. Understand the importance of now.” — Prem Rawat


If you have questions you would like Prem to respond to, please send them to PremRawat.com via the contact page.

fa6dd88f-1343-45b7-a3b1-d31107a8226d.Name: Prem Rawat in Mirzapur, Nov. 19
fa6dd88f-1343-45b7-a3b1-d31107a8226d.Description:
Replay of Livestream with Prem Rawat from Mirzapur, India


The vision of a large rock 40’ x 40’ x 40’ that would land on each human without warning was Prem Rawat's theme throughout the evening to inspire urgency in our lives. Thousands gathered in Mirzapur in person, while a virtual audience of more than 7,700 listened to Prem’s every word of wisdom and guidance. The two day event will conclude early Sunday evening at the same location.


You can now watch or listen to the replay of this event at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription.

fb441cf6-fb14-46e6-970d-25d981cde9ba.Name: The Instrument
fb441cf6-fb14-46e6-970d-25d981cde9ba.Description: The human being is an incredibly sensitive experiencing instrument. Contentment, peace, joy...these are the notes of this instrument. When you play it right, that’s what happens.

fb5ec8e7-4dd6-42e1-9b3a-f607946fc60e.Name: हृदय की चाहत
fb5ec8e7-4dd6-42e1-9b3a-f607946fc60e.Description: हम अज्ञानता के पिंजरे में बंधे हुए हैं, सशंय के पिंजरे में बंधे हुए हैं। तो यह हृदय रूपी चिड़िया जो उड़ना चाहती है यह कैसे उड़ेगी ?

fb8554dd-b1d5-477d-96e1-720f75a7535c.Name: शांति की ओर
fb8554dd-b1d5-477d-96e1-720f75a7535c.Description: उस शक्ति का अनुभव करना, साक्षात अनुभव करना — मन से नहीं, ख्यालों से नहीं, साक्षात अनुभव करना — उससे फिर शांति उभरती है। क्योंकि मनुष्य उस चीज का अनुभव कर रहा है, जिसका कि वह एक हिस्सा है और जिसकी कोई हद नहीं है।

fbf9b17c-28e5-49e7-b5ea-913bb31e6082.Name: Rain Will Come!
fbf9b17c-28e5-49e7-b5ea-913bb31e6082.Description:
Seeds know that it will rain, but they don’t know when. And when it does, they bloom.   Excerpted from video of Prem in Paris.


 Full audio or video also available in the Events section of the app and website.

fc3d5c9a-fdea-42e4-8bc4-368b68a534f5.Name: बत्ती जलाओ, अंधेरा मिटाओ
fc3d5c9a-fdea-42e4-8bc4-368b68a534f5.Description: जब प्रकाश होगा तो तुम देख पाओगे! जब तुम देख पाओगे तो तुम्हारे संशय अपने आप दूर होंगे।

fc8e2a01-4b12-4741-a555-4061691056df.Name: कामयाबी (Kaamyaabi)
fc8e2a01-4b12-4741-a555-4061691056df.Description: जिस दिन आपने चलना हासिल कर लिया, उस दिन आपने अपने आपको एक ऐसा तोहफा दिया, ऐसी कामयाबी पायी कि आपने संसार में एक ताला ऐसा खोल दिया कि अब आपके पास स्वतंत्रता थी कि आप जहां जाना चाहें, आप जा सकते हैं।

fcc9d223-6155-470f-a00f-f9b466d3f8dc.Name: The Peace Wall
fcc9d223-6155-470f-a00f-f9b466d3f8dc.Description: Prem Rawat’s 'Peace is Possible' campaign included recently working with world-famous street artist Eine, whose artwork was gifted to President Obama by the Prime Minister of the U.K.  Ben Eine invited Prem Rawat to view the striking mural he had created on Ebor Street, Shoreditch, London.  While meeting Prem, Eine took the opportunity to explain why he chose to paint the phrase ‘Peace Is Possible’ - an important statement at a time when London and other cities across the UK are experiencing a rise in youth violence.  Watch the short film about Eine and Prem...

ff03b8a9-c69a-4538-b83d-05b728d01f77.Name: Session 5, Amaroo 2024
ff03b8a9-c69a-4538-b83d-05b728d01f77.Description:
5-Day conference with Prem Rawat in Ivorys Rock, Australia


On the afternoon of 11th of September, Prem asked Paul Bloomfield, who manages the Public Relations Office,  to provide the Amaroo attendees with a global perspective about the on-going efforts that he has inspired.

From Cuba to Soweto, Malaysia to Johns Hopkins University in Baltimore, Maryland, the story is compelling and to a significant degree understated.

Paul invited a range of speakers including TPRF team members, Dr.Raj Mukherjee, Neurosurgeon, the list goes on and on to share their experience. 

The afternoon concluded with Amy Bloomfield singing a heartfelt song for those in attendance.

ff3363a3-d61b-40c1-a0bf-86af71be0617.Name: What This World Needs
ff3363a3-d61b-40c1-a0bf-86af71be0617.Description:

ff6f5788-3708-41ae-9e0a-57a0dd432591.Name: Project: Gratitude
ff6f5788-3708-41ae-9e0a-57a0dd432591.Description:
with Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain


Of all the things we could be grateful for, there is one gift that stands alone. Enjoy Prem’s unique perspective on gratitude, appreciation—and the power keeping us alive. You may never look at this moment called “now” in quite the same way afterwards.

ff85e0c8-c127-43bd-ad0a-772eccbca8ea.Name: Truth So Amazing
ff85e0c8-c127-43bd-ad0a-772eccbca8ea.Description:
LiveStream Replay from Brighton, UK


This European Author Event took place on October 9, 2021 in front of a live audience at the Brighton Centre in Brighton, UK, while viewers from around the globe attended the livestream.

With characteristic clarity and compassion, Prem Rawat engaged his audiences on matters dealing with life and death and the wisdom needed to enjoy the obvious. 



You can now enjoy this On-Demand Replay of Prem sharing his insights in Brighton with a Classic or Premier subscription. 

Enjoy Prem’s daily reminders of how to live life consciously in his Thought for the Day.

fffc2a7c-aa32-493e-af6a-6fa63a813646.Description:
LiveStream Replay from Paris, France


An evening with Prem Rawat at the Palais des Congrès de Paris was filled with words of wisdom to fill the human heart. The bestselling author offered attendees (live and virtual) a “Paris exclusive” — simplify one’s life by doing only one thing at a time, with the intention of enjoying everything you do. 

Prem also recommended structuring one’s life so that the desire for peace is truly recognized and will bring a person closer to themselves. 



You can enjoy Prem’s full-length address on TimelessToday’s On-Demand Replay with your Classic or Premier subscription.

fiNOzs-KNu0.Description:
Bhajan - Paani Mein Meen Piyasi - पानी मैं मीन पियासी 

पानी में मीन पियासी, मोहि सुन सुन आवत हाँसी।।

1.आतमज्ञान बिना नर भटके, कोई मथुरा कोई काशी।
जैसे मृगा नाभि कस्तूरी, बन बन फिरत उदासी।।

2. जल विच कमल कमल विच कलियाँ, तापर भँवर निवासी।
सो मन बस त्रयलोक भयो है, यती सती संन्यासी।।

3. विधि हरिहर जाको ध्यान धरत है , मुनिजन सहस अठासी।
सो तेरे घट माहिं बिराजे, परम पुरुष अविनासी।।

4. है घट में पर दूर दिखावे, दूर की बात निरासी।
कहैं कबीर सुनो भाई साधो, गुरु बिन भरम न जासी।।

g1s669iitrk.Name: घूँघट के पट खोल रे I Ghoonghat Ke Pat Khol I Kabir Bhajan
g1s669iitrk.Description:
घूँघट के पट खोल रे,
तोहे पिया मिलेंगे।

घट घट मै तेरे साईं बसत है,
कटुक बचन मत बोल रे।
घूँघट के पट खोल रे,

धन जोबन का गरब ना कीजे,
झूठा इन का मोल
घूँघट के पट खोल रे,

जाग यतन से रंग महल में,
पिया पायो अनमोल।
घूँघट के पट खोल रे,

आसन से मत डोल।

कहत कबीर सुनो भाई साधों,
अनहद बाजत ढोल।
घूँघट के पट खोल रे,

g4XZpLXmbac.Name: Amaroo 2024 Session 9 (A glimpse)
g4XZpLXmbac.Description:
“This begins with you – and ends with you. And that’s the greatest thing. If you can realize that, then that’s the greatest thing that’s ever happened – to you! Not to other people, you! Just you!” Prem Rawat

Amaroo 2024 drew to a close on the evening of 13th of September.  Prem continued to provide the opportunity for individuals to express their love and tell a little bit about their journey in preparing to reach Australia. In some of the examples health, death and various challenges were shared and Prem passionately listened and responded.  

He reminded everyone of his philosophy saying “There is  only a little control you have whilst you’re alive. So, find the Divine, hug the Divine, and hang onto the Divine.”  

As the evening wrapped he encouraged everyone to remember the lessons learnt, stay healthy and more events will be forthcoming.

Session 9 of the 5-day event is now available in the Amaroo 2024 Bundle on the website: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/product/bundle/95f259c1-c6eb-4eba-aa70-21151e9ab275/?utm_source=WA&um_medium=org

gCugMRUODMI.Name: Yaad Rahega Ahsaan - याद रहेगा अहसान
gCugMRUODMI.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization

gXlKEKhhAHg.Name: सबसे बढ़िया फैशन
gXlKEKhhAHg.Description:
"एक फैशन है, जिसे कहते हैं "ज़िन्दगी", जिसे कहते हैं, "जीना", और वो है प्रकृति का सबसे बढ़िया फैशन। उस फैशन को अपनाओ और अपने जीवन को सफल बनाओ।" —प्रेम रावत

सच्ची चेतना और असली प्रेम दिल से आता है, न कि दिखावे या ट्रेंड से। ध्यान या मैडिटेशन का भी ट्रेंड बन जाता है, लेकिन मन कहीं और होता है। असली जीवन जीने का सबसे बेहतरीन तरीका प्रकृति के फैशन को अपनाना है। सच्चा प्यार चीजों या उपहारों से नहीं, बल्कि हृदय से होता है, और इसे जबरदस्ती नहीं किया जा सकता। असली प्रेम उस से करो, जो जीवन भर तुम्हारा साथ न छोड़े।

gwCeyWH30E0.Name: Uncover Life: Prem Rawat in Buenos Aires - Saturday Evening Program (March 28, 2026)
gwCeyWH30E0.Description:
What if the weight you're carrying isn't yours to bear? In this refreshingly candid and deeply human talk, which includes questions from viewers, Prem Rawat tackles life's most universal struggles with equal parts wisdom and wit.

“Have a heart full of gratitude – not by force or logic, but from a feeling.” Prem Rawat

Drawing on ancient storytelling and turbulent airplane flights alike, Prem Rawat invites us to stop dwelling on our wrongs and turn toward what we actually have. His take on grief is breathtaking in its simplicity. His perspective on guilt will make you laugh before it makes you think. And joy? Not something you chase – something you uncover.

Warm, funny and utterly unfiltered, Prem’s perspective doesn’t ask you to change your life – it asks you to live it fully.

The full video is available for TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

h5TIa9ZWTcc.Description:
“To be able to fly in the land of your heart towards peace, towards joy, and uncover the treasures that exist within you – this is what has to happen!”  Prem Rawat

The Korean edition of bestseller "Hear Yourself" was launched on October 10, 2024, at an author event hosted by the publisher, Mrs. Kim of Daedong Field Publishing.

Prem Rawat, the book's author and renowned peace educator, answered questions and spoke passionately about the potential of self-awareness to create positive change.

Emeritus Professor Kim, while interviewing Prem, discussed many challenges facing South Korea and other nations, such as depression, isolation and stereotypes. Kim also expressed hope that the introduction of Prem’s Peace Education Program to South Korean prisons would provide empirical measures of its psychological impact.

i3jh9tzl8Z0.Description:
Story of a monk and young man about the most valuable things in life.
.........

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Mr. Prem Rawat to address people interested in personal peace. Prem Rawat offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in prisons across the country. His messages has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization.
Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Stay in touch:

https://rajvidyakender.org/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/rajvidyakender3
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rajvidyakender

ibO46op_NoM.Name: ख़यालों की दुनिया से परे
ibO46op_NoM.Description:
"वो तब भी था जब तुम नहीं थे। वो तब भी है जब तुम हो, और वो तब भी रहेगा जब तुम नहीं रहोगे।" - प्रेम रावत

जो शक्ति हर कण में मौजूद है, वो हमारे शरीर और अस्तित्व से परे है—हमारे होने से पहले थी, अभी है, और हमारे बाद भी रहेगी। हम इस शक्ति से कभी अलग नहीं हो सकते, पर हमारी इच्छाएँ और ख़यालात इससे भिन्न होते हैं। इसे खयालों या कल्पनाओं से नहीं, बल्कि अपने हृदय में अनुभव किया जा सकता है। यही असली समझ है जिसे जानने और पहचानने की जरूरत है।

टाइमलेस टुडे® ऐप्प या वेबसाइट पर इस अंश के सम्पूर्ण संस्करण का आनंद लें:

इस कॉपीराइट सामग्री का पुनरुत्पादन या वितरण करना अवैध है।

izn3l_FA-xs.Name: लेखकीय कार्यक्रम - श्री प्रेम रावत जी के साथ
izn3l_FA-xs.Description:
"स्वयं की आवाज़", पुस्तक विमोचन: रविवार, 2 अप्रैल, 2023, शाम 6:30 बजे (IST), लखनऊ से सीधा प्रसारण, TimelessToday ऐप्प या वेबसाइट पर 

हिंदी में : https://www.timelesstoday.tv/230402-lucknow-hi-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des
अंग्रेजी अनुवाद सहित : https://www.timelesstoday.tv/230402-lucknow-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

हम बड़े हर्ष के साथ सूचित कर रहे हैं कि श्री प्रेम रावत जी के लेखकीय कार्यक्रम का सीधा प्रसारण, टाइमलेस टुडे वेबसाइट एवं ऐप्प पर उपलब्ध होगा। इस कार्यक्रम में वह अपनी पुस्तक "स्वयं की आवाज़" का विमोचन भी करेंगे।

भारत में उत्तर प्रदेश की राजधानी लखनऊ से यह कार्यक्रम रविवार, 2 अप्रैल, 2023 को भारतीय समयानुसार शाम 6:30 बजे टाइमलेस टुडे पर सीधा प्रसारित किया जाएगा।

हमें बड़े पैमाने पर दर्शकों के व्यक्तिगत रूप से भाग लेने की अपेक्षा है और क्लासिक और प्रीमियर सदस्य कहीं से भी लॉग-इन कर सीधे प्रसारण का आनंद ले सकते हैं।

समय क्षेत्र जाँचे: https://info.timelesstoday.tv/streams-and-replays-hi-3/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

सदस्यता जल्द ही समाप्त हो रही है? नवीनीकरण के लिए अंतिम क्षण तक प्रतीक्षा न करें!

यह सीधा प्रसारण समकालिक अंग्रेजी, फ्रेंच और स्पेनिश अनुवाद के साथ हिंदी में होगा ।

यदि आपसे सीधा प्रसारण छूट जाता है, तो 48 घंटों के भीतर पुनः प्रसारण सभी क्लासिक और प्रीमियर सदस्यों के लिए भरपूर आनंद लेने के लिए उपलब्ध होगा । अन्य भाषाएं भी जल्द उपलब्ध होंगी।

टाइमलेस टुडे की ऐप्प के व्यवस्थान (सेटिंग) में अधिसूचना (नोटिफिकेशन) चालू करना सुनिश्चित करें।

jFinqJwymyA.Name: Livestream with Prem Rawat in Barcelona
jFinqJwymyA.Description:
Sunday, June 29, 2025 | 6:00 P.M. CEST (4:00 P.M. UTC)

Preparations are underway in Barcelona, Spain for Prem Rawat’s next 2025 speaking engagement. Over decades of sharing his message of personal peace, he has addressed audiences in Barcelona on at least 23 occasions. There’s never been a more important time to hear Prem’s message.

Last year in Barcelona, Prem offered a compelling analogy: life is like packing for a vacation. Just as you carefully select what to put in your suitcase to ensure an enjoyable trip, you must be thoughtful about what you carry with you throughout life. "Did you pack well?" he asked his audience, encouraging them to reflect on the choices that shape their journey.

In English with French, Hindi, Italian and Spanish translations

Join us on TimelessToday and enjoy with subscription: 
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/livestream/96

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Mr. Prem Rawat to address people interested in personal peace. Prem Rawat offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace. k845byCwFWg.Name: Prem Rawat | Hear Yourself: How to Find Peace in a Noisy World | Talks at Google
k845byCwFWg.Description:
Renowned teacher and author Prem Rawat discusses his book "Hear Yourself: How to Find Peace in a Noisy World", where he teaches us how to turn down the noise to “hear ourselves”—to listen to the subtle song of peace that sings inside each of us. Once we learn to truly “hear ourselves” and the voice of peace within, then we can hold on to that as we face all the noise of the world.

Prem Rawat is the founder of the Prem Rawat Foundation, where he works with people from all walks of life, showing them how to experience the source of peace within themselves. His work spans six decades of international effort to bring a practical message of hope, happiness, and peace to all, one person at a time. He is the internationally bestselling author of Peace Is Possible and is also a pilot, photographer, classic car restorer, father of four children and grandfather of four.

Get the book here: https://goo.gle/39nMZ0N.

For more information on Prem, please visit https://www.premrawat.com/.

Moderated by Prem Tiwari.

k8BM6NULHBk.Name: जिंदगी में प्यार और दया का एहसास होना | Feeling Love and Kindness in Life | Prem Rawat | Jaano
k8BM6NULHBk.Description:
प्यार का एहसास रहना चाहिए
दिल में जो हो कोई बात, कहना चाहिए
दूसरों के दर्द को समझ कर जीवन में   
दया के भाव में रहना चाहिए

प्यार एक भावना है… प्यार में जीवन की ख़ूबसूरती है, प्यार में स्वतंत्रता है, सच्चे प्यार में विश्वास है... असल मायने में प्यार किसी शर्त का मोहताज़ नहीं होता… सच्चे प्यार का मतलब लेना नहीं, बल्कि देना होता है… प्रेम रावत जी कहते हैं, प्यार जिससे है उससे सब स्वीकार होता है … प्यार के कई रूप हैं... जिसमें से एक रूप मार्गदर्शक का भी है. मार्गदर्शक, एक ऐसा दोस्त होता है, जो हमें अपने जीवन में सही रास्ते पर चलने में मदद करता है… आज उनका शांति का सफर कई दशकों से निरंतर चल रहा है और उनका प्रयास है कि हम जान पाएं की हम कौन हैं और हमारे इस जीवन का सही मकसद क्या है? उनके सन्देश के ज़रिये हम अपने अंदर बसे प्यार, दया और करुणा को समझने का प्रयास करते हैं.  

इंसान, इस जीवन को पूरी तरह से समझे, इसका पूरा आनंद ले. अपने जीवन के प्राण यानि इस स्वांस की कीमत को समझे और अपने जीवन को सफल बनाए...  यहाँ तक की अगर ज़िन्दगी का आखिरी पन्ना भी है, तो उसके अंदर एक संतुष्टि का भाव हो, एक सुकून हो की वो जीवन के आनंद से दूर नहीं रहा...  जीवन की इस समझ को अपने अंदर लाने में प्रेम जी के सन्देश मदद करते हैं. 

श्री प्रेम रावत एक प्रसिद्ध लेखक और अंतर्राष्ट्रीय वक्ता हैं। वह पिछले पांच दशकों से अधिक समय से दुनिया भर में मानवता और भलाई का अपना संदेश पेश कर रहे हैं। उनके संदेशों ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को जीवन की मूलभूत आवश्यकता के बारे में बेहतर समझ और स्पष्टता प्राप्त करने में मदद की है।

► प्रेम रावत के बारे में अधिक जानने के लिए: https://www.premrawat.com
► यूट्यूब चैनल - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCeuG...

वीडियो पसंद आए तो दूसरों के साथ शेयर करना न भूलें।
