m83RjbbP68A.Name: दाता तेरा मेरा प्यार कभी ना बदले | भजन मदन गोपाल | Madan Gopal Bhajans | उत्सव - संतों की अनमोल वाणी
m83RjbbP68A.Description:
भजन मदन गोपाल - दाता तेरा मेरा प्यार | Madan Gopal Bhajans | उत्सव - संतों की अनमोल वाणी 

1. Mera Jeevan Saara मेरा जीवन सारा (00:00 Minutes) 
2. Sharnagat Pal शरणागत पाल (09:44 Minutes) 
3. Data Tera Mera Pyar दाता तेरा मेरा प्यार (16:31 Minutes)
4. Lagan Bin लगन बिन (22:31 Minutes) 
5. Sharan Mein Aa Pada शरण में आ पड़ा (27:59 Minutes) 

1. भजन - मेरा जीवन सारा बीते
मेरा जीवन सारा बीते, तेरा नाम जपते-जपते।
तेरा नाम जपते-जपते।।
कोई बाधा न आने पाये, तेरी राह में चलते-चलते।
तेरी राह में चलते-चलते।।
भवसागर में मेरी नइया, जिसका न कोई खिवैया।
मैं भवसागर तरि जाऊं, तेरा नाम जपते-जपते।।
जिस हाल में तू रक्खे, खुश होके मैं गुज़ारूं।
मेरी स्वांसा पूरी होवे, तेरा नाम जपते-जपते।।
तेरी मंज़िल मुझे बुलाये, मेरे पांव डगमगायें।
तेरी मंज़िल तक मैं पहुंचूं, तेरा दर्शन करते-करते।।
मैं कुछ नहीं तू ही है सब कुछ, सब कुछ है तेरी माया।
मेरा हर पल जग में बीते, तेरी याद करते-करते।। 

2. भजन - शरणागत पाल कृपाल हरि
शरणागत पाल कृपाल हरि, हमको एक आस तुम्हारी है।
तुम्हरे सम दूसर और नहीं, कोउ दीनन को हितकारी है।।
सुधि लेत सदा सब जीवन की, कैसी करूणा उरधारी है।
प्रतिपाल करो बिन ही बदले, अस कौन पिता महतारी है।।
जब नाथ दया कर देखत हो, छुट जात व्यथा संसारी है।
बिसराय तुम्हें जो सुख चाहे, वो महा नादान अनारी है।।
चाहना स्वर्गहुं की हमें नहीं, ना हमको कीरति प्यारी है।
हम प्रेम भक्ति के हैं प्यासे, हरि चरण कमल रज प्यारी है।।
सब भांति समर्थ सहायक हो, तब आश्रित बुद्धि हमारी है।
गुरू हंस कृपा के सागर हो, यह सेवक शरण तुम्हारी है।।

3. दाता तेरा मेरा प्यार
दाता तेरा मेरा प्यार कभी ना बदले।
मेरा यह विचार, कभी ना बदले।।
द्वार पे तेरे, आता रहूं मैं, चरणों में शीश झुकाता रहूं मैं।
मेरा यह व्यवहार, कभी ना बदले।।
अपना हो या हो बेगाना, रूठे चाहे यह सारा जमाना।
चाहे यह सारा संसार क्यों न बदले।।
सत्संग तेरा छोडूं कभी ना, मुहं भी तुझसे मोडूं कभी ना।
सदगुरु तेरा मेरा तार कभी ना बदले।।

4. भजन - लगन बिन जागे
लगन बिन जागे ना निर्मोही।।
बिना लगन की प्रीत बावरे, ओस नीर ज्यों धोई।।
हम तो रहते राम भरोसे, राम करे सो होई।।
बिन सद्गुरू कृपा नहीं पावे, लाख जतन करे कोई।।
कहें कबीर सुनो भाई साधो, गुरू बिन मुक्ति न होई।।

5. भजन - शरण में आ पड़ा तेरी
शरण में आ पड़ा तेरी, प्रभु मुझको भुलाना ना।।
तेरा है नाम दुनिया में, पतित पावन सभी जानें।
देखकर दोष को मेरे, नज़र मुझसे हटाना ना।।
काल की है नदी भारी, बहा जाता हूं धारा में।
पकड़ ले हाथ अब मेरा, नाथ देरी लगाना ना।।
भगत तेरे हैं बहुतेरे, करें सुमिरण सदा मन में।
जानकर दास दासन का, मुझे उनसे छुड़ाना ना।।

तेरा है रूप अविनाशी, जगत सारे में है पूरण।
वो ब्रह्मानंद नैनन से, मेरे कबहूं छिपाना ना।।

mVl4lQI0JVE.Name: श्री प्रेम रावत जी की भारत यात्रा -फरवरी/मार्च 2025
mVl4lQI0JVE.Description:
फरवरी के महीने में, श्री प्रेम रावत जी हैदराबाद और रायपुर में आयोजित कार्यक्रमों में भाग लेंगे, जहाँ वे शांति के संदेश में रुचि रखने वाले लोगों को संबोधित करेंगे।

अपनी यात्रा को आगे बढ़ाते हुए, वे मार्च की शुरुआत में मिर्ज़ापुर और देहरादून भी जाएंगे।
जो लोग इन कार्यक्रमों में व्यक्तिगत रूप से भाग नहीं ले सकते, उनके लिए टाइमलेस टुडे पर अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद के साथ और टाइमलेस टुडे और अंजन टीवी पर यह कार्यक्रम सीधे प्रसारित किए जाएंगे।

इसके अतिरिक्त, टाइमलेस टुडे के सदस्य विभिन्न भाषाओं में अनुवाद सहित कार्यक्रम का पुनः प्रसारण टाइमलेस टुडे की वेबसाइट और ऐप पर देख सकेंगे।

mWBuqpdj_fA.Name: Practice Life: Prem Rawat in Ljubljana
mWBuqpdj_fA.Description:
Prem Rawat’s inspiring book “Breath: Wake Up to Life,” newly released in Slovenian, Croatian, Bosnian and Serbian, was the backdrop to a captivating event with the author in Ljubljana, Slovenia on July 9th. Prem delivered his profound, simple and clear message for audiences across the Balkans.

"We’re not practicing life. We are practicing our ambitions: ‘I want to be this; I want to be that; I want to be cool,’ when we should be practicing life." Prem Rawat 

The evening began with the lights dimmed and MC and storyteller Mrs. Tjaša Koprivec Vuga setting the stage for Prem's powerful address.
 
During his talk, Prem emphasized that knowing and practicing life has nothing to do with our jobs, relationships or daily responsibilities. "The world that's inside is similar but different," he told the audience. "It’s where peace can happen. It doesn’t happen in the outside world."
 
The author touched on how even the United Nations' definition of peace never once takes into account what all humanity in every nation has in common – this breath. Rather than offering abstract definitions, Prem focused on encouraging people to actually feel peace and discover that clarity for themselves. 

The full video is available for TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

mbztPPHvxQQ.Name: Prem Rawat on Mankind’s Finest Achievement
mbztPPHvxQQ.Description:
“How can you search for something you already have? It’s not the search you need. You need to learn the art of observing, experiencing what you already have.”
Prem Rawat uses many stories and analogies to emphasize that having peace in one’s life takes a consistent effort. In the same way that tending a garden needs effort every day, or thirst needs to be quenched every day, understanding needs to be cultivated and peace needs to be felt every single day.
Hualien, Taiwan, Sunday 13 April 2014

""जो हो रहा है" वही सबकुछ है — वहीं सचमुच का आनंद है “जो हो रहा है।” यह स्वांस आ रहा है, जा रहा है — यह हो रहा है। “क्या हो गया” वहां नहीं, “क्या होगा” वहां भी नहीं, पर “क्या हो रहा है” वहीं सबकुछ है। बात ध्यान की है। ध्यान कहां है ?" —प्रेम रावत (10 अप्रैल, 2020)

n05TyS7vQFY.Name: SPECIAL PREMIERE: Celebrating 54 Years
n05TyS7vQFY.Description:
Celebrating 54 years of becoming a teacher of Self Knowledge at the age of eight years old, Prem Rawat honors the age-old tradition in India of celebrating the connection between student and teacher.

Prem’s commitment to humanity’s well-being stands in bright contrast to the fears of so many during the Covid-19 pandemic. His simple and powerful message reminds all of us to experience “this world within—the true world.”

The video and audio are available in Hindi with English translation with your subscription on the TimelessToday app and website. https://www.timelesstoday.tv/celebrating-54-years-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

njUtYwi_TF4.Name: Are You Perfect?
njUtYwi_TF4.Description:
You understand that you are perfect. And it is not some definition of perfectness that has been painted by somebody else that makes you perfect. What makes you perfect is, with your shortcomings and with your fundamental desire to want to do good, to want to be happy, to want to be in peace, this is what makes you complete; this is what makes you perfect—with your imperfection. Not without your imperfection, but with your imperfection.

चलाती है वो तुम्हारे अंदर है।" - प्रेम रावत "

हम आज में जीते हैं, लेकिन अपनी आकांक्षाओं और भविष्य की चिंताओं में फंसकर आज की सुंदरता को भूल जाते हैं। असली शांति हमारे दिल में होती है, जो हर स्थिति में मौजूद रहती है। हमें आज के पल को समझना और जीना सीखना चाहिए, क्योंकि शांति बाहरी संघर्षों के समाप्त होने से नहीं, बल्कि अंदरूनी शांति से आती है।

pAWwUBSfwzY.Name: Amaroo 2025 Virtual Access
pAWwUBSfwzY.Description:
Prem Rawat in Amaroo, Ivorys Rock, Queensland, Australia
September 8, 9, 10, 11, & 12, 2025
Video-on-Request Event Bundle (All A.M. & P.M. Sessions)

Purchase Amaroo 2025 Access on TimelessToday.tv/Store
Got questions? We’ve got answers. Visit: Info.TimelessToday.tv

Since October 1992, Amaroo — meaning “beautiful place” in the Aboriginal language — has welcomed Prem Rawat and people from around the world to Peak Crossing, Queensland, Australia. His personal insights and wisdom are shared in a relaxed, natural setting.

For five days, starting on Monday, September 8th, the magic of Amaroo will continue. TimelessToday is delighted to offer access to all event sessions in a Video-on-Request bundle to enjoy anytime, anywhere.

दर्पण - इस घट अंदर, लाइवस्ट्रीम का पुनः प्रसारण

अब टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप और वेबसाइट पर उपलब्ध है
अपनी सदस्यता के साथ इस (88:27 मिनट) ऑडियो या वीडियो का आनंद लें।

प्रीमियर : https://www.timelesstoday.tv/darpan-2020-hi-video/?utm_source=FB&utm_medium=org

क्लासिक : https://www.timelesstoday.tv/darpan-2020-hi-audio/?utm_source=FB&utm_medium=org

13 सितंबर, 2020 को, इस टाइमलेस टुडे लाइवस्ट्रीम कार्यक्रम के दौरान प्रेम रावत जी ने दुनिया भर में 13,000 से अधिक सार्वजनिक हिंदी श्रोताओं को सम्बोधित किया। सामाजिक दूरी बनाए बैठे लाइव दर्शकों का छोटा समूह कार्यक्रम स्थल पर मौजूद था।

प्रेम जी ने रामायण की कहानियाँ साझा कीं जिनसे उन्होंने सदियों पुरानी बुद्धिमत्ता का उद्धरण किया। परिप्रेक्ष्य जो आज की दुनिया में रहने वाले लोगों के लिए प्रासंगिक हैं।

Sometimes the help we’re looking for is right in front of our noses, but we don’t see it because we're expecting something different.  The question is, can we be more aware of our own attitudes and actions? In this podcast, we'll be looking at how to get out of unconscious routines that lead to painful consequences.  We'll be talking about how to break free and take charge of our own lives.

qfHNZv5euBg.Name: 121वां हंस जयंती समारोह (अनुभाग)
qfHNZv5euBg.Description:
"जब सुकरात ने कहा, 'अपने आप को जानो,' तो यह आपके भीतर के अंतरतम ब्रह्मांड का अनुभव करने का निमंत्रण था।" —प्रेम रावत, उनकी पुस्तक 'हियर योरसेल्फ' से

इस वर्ष, हम एक प्रसिद्ध वक्ता और आंतरिक शांति के श्रद्धेय शिक्षक और प्रेम रावत जी के पिताश्री, श्री हंस जी महाराज की 121वीं वर्षगांठ मना रहे हैं। इस विशेष उत्सव को मनाने के लिए आप सादर आमंत्रित हैं।

पचपन से अधिक वर्षों से, प्रेम रावत जी ने अद्वितीय और सम्मोहक संदेश को दुनिया भर के लोगों तक पहुंचाकर अपने पिता की इच्छा को पूरा किया है।

इस अनुभाग का पूर्ण संस्करण TimelessToday ऐप्प और वेबसाइट पर उपलब्ध है। अंग्रेजी अनुवाद 72 घंटों के भीतर उपलब्ध होगा।

इस अनुभाग का आनंद लें, अपने प्रियजनों के साथ साझा करें और लाइक करें। प्रेम रावत जी के इस आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल पर सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

अधिक जानकारी के लिए, कृपया www.premrawat.com पर जाएँ
प्रेम रावत जी के आधिकारिक यूट्यूब चैनल पर सबस्काइब करें
विस्तीर्ण सामग्री www.timelesstoday.tv पर उपलब्ध है
इस कॉपीराइट सामग्री का पुनरुत्पादन या वितरण करना अवैध है।

qoA9HoxnLw4.Description:
नव वर्ष का स्वागत करते हुए श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने एक व्यक्तिगत और हृदयस्पर्शी सन्देश दिया है।

2024 की ओर  बढ़ते हुए, वह 2023 की सीख को साझा करते हुए कहते हैं कि: "वह करो जो आवश्यक है, फिर वह करो जो संभव है, और इससे पहले कि आप इसे जानें , आप अपने आप को असंभव कार्य करते हुए पायेंगे ।"

पर प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। आप इस सन्देश को दूसरों के साथ साझा कर सकते हैं।

qyPMw4nZvSo.Name: "असली रंग" श्री प्रेम रावत जी देहरादून में (एक अंश)
qyPMw4nZvSo.Description:
9 मार्च 2025 को, श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने उत्तरी भारत के उत्तराखंड प्रदेश - देहरादून में एक बड़े दर्शक समूह को संबोधित किया, और सभी को सच्चे रंग, वास्तविक खुशी और संतोष के लिए आवश्यक बातें याद दिलाई।

कबीर दास जी के भजन "मेरे सतगुरु दई बताय, दलाली लालन की" का उल्लेख करते हुए, श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने कहा कि असली रंग वही है जिसमें हमें रंगा होना चाहिए - और वह रंग है दिव्यता का रंग। 

श्री प्रेम रावत जी ने याद दिलाया कि हमें अपने भीतर की दिव्यता को पहचानना होगा। उनके सन्देश ने एक सरल और अद्भुत रहस्य से पर्दा उठाया, जो हमें सच्चे सुख और संतोष की ओर ले जाता है।

इस अद्वितीय सार्वजनिक संबोधन का 86 मिनट का पुनः प्रसारण अब टाइमलेस टुडे® ऐप और वेबसाइट पर क्लासिक या प्रीमियर सदस्यता के साथ उपलब्ध है।
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/hi/product/1f6dcb0b-2611-43e2-a0c3-c48884a2d7bc

r20I_ilwyxM.Description:
Two-Day Birthday Celebration with Prem Rawat 
Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

December 9 & 10, 2023

Start Times: 
Sat., Dec. 9, 5:00 P.M. Malaysia Time (9:00 A.M. UTC)
Sun., Dec. 10, 11:00 A.M. Malaysia Time (3:00 A.M. UTC)

As we bid farewell to 2023, TimelessToday® is excited to share the news of a two-day celebration in honor of Prem Rawat’s 66th birthday on Saturday, December 9 and Sunday, December 10 in the city of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Join the celebration and appreciation for another year of his impactful and tireless efforts. 

Attend these two events in person or log in and enjoy the virtual livestreams on both days with your Classic or Premier TimelessToday® subscription.

The livestreams will be in English with simultaneous translation in French, Hindi, Spanish and Tamil.

r2ArXhlbKg0.Name: Stating the Obvious
r2ArXhlbKg0.Description:
"Everything that I am stating is obvious. What is the obvious? That you are alive. This is obvious. That peace that you look for is inside of you. That is obvious. Everything else, in a moment's notice, can change. The only thing that doesn't change is your strength, your beauty, your joy. You, after all, are a human being." 
See http://www.wopg.org for more information.

r4fmrm-S1q4.Name: Lockdown Day 10 with Prem Rawat - Fulfill the aspirations of the heart
r4fmrm-S1q4.Description:
“How fortunate you are that you’re the caretaker of the most magnificent gift there ever can be—and it’s called ‘life.’ It’s called ‘a human being’—that aspires to be free, to be content, to be in peace. Be in peace. Be in joy. Fulfill those aspirations of the heart. And you, too, will see the value of life.” — Prem Rawat “Lockdown” Day 10: A personal message from Prem Rawat addressing these trying times.

s657bDXX5Vw.Name: लॉकडाउन 2 "क्या है आपकी असली ताकत"
s657bDXX5Vw.Description:
श्री प्रेम रावत द्वारा हिंदी में सम्बोधित

"आपके अंदर अच्छाई भी है; आपके अंदर बुराई भी है; आपके अंदर अंधेरा भी है; आपके अंदर दिया भी है; आपके अंदर उजाला भी है। और अगर आप चाहें तो उस उजाले को, उस दिये को जलाकर आप अपने हृदय में उजाला उत्पन्न कर सकते हैं। यह क्षमता आप में है। और इस क्षमता को यह समझिये कि यही आपकी असली ताकत है।" —प्रेम रावत, 25 मार्च, 2020

श्री प्रेम रावत के बारे में, उनकी जिंदगी, और उनके शांति संदेश के बारे में अधिक जानकारी  यहाँ प्राप्त करें:

s7Xq2O1G9I0.Name: रंगोत्सव - होली 2022 श्री प्रेम रावत जी के साथ
s7Xq2O1G9I0.Description:
इस शुभ अवसर के उपलक्ष्य पर, श्री प्रेम रावत जी द्वारा हाल ही में रिकॉर्ड किये हुए संदेश का एक अनुभाग।

होली का पारंपरिक भारतीय त्यौहार, फाल्गुन मास की पूर्णिमा के दिन वसंत के आगमन का प्रतीक है और इससे भी महत्वपूर्ण और समयोचित बात यह कि यह पर्व बुराई पर अच्छाई की जीत का उल्लास मनाता है।

टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप्प या वेबसाइट पर सदस्यता के साथ इस अनुभाग के पूर्ण संस्करण का आनंद लें (58-मिनट): https://www.timelesstoday.tv/holi-2022-video-hi/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

पूर्ण संस्करण अंग्रेजी अनुवाद में भी उपलब्ध है। फ्रेंच, जर्मन, इतालवी, पुर्तगाली, स्पेनिश और तमिल में अनुवाद जल्द से जल्द उपलब्ध होंगे।

(Rangotsav - Holi 2022, Shri Prem Rawat Ji ke saath)

#होली #परंपरा #कृतज्ञता #जीवन

sAAZmDRMT80.Name: Nothing Without Breath: Prem Rawat in Punta del Este
sAAZmDRMT80.Description:
Fourteen years ago Prem Rawat last visited Uruguay. He returned on March 16, 2024 bringing wisdom that consistently illuminates one’s heart. 

During his talk, Prem described the transformative power of gratitude. He shared how, by shifting our focus away from our problems to the simple joy of being alive, we can experience the simplicity of fulfillment. He also challenged us to reevaluate our priorities and perceptions.

sQKhrEyNG20.Name: Kya Rakha Hai Is Bakse Mein ? - क्या रखा है इस बक्से में ? - Prem Rawat
sQKhrEyNG20.Description:
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization


Subscribe Now:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/rajvidyakender

Join Us:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rajvidyakender

Twitter: https://twitter.com/rvk_india

Blogger: http://rajvidyakender1.blogspot.in

sgFwM9GbBF0.Name: Human Behind the Mask: Prem Rawat in Kyoto
sgFwM9GbBF0.Description:
On May 16, 2025, Prem Rawat celebrated his 100th event in Japan since 1972. He addressed the universal challenge of embracing life amid personal difficulties. And he emphasized the importance of recognizing our authentic selves beneath societal masks.

The event featured "EVOLUTION: A Decade of Effort and Growth," a 12-minute video showcasing innovative tools developed to share Prem Rawat's message of inner peace and Self-Knowledge across all demographics. The presentation highlighted his dedication to breaking barriers, empowering individuals, and providing vital humanitarian aid to vulnerable communities – all in service of celebrating and fostering peace.

The replay of this event is now available in English for Classic and Premier subscribers to access on the app and website.
https://www.timelesstoday.tv/en/home/product/98bbebc8-061d-421c-8041-1ec83cdd75d1

sp9qw1smtdo.Name: The Most Precious Gift
sp9qw1smtdo.Description:
“This journey is the most beautiful journey that you have. You came. And every day of your life, a gift was given to you. You didn’t ask for it. You didn’t push a button for it. But in the abundance of the most precious thing there is on this planet earth, this gift was given to you.”
In this video, Prem Rawat speaks about being able to recognize the importance of life itself in the middle of the distractions we encounter every day, and emphasizes again that everything a human being needs is inside of them.
Sunday 22 June 2014. Madrid, Spain.

sxvZYPXP1yw.Name: AUDIOS: Two Special Events in India with Prem Rawat
sxvZYPXP1yw.Description:
Audios of Prem Rawat’s addresses at two special events in India. 
At “Medicine for Peace,” an event held at RML Hospital in New Delhi, Prem Rawat spoke with doctors and staff, encouraging them to find the “pill for peace”. The second audio is from a conference in Hyderabad entitled “Peace, Prosperity and Progress through the Sea,” where he spoke to members of the Indian Defense Services, emphasizing that peace will begin when people first make peace with themselves.

tCAWKWQezXo.Name: बैसाखी महोत्सव, श्री प्रेम रावत जी नई दिल्ली से लाइव
tCAWKWQezXo.Description:
बैसाखी पारंपरिक रूप से भारत में रबी फसल की कटाई का त्यौहार है और किसानों के परिश्रम और समृद्धि का प्रतीक है। यह दिन न केवल फसल का बल्कि नए जीवन, उत्साह और आशा का उत्सव भी है।

बैसाखी, प्रकृति और मानव परिश्रम के बीच संतुलन का सुंदर उदाहरण है।

इस खुशी, आभार और नवीनीकरण के अवसर पर, श्री प्रेम रावत रविवार, 13 अप्रैल, 2025 को शाम 4:30 बजे (IST) नई दिल्ली, भारत में अपने विचार साझा करेंगे।

अंतरराष्ट्रीय शांति शिक्षाविशरद और त्रिवार गिनेस विश्व कीर्तिमान धारक, श्री प्रेम रावत जी पूरे विश्व में अपने श्रोताओं को अपने शांति के सन्देश से प्रेरणा देते आ रहे हैं।

https://www.timelesstoday.tv/hi/home/livestream/88

tTm4YS-ZAGE.Name: Life: An Invitation, Prem Rawat in Florida
tTm4YS-ZAGE.Description:
For sixty years, Prem Rawat has traveled the world with a message that has only grown more relevant. On February 28 in Fort Lauderdale, he walked onto a stage and, within moments, had the rapt attention of his audience. He presented a thought-provoking journey through the perils of ego, the trap of borrowed wisdom, and the extraordinary power of something as simple as a breath. Two original songs, shared with everyone gathered in Fort Lauderdale and beyond, punctuated an evening that was as warm and witty as it was profound.

A reflection on a lifetime of work, and a fresh reminder of why it continues — gives hope of what becomes possible when we stop looking for answers everywhere but within.

The door to peace, he reminded us, was never locked. It never has been.

The full video is available for TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

t_XqIPVgFc0.Name: Holi - Rangrezwa Ne Rang Daara - Holi Bhajan - Prem Rawat - Har Roj Tyohaar
t_XqIPVgFc0.Description:
#Holi #Rangrezwa
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) presents the message of peace of Prem Rawat and undertakes humanitarian activities to bring harmony in life. It organises live events with Prem Rawat and video events related to his message. His message is—Peace is Possible for everyone and that peace is a fundamental need of every human being.
The organisation is dedicated to helping people explore human potential, the joy of being alive and experiencing peace. RVK in its endeavour to improve the quality of human life offers many humanitarian services, including Free Eye Clinics and Food for People in remote areas. It also supports other organisations having similar charitable, social and philanthropic goals.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen only when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within. Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message. 

Helping You Discover Personal Peace Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Prem Rawat to address people interested in his message of Self-discovery and Self-knowledge. His addresses are very much appreciated and over 50 million people have benefited from them. The number of attendees often exceeds 300,000 at events addressed by Prem Rawat. Prem Rawat presents and offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace inside. Peace Education Programme - From Darkness Into Light. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in jails across the country. His message has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.
Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization

u7mSmWf5pS4.Name: “Swayam ki Awaaz” Book Launch and Guinness World Records Holder Ceremony
u7mSmWf5pS4.Description:
Following a typhoon that hit Lucknow, India only days before Prem Rawat’s Author Event on April 2, 2023, over 114,000 people gathered for the launch of the Hindi version of his book, “Hear Yourself.” An additional virtual audience of 8,923 logged in from 86 countries, and Anjan TV also shared the celebration.  

The bestselling author read from his “Hear Yourself” book, Chapter 3: “Ground Yourself in Infinite Peace,” in Hindi, and answered questions from the Indian actress, Bhagayashree, who joined him on stage.

The author’s heartfelt words, based on decades of experience, emphasized the importance of  finding one’s own joy and peace within, no matter the situation, and how this is humankind’s  greatest possible achievement.

Surprising the audience at the end of the event, an adjudicator from Guinness World Records came on stage and announced that Prem Rawat had smashed the 2018 prior record for the largest audience attending a single author’s reading. Congratulations, Prem Rawat!

Watch the full Replay on TimelessToday app or website: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/230402-lucknow-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

#PremRawat #guinnessworldrecord #HearYourselfbook #authorevent

v7ibs7qkfKM.Name: The Silence in You - Prem Rawat in Barcelona, Spain
v7ibs7qkfKM.Description:
In this powerful presentation in Barcelona, Spain, Prem Rawat connects with the audience in the hall and more than 8,000 individuals joining remotely, encouraging them to explore what true intelligence really means and how to recognize it in one’s lifetime.

"The story of your world revolves around your breath - being alive, being an aspirant of joy and being an aspirant of that beauty of life." Prem Rawat

Rather than settling for unproven promises about the afterlife, he invites us to discover "the heaven here," emphasizing that without inner peace, we create outer conflict. Through vivid analogies – from helicopter pilots reading wind patterns to the subtle power hidden in our breath – he illustrates how self-knowledge begins with awareness of our own breathing.

Learn more about how knowing yourself can transform everything you gather from life. 

The full replay is now available in English for Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

vBvvwtha2A8.Description:

पछतावेंगा पछतावेंगा फिर वेला हाथ न आवेगा ॥ टेक ॥

रतन अमोलक मिलया भारी कांच समझकर दीना डारी
पीछे खोजत फिरे अनारी फेर कबी नहि पावेगा ॥ १

नदी किनारे बाग़ लगाया गाफिल सोवे ठंडी छाया
चुन चुन चिड़ियां सब फल खाया खाली खेत रहावेगा ॥ २

रेता का तुं महल बनावे करकर जातन समान जमावे
पल में बरखा आन गिरावे हाथ मसल रह जावेगा ॥ ३

लगा बजार नगर के मांही सबही बस्तु मिले सुखदाई
ब्रम्‍हानंद खरीदो भाई बेग दूकान उठावेगा ॥ ४

vaT_roFkWp0.Name: Bhajan - Moko Kahan Dhunde Bande - मोको कहाँ ढूंढें बन्दे मैं तो तेरे पास में
vaT_roFkWp0.Description:
Bhajan - Moko Kahan Dhunde Bande - मोको कहाँ ढूंढें बन्दे मैं तो तेरे पास में

मोको कहाँ ढूंढें बन्दे,
मैं तो तेरे पास में ।

ना तीरथ में ना मूरत में, ना एकांत निवास में ।
ना मंदिर में, ना मस्जिद में, ना काबे कैलाश में ॥

ना मैं जप में, ना मैं तप में, ना मैं व्रत उपास में ।
ना मैं क्रिया क्रम में रहता, ना ही योग संन्यास में ॥

नहीं प्राण में नहीं पिंड में, ना ब्रह्माण्ड आकाश में ।
ना मैं त्रिकुटी भवर में, सब स्वांसो के स्वास में ॥

खोजी होए तुरत मिल जाऊं एक पल की ही तलाश में ।
कहे कबीर सुनो भाई साधो, मैं तो हूँ विशवास में ॥

vjQ3cfdVycY.Name: Amaroo 2025 Opening Session
vjQ3cfdVycY.Description:
Amaroo 2025 Opening Session 1

More than 2,000 people gathered once again in Amaroo for this year’s 5-day retreat and focused on what the heart needs to soar. The opening session with Prem Rawat did just that: with his wit, wisdom and recently written and produced music tracks (shared only with Amaroo attendees at this time), he encouraged everyone to apply what they learn in Amaroo to their everyday life.

The peace educator and renowned storyteller shared the American Psychological Association's definition of 'joy' - a deep sense of well-being that differs from happiness, can persist through difficult times and often remains invisible to others.

The Session 1 video is now available with the purchase of the Amaroo 2025 Bundle until December 19th, when most sessions will be made available to all TimelessToday subscribers. You can purchase and view all sessions on the app or website.

w3GBQruRCyw.Name: Three Simple Laws: Prem Rawat in Rome
w3GBQruRCyw.Description:
According to Prem Rawat, life is anything but mundane. Speaking in Rome, Italy, on June 22, 2024, he emphasized the importance of experiencing the true value of life and being able to access peace anytime, anywhere, much like enjoying your favorite tunes. 

Not knowing the self has significant consequences, he expressed. He stressed the need for a committed effort to understand and fulfill one’s need for peace and calmness, regardless of circumstances. 

The bestselling author and peace educator then participated in a Q&A with journalist Gianluca Fabi, delving into other matters of the heart.

You can now watch or listen to the replay in English at your convenience with your Classic or Premier subscription. https://www.timelesstoday.tv/240622-rome-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

wIncTVtC3KQ.Name: Hiroshima 75th Anniversary
wIncTVtC3KQ.Description:
Thursday, August 6, 2020 marked 75 years since that fateful day when 
the world’s first deployed atomic bomb was dropped on the people of 
Hiroshima, Japan. During this anniversary, the coronavirus pandemic 
impacted the ceremonies at Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park as people 
remembered the victims.

“Real peace resides in the heart of every living human being. Each one of 
us needs to recognize it, to know it, to feel it.” ––Prem Rawat

On October 12, 2018 Prem Rawat spoke at the International Conference 
Centre in  Hiroshima and visited the memorial where he made this 
heartfelt observation: “People got up in the morning.... I don’t think 
anybody expected to die. 

What have we learned? What have we understood?

Every human being taking on that responsibility of knowing themselves 
and establishing peace for themselves is the only solution that has 
not been tried.”

Prem continues his lifelong commitment of reminding people of all ages 
that peace is achievable and should be our priority.

yxVuSQtaMJg.Name: महोत्सव 54 वर्षों का - आन्तरिक शान्ति पर मार्गदर्शन
yxVuSQtaMJg.Description:
प्रेम रावत जी गुरु और शिष्य के सम्बन्ध की भारत की युगों-पुरानी परम्परा को मनाये जाने का सम्मान करते हैं।

यह वर्ष 54वां वार्षिकोत्सव है जब प्रेम ने आठ वर्ष की आयु में आत्म-ज्ञान के शिक्षक के रूप में जिम्मेदारी ली। मानवता के कल्याण के लिए प्रेम का समर्पण उन लोगों से कितना अलग हैं जो कोविड-19 महामारी से भयभीत हैं। उनका सरल और प्रभावशाली संदेश हम सभी को ‘‘अन्दर की दुनिया — असली दुनिया’’ का अनुभव प्राप्त करने के लिए प्रेरित करता है। 

इसका वीडियो और ऑडियो अब अंग्रेजी से अनुवादित होकर हिन्दी में उपलब्ध है। आप टाइमलेस टुडे ऐप और वेबसाइट पर अपनी सदस्यता द्वारा किसी भी समय इसका आनंद ले सकते हैं।

zBzV8n5JJ0Y.Name: Save the Date! Sunday, July 3
zBzV8n5JJ0Y.Description:
Prem Rawat’s bestselling book, “Hear Yourself,” has helped many people make profound changes in their lives, gaining a deeper understanding of themselves and those around them.

On Sunday, July 3, at 5:00 p.m. CEST (3:00 p.m. UTC) the author will be speaking in English to a live audience during a book event celebrating the German release of this life-changing read.

The event will be livestreamed on TimelessToday’s app and website for all Classic and Premier subscribers. Simultaneous interpretation in French, German, Hindi, Spanish and Tamil will be provided. https://www.timelesstoday.tv/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

We will make every effort to provide an Instant Replay in the original livestreamed languages for subscribers to access for seven days; the Full-production Replay will be available several weeks later to enjoy at any time.

For more information and to order Prem Rawat’s “Hear Yourself” book in German, visit: https://www.HearYourselfBuch.de/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

In life we do not care of what has been given to us but compare ourselves with others. Everyone has unique abilities, but that does not make us happy. We look to what others have but does not enjoy the gifts been gifted to us. 
.......

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) shares and supports the vision that peace is possible in everybody’s life. This can happen when each individual takes personal responsibility and discovers personal peace within.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) invites Mr. Prem Rawat to address people interested in personal peace. Prem Rawat offers a practical way to focus within to enjoy the experience of peace. Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) also organises events regularly in prisons across the country. His messages has helped many prisoners to revert back to the normal life of a law-abiding citizen.

Raj Vidya Kender (RVK) is a non-­profit registered charitable organization.
Its activities are supported by voluntary contributions of individuals who appreciate this message.

zIAyFPQGGnM.Name: World's Largest Audience at a Lecture
zIAyFPQGGnM.Description:
On November 26, 2023, in Gaya, India, Prem Rawat addressed a gathering of 375,603 attendees, reaffirming his longstanding dedication to fostering individual well-being. Whether addressing a single individual or breaking world records, his commitment remains unwavering. 

This record-setting event, recognized by Guinness World Records for the “largest attendance at a lecture,” underscored Prem Rawat’s unique approach to personal empowerment, even in the most difficult times. He focused on the personal fulfillment theme of 'knowing the self.’

TimelessToday® livestreamed the event to 21,000 viewers from 86 countries, with 17,000 of that audience watching from all over India. 

The replay of this ‘officially amazing’ event is now available for everyone to enjoy for free on the TimelessToday® app and website and on Prem Rawat’s Official YouTube channel.

Watch on TimelessToday: https://www.timelesstoday.tv/231126-gaya-video/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=des

zT-Lbm9uMaw.Name: Uncover Life: Opening Night, Prem Rawat in Buenos Aires
zT-Lbm9uMaw.Description:
Something special happened in Buenos Aires on Friday night, March 27, 2026 — the opening night of Prem Rawat’s 3-Day Global Gathering — the first of its kind.

“Do you know how powerful silence is? It's just you and you and you and you. It's an amazing experience.” Prem Rawat

Prem Rawat took the stage and did what he does best — cut through the noise and conveyed a feeling and clarity about the quiet stillness of life. He traced the arc of human existence from Homo erectus to 2026 — making a compelling case that we’re essentially the same, even in this modern era. He talked about the problems we create and drag along with us everywhere we go and why being kind to yourself still matters.

The full video is available for TimelessToday Classic and Premier subscribers through the app and website.

zTrrVzLMV7Y.Name: A Lifetime: Prem Rawat
zTrrVzLMV7Y.Description:
“A Lifetime” episode begins with an extraordinary vignette that includes visuals of daily life accompanied by contemplative music and voices from people of many different ages and walks of life. This sets the stage for the excerpts of Prem Rawat’s addresses, in which he speaks about how human beings need to make the most of the limited time we have on the earth. The way to do that, he suggests, is to be simply human.

“To feel good because you’re in peace. To feel good because you feel good. If that is human nature, then only you can judge this: how far are you from that? And what was it that made you feel good? I bet you don’t even know. Just get up one day and you feel good! Then I submit humbly to you that that’s the way you should feel every single day."

zfaROIaMHp8.Description:
“When you focus on that gift that is making it possible for you to be here – when you truly accept that breath – in that moment you are in the present.” Prem Rawat

On October 19, 2024, in Kyoto, Japan, moderator Mr. Hideki Yabuhara had the honor of introducing author Prem Rawat once again. The event marked the much-anticipated release of the Japanese edition of his bestselling book “Hear Yourself.”

Prem spoke about the importance of being remembered for kindness and about humanity’s enduring hunger for peace.

The event concluded with Prem answering six questions from the audience, leaving a lasting impression on all in attendance.

zj_6IKBmvrI.Name: 57वीं वर्षगांठ समारोह
zj_6IKBmvrI.Description:
श्री प्रेम रावत जी के साथ ब्राइटन, यू.के से टाइमलेस टुडे पर सीधा प्रसारण
रविवार, 30 जुलाई, शाम 6:00 बजे IST

हिन्दी भाषा में, समकालिक अंग्रेजी | फ़्रेंच | स्पैनिश | तमिल अनुवाद के साथ

पिछले 57 वर्षों से श्री प्रेम रावत जी अनेकों के जीवन में शांति का व्यावहारिक अनुभव करवा रहे हैं। इस ‘अथक प्रयास’ का सम्मान करने के लिए कई लोग पारंपरिक गुरु पूजा महोत्सव के दौरान एकत्रित होंगे।

यह आनंदमय उत्सव ब्रिटेन के ब्राइटन शहर से, रविवार, 30 जुलाई, 2023 को भारतीय समयानुसार शाम 6:00 बजे सीधा प्रसारित किया जाएगा। क्लासिक या प्रीमियर सदस्यता के साथ यह प्रसारण समस्त अंतरराष्ट्रीय दर्शकों के लिए उपलब्ध होगा।

श्री प्रेम रावत जी के संदेश का आनंद लेने के लिए अपने प्रियजनों और परिवार को टाइमलेस टुडे की सदस्यता का उपहार दें और साथ ही सीधे प्रसारण, तात्कालिक तथा पूर्ण संस्करण पुनः प्रसारण, रुचि के विषय, श्रृंखलाएं, वैश्विक आभासी कार्यक्रम और बेहतरीन प्रीमियर विषयवस्तुओं तक असीमित प्रविष्टि प्रदान करें।
